# OmniSight-Productizer вҖ” TODO

Full breakdown of all pending work. Grouped by priority tier (from
HANDOFF.md). Each task lists concrete sub-steps + deliverables.
Updated: 2026-04-15.

Legend (priority tiers):
- рҹ…җ Operator-blocked (physical action required)
- рҹ…‘ Small products (< 1 day each, mostly UI/backend polish)
- рҹ…’ L4 product line вҖ” Layer A (shared infrastructure)
- рҹ…“ L4 product line вҖ” Layer B (per-product skill packs)
- рҹ…” L4 product line вҖ” Layer C (software tracks)
- рҹ…• META (organizational matrices / SOPs)

Status symbols (2026-04-20 introduced вҖ” see `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md`
В§"Production Readiness Gate"). Historical `[x]` rows ship as-is; new
rows from 2026-04-20 onwards should use the layered convention:
- `[ ]` Not started
- `[~]` In progress (uncommitted / on a branch)
- `[x]` Merged вҖ” code + tests + CI green. **Does NOT imply production
       can run it.** (Pre-2026-04-20 rows use `[x]` loosely вҖ” read
       the inline historical comment for actual deploy state.)
- `[D]` Deployed вҖ” production image + env knobs + at least one live
       smoke pass. This is what "the feature is ON in prod" means.
- `[V]` Verified вҖ” deployed вүҘ 24 h with no regression metric / error
       log. A milestone is "closed" only at this state.

---

## рҹ…җ Priority A вҖ” Operator blockers

### A1. L1-01 Real deploy.sh execution + NS migration + v0.1.0 tag (#172)
- [x] Run `scripts/deploy.sh prod v0.1.0` against production host *(done 2026-04-19: executed via `scripts/bootstrap_prod.sh --yes` вҖ” Path B docker-compose first-boot, equivalent path per docs/ops/multi-wsl-deployment.md. `scripts/deploy.sh` + `deploy-prod.sh` is the rolling-restart tool for subsequent upgrades; bootstrap needed a separate tool)*
- [x] Migrate GoDaddy NS records to Cloudflare *(done: `sora-dev.app` zone is under CF management вҖ” confirmed via `curl -sI https://ai.sora-dev.app/` returning `server: cloudflare` + `cf-ray: ...SIN` headers)*
- [x] Confirm Cloudflare Tunnel active + cert issued *(done 2026-04-19: `cloudflared` container in docker-compose.prod.yml `tunnel` profile registered 4 QUIC connections to CF edge; TLS terminated at CF edge per Zero Trust dashboard)*
- [x] Smoke GET `/api/health` from public domain *(done 2026-04-19: `curl https://ai.sora-dev.app/api/v1/health` returns `{"status":"online","engine":"OmniSight Engine","phase":"3.2"}`; full smoke test in `docs/ops/deploy_postmortem_2026-04-19.md` В§3)*
- [x] Tag `v0.1.0` on master *(done: local tag created 2026-04-15)*
- [x] Push `v0.1.0` tag to origin *(done: pushed to origin 2026-04-15)*
- [x] Update HANDOFF with deploy URL + v0.1.0 release notes *(done: runbook + release notes added; HANDOFF.md 2026-04-19 entry adds go-live with live URL https://ai.sora-dev.app)*

### A3. Production wire-up of done-but-unwired milestones
> Both G4 (SQLiteвҶ’PG, 6/6 вң…) and I10 (multi-worker + Redis shared state, 4/4 вң…) shipped code-ready weeks ago but the production stack has never actually wired them in вҖ” `.env` had `OMNISIGHT_WORKERS=1` and `OMNISIGHT_REDIS_URL` commented, the PG HA bundle has never been started. Three-phase rollout: Redis (no infra cost, fixes WAL storm symptoms today), Gemma4 local LLM (needs network, zero code), PG cutover (needs maintenance window).

  - [x] **5-6 Call-site sweep вҖ” GitHub + GitLab paths**пјҡжӣҝжҸӣ `settings.github_token*` / `settings.gitlab_token*` / `settings.gitlab_url` 11 жӘ”дёӯзҡ„зӣёй—ңеј•з”ЁпјҢж”№жҲҗ `pick_account_for_url(repo_url)` жҲ– `pick_default("github")`пјӣ`workspace.py` clone/fetch/pushгҖҒ`agents/tools.py` agent-level git opsгҖҒ`routers/integration.py` (жңҖеӨҡ refsгҖҒUI еӣһеҜ«и·Ҝеҫ‘жңғдёҖдҪөжҸӣ) <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-6 shipped (commit `56af3952`): 7 async call sites ported to `pick_account_for_url` / `pick_default` + 2 sync-fallback leaks cut + 11 new tests + 2 existing test updates. **Ported**: (1) `git_platform.py::_create_github_pr` / `_create_gitlab_mr` вҖ” url-first then platform default, GitLab MR takes `instance_url` from the resolver row; (2) `release.py::upload_to_github` / `upload_to_gitlab` вҖ” `pick_default` + GitLab row's `instance_url` overrides legacy `settings.gitlab_url` for multi-instance deployments; (3) `issue_tracker.py::_sync_github` / `_comment_github` / `_sync_gitlab` / `_comment_gitlab` вҖ” url-first then default (JIRA paths untouched per 5-8 scope); (4) `routers/webhooks.py::_trigger_ci_pipelines` вҖ” both GitHub Actions (`GH_TOKEN` env) and GitLab CI (`PRIVATE-TOKEN` + self-hosted base URL) go through `pick_default`; (5) `routers/integration.py::_test_github` / `_test_gitlab` probe buttons вҖ” test what the resolver would actually send; GitLab probe prefers row's `instance_url`. **Leak cuts**: (6) `git_auth._get_token_for_url` вҖ” dropped duplicate `settings.github_token` / `gitlab_token` scalar fallback on except branch (`get_token_for_url` already drives through `_build_registry`'s scalar synthesis, dup read was hiding failures); (7) `git_credentials.get_token_for_url` вҖ” dropped platform-agnostic "any github.com-looking host вҶ’ default token" fallback that leaked github.com token to unrelated GHE Enterprise URLs. Shim still synthesises `default-github` / `default-gitlab` virtual rows for the legitimate github.com / gitlab.com callers, so behaviour-preserving for empty-`git_accounts` deployments. **Intentionally NOT touched**: `legacy_credential_migration.py` (5-5 migration reader), `_build_registry` (the shim absorbs legacy reads by design), `integration.py::get_settings` + `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` (5-9 UI + 5-10 deprecation scope), Gerrit paths (5-7), JIRA paths (5-8). **Tests**: new `test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep.py` 11 йЎҶ вҖ” 3 release (happy path + skip-no-token + instance_url override) / 3 issue_tracker (GL sync with resolver + error path + GH sync with resolver env) / 3 integration probes (GH with resolver token + not_configured + GL instance_url override) / 2 regression guards on get_token_for_url (GHE leak blocked + github.com still resolves). Updated `test_release.py::test_github_upload_*_mock` е…©йЎҶж”№ patch `backend.git_credentials.pick_default`гҖӮ**й©—иӯү**пјҡ`pytest` 11/11 passedпјӣе»Јеҹҹ 242/242 passed across test_multi_repo + test_git_auth + test_git_credentials_phase5_2/5_3 + test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep + test_external_webhooks + test_git_accounts_schema + test_git_accounts_crud + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_integration_settings (30 PG-live-gated skips, 0 regressions)гҖӮpre-existing 4 `test_release::TestRelease*` + 31 `test_webhooks::TestGerrit*` failures еқҮзӮә pool-init fixture issueгҖҒgit stash й©—иӯүзӮә predating this row. **Fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` е°Қ 7 touched prod жӘ” + 2 test жӘ” 0 е‘ҪдёӯгҖӮ**Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**пјҡ0 ж–° module-globalsпјӣcall sites inline-import resolver еҮҪејҸгҖҒз„Ў local cacheпјӣжҜҸ worker жү“еҲ°еҗҢ async pool (жҲ–еҗҢ shim source)гҖҒby construction cross-worker coherent. **Read-after-write audit**пјҡ0 ж–° write path вҖ” еҸӘйҮҚе°Һ read вҖ” з„Ўж–° serialisationвҶ’parallel иЎҢзӮәи®ҠеҢ–. **Scope зҙҖеҫӢ**пјҡеҡҙж јеҸӘе®ҢжҲҗ row 5-6 вҖ” 0 иЎҢ Gerrit (5-7) / 0 иЎҢ JIRA (5-8) / 0 иЎҢ UI rewrite (5-9) / 0 иЎҢ deprecation (5-10) / 0 иЎҢ soak (5-11). **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + tests з¶ пјӣlegacy иЎҢзӮәе°Қ empty-`git_accounts` deployments з¶ӯжҢҒдёҚи®ҠпјҢжүҖд»Ҙжң¬ row е–®зҚЁ ship е®үе…ЁгҖҒдёҚеҝ…зӯү 5-5 auto-migration е…Ҳи·‘гҖӮ**Next gate**: dev-only з¶ӯжҢҒеҲ° 5-9 (UI) жҲ– 5-11 (soak)пјӣPhase 5 ж•ҙй«”еҲ° 5-9 + 5-11 жүҚ flip deployed-active. **Rollback**: `git revert 56af3952` е…ЁйҖҖеӣһ вҖ” з„Ў schema / з„Ў data и®ҠеҢ–пјӣcall sites жҒўеҫ©зӣҙжҺҘи®Җ settings.github_token / gitlab_token / gitlab_url. -->
  - [x] **5-7 Call-site sweep вҖ” Gerrit paths**пјҡ`backend/gerrit.py` + `routers/webhooks.py` (HMAC й©—з°ҪиҰҒзңӢ which account зҡ„ webhook_secret)пјӣ`gerrit_instances` JSON list иЈЎзҡ„жҜҸзӯҶ вҶ’ жҗ¬жҲҗ `git_accounts(platform='gerrit')` rowпјӣ`gerrit_replication_targets` з•ҷ global scalarпјҲе®ғжҳҜ replication destination list дёҚжҳҜ accountпјүпјӣй©— `create-change` / `set-reviewer` SSH ops иғҪжӢҝеҲ°е°Қзҡ„ credential per project <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-7 shipped: 5 prod files ported + 1 new resolver helper + 1 new test file (19 tests) + 1 existing test updated. **Ported call sites**: (1) `backend/gerrit.py` вҖ” `GerritClient` rewrite: new `_resolve_account(project)` method scans tenant-scoped `git_accounts(platform='gerrit')` for project-name match (case-insensitive exact), falls back to `pick_default("gerrit", touch=False)` (which honours operator-marked `is_default=TRUE` AND the legacy shim's synthesised `default-gerrit` virtual row from `settings.gerrit_*` scalars). Old `_ssh_args` property вҶ’ new `_ssh_args_for(account)` method that takes per-account `ssh_host`/`ssh_port`/`ssh_key`. All 6 public ops (`query_change` / `query_open_changes` / `post_review` / `post_inline_comments` / `submit_change` / `test_connection`) now resolve account before building argv; new `set_reviewer` op added to cover the row 5-7 spec acceptance criterion explicitly (`set-reviewers --add <user>` SSH op routed to per-project account). No-account path returns `{"error": "Gerrit not configured"}` cleanly. (2) `backend/git_credentials.py` вҖ” added `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async(host, platform, *, tenant_id=None)`: async sibling of the legacy sync `get_webhook_secret_for_host`; resolution chain = exact host match in registry (filtered by platform) вҶ’ `pick_default(platform, touch=False)` вҶ’ settings scalar fallback (`gerrit_webhook_secret` / `github_webhook_secret` / `gitlab_webhook_secret`). LRU not touched (webhook traffic shouldn't disturb interactive `last_used_at` ordering). Forward-reference to `pick_default` is safe because async invocation is always post-module-load. (3) `backend/routers/webhooks.py::gerrit_webhook` HMAC verify вҖ” switched per-instance secret read from sync `get_webhook_secret_for_host` to async `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` so operator-added `git_accounts(platform='gerrit')` rows are honoured; scalar-first then per-host check structure preserved (single-instance deploys with only `settings.gerrit_webhook_secret` set still authenticate). Same async port applied to `github_webhook` + `gitlab_webhook` per-instance secret reads (closes the gap left by 5-6 which only ported token reads, not webhook secret reads). (4) `backend/routers/invoke.py` create-change auto-push: `_cfg.gerrit_ssh_host` / `gerrit_ssh_port` / `gerrit_project` reads replaced with `pick_default("gerrit")`-resolved `ssh_host` / `ssh_port` / `project`; gates on `_cfg.gerrit_enabled` master-switch (intentionally kept as scalar вҖ” it's a feature flag, not a credential) AND `if ssh_host and project:` so missing fields gracefully skip. (5) `backend/routers/integration.py::_test_gerrit` probe button вҖ” now uses `pick_default("gerrit", touch=False)` so the probe SSH-args its way to the resolved host/port, not the stale scalars. **Intentionally NOT touched** (per row 5-7 spec): `settings.gerrit_replication_targets` (list of git remote *destinations*, not credentials вҖ” stays global); `backend/agents/tools.py::settings.gerrit_enabled` reads (4 sites вҖ” master-switch feature flag, not credential); `backend/git_auth.py::detect_platform`'s `settings.gerrit_ssh_host` read (URL classification only); `backend/workspace.py::settings.gerrit_*` repo-source default (setup-time fallback, not per-call credential); `backend/routers/integration.py` Settings-UI mirror reads (5-9 / 5-10 scope: UI rewrite + deprecation). **Tests**: new `backend/tests/test_phase5_7_call_site_sweep.py` 19 йЎҶ вҖ” 8 GerritClient (per-project resolve / default fallback / no-account вҶ’ None / per-platform filtering) + 3 webhook HMAC integration (per-instance authenticates / wrong-sig 401 / scalar fallback) + 2 integration probe (resolved host / not_configured) + 2 invoke create-change push   - [x] **5-8 Call-site sweep вҖ” JIRA paths**пјҡ`backend/issue_tracker.py` зҡ„ `_parse_jira_issue_url` + `settings.notification_jira_token` ж”№иө°ж–° registry (`pick_account_for_url(issue_url, platform='jira')`)пјӣй©— multi-tenant дёӢ A tenant зҡ„ JIRA credentials дёҚжңғ leak еҲ° B tenant зҡ„ webhook еӣһжҮүпјӣstatus transition + webhook secret е…©и·ҜйғҪ covered <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-8 shipped: 3 prod files ported + 1 new resolver branch + 1 legacy-shim extension + 1 new test file (16 tests) + 3 existing test fixtures updated. **Ported call sites**: (1) `backend/issue_tracker.py::_sync_jira` вҖ” status-transition path swaps `settings.notification_jira_token` for the multi-account registry chain `pick_account_for_url(issue_url)` вҶ’ `pick_default("jira")` with a mandatory platform post-filter (`account.get("platform") != "jira"`) so a catch-all `url_patterns` match on a non-jira row falls through to `pick_default('jira')` instead of leaking e.g. a github token to a jira API call; resolved `account.instance_url` wins over the URL-parsed host for both the list-transitions GET and the POST transition URL (multi-instance JIRA routing). (2) `backend/issue_tracker.py::_comment_jira` вҖ” same resolver chain + post-filter + instance_url preference so PAT rotation via Phase-5-4 CRUD takes effect without restart. (3) `backend/routers/webhooks.py::jira_webhook` вҖ” HMAC bearer verify now reads through `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async("", "jira")` (empty host because JIRA bearer auth has no HMAC-over-body signal, so resolver jumps straight to `pick_default('jira')` + scalar tail); `try/except` wraps resolver with `settings.jira_webhook_secret` fallback so shim-mode / pool-hiccup still authenticates single-instance deployments. **Resolver extensions**: (4) `backend/git_credentials.py::get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` grew a `platform == "jira"` branch in the scalar-fallback chain (alongside gerrit/github/gitlab) so `jira_webhook` can call the helper uniformly. (5) `backend/git_credentials.py::_build_registry` now synthesises a `default-jira` virtual row from `notification_jira_*` scalars (token + url + project + webhook_secret, `is_default=True`) so shim-mode `pick_default("jira")` works without every caller carrying its own scalar-fallback branch; pool-mode deployments get the real row from `git_accounts` via the row 5-5 auto-migration (`ga-legacy-jira-*`) instead. **Intentionally NOT touched** (per row 5-8 scope): `backend/issue_tracker._detect_platform_from_issue_url` keeps its `settings.notification_jira_url` / `settings.gitlab_url` hostname hints вҖ” that's URL classification for routing decisions, not credential lookup, and mirrors 5-7's decision to leave `git_auth.detect_platform`'s `settings.gerrit_ssh_host` read in place; `backend/routers/integration.py::_test_jira` probe button + `backend/jira_adapter.py::build_default_jira_adapter` stay scalar-reading for row 5-9/5-10 scope (UI rewrite + deprecation); `settings.notification_jira_project` + `notification_jira_url` remain in Settings as configuration knobs (row 5-10). **Tests**: new `backend/tests/test_phase5_8_call_site_sweep.py` 16 йЎҶ вҖ” 4 `_sync_jira` (happy path resolver token + error without token + instance_url override wins over URL host + platform post-filter blocks cross-platform leak) / 2 `_comment_jira` (happy path + error without token) / 4 `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` JIRA branch (platform default match + scalar fallback + **tenant isolation test: tenant-A's secret invisible to tenant-B lookup and vice versa** via `tenant_id` kwarg scope + per-platform filtering against gerrit-row-on-same-host) / 4 `jira_webhook` integration via TestClient (registry secret authenticates + wrong secret 401 + 503 when no secret + scalar fallback when resolver raises) / 2 `_build_registry` shim (synthesises default-jira row when scalar set + omits when no scalar). Updated 3 existing test fixtures to zero out `notification_jira_*` in their `settings` mocks (MagicMock's auto-generated truthy defaults triggered the new JIRA virtual-row synthesis during adjacent tests): `test_git_credentials_phase5_2.py::_empty_settings_mock`, `test_git_credentials_phase5_3.py` (2 patching loops in touch-skip tests), `test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep.py` (2 get_token_for_url regression guards). **Verification**: `pytest backend/tests/test_phase5_8_call_site_sweep.py` 16/16 passed in 0.39s; Phase-5 neighbour sweep `pytest test_git_credentials_phase5_2/5_3 + test_phase5_6/7/8_call_site_sweep + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_git_accounts_schema + test_git_accounts_crud` 127/127 passed (30 PG-live skips); broader JIRA/webhook neighbour `pytest test_external_webhooks + test_jira_adapter + test_integration_settings + test_orchestrator_gateway` 156/156 passed. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` е°Қ 4 touched files (issue_tracker.py + routers/webhooks.py + git_credentials.py + test file) 0 е‘Ҫдёӯ вҖ” **FINGERPRINT-CLEAN**. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**: 0 new module-globals; call sites inline-import resolver; shim's existing `_CREDENTIALS_CACHE` remains per-worker (each worker derives same value from same Settings source, cross-worker coherent by construction). **Read-after-write audit**: 0 new write path вҖ” only read redirection вҖ” no serialisationвҶ’parallel behavior change. **Cross-tenant isolation contract**: the test `test_jira_tenant_isolation_via_registry_scope` explicitly asserts that `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async("", "jira", tenant_id="t-A")` returns only tenant-A's secret, and the inverse for t-B, proving the `WHERE tenant_id = $1` filter in the pool-backed path is load-bearing. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5-8 only вҖ” 0 UI rewrite (5-9) / 0 deprecation (5-10) / 0 soak (5-11) / 0 OAuth (5-12); `_test_jira` probe + `jira_adapter` left for row 5-9/5-10; `_detect_platform_from_issue_url` untouched (classification, not credential). **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + tests з¶ ; on empty-`git_accounts` deployments the legacy shim's new default-jira virtual row makes `pick_default('jira')` behave identically to pre-5-8 `settings.notification_jira_token` reads, so this row ships safely before row 5-5 auto-migration runs. **Next gate**: dev-only until row 5-9 (UI) or 5-11 (soak); Phase 5 overall flips to deployed-active only at 5-9 + 5-11. **Rollback**: revert this commit вҖ” no schema / no data changes; call sites revert to direct `settings.notification_jira_*` reads; shim's default-jira virtual row disappears. -->
  - [x] **5-9 UI rewrite вҖ” `AccountManagerSection`**пјҡеҸ–д»Ј `integration-settings.tsx::MultipleInstancesSection`пјӣжҜҸеҖӢ account дёҖ rowпјҲplatform icon + label + username + host + url_patterns + default вӯҗ + test statusпјүпјӣж–°еўһ form ж”ҜжҸҙ github / gitlab / gerrit / jira еӣӣеҖӢ platform еҲҶй Ғпјӣtoken input жңүгҖҢtest before saveгҖҚжҢүйҲ• (call `POST /git-accounts/{id}/test`)пјӣdelete жңү confirm + иӯҰе‘ҠгҖҢд»Қжңү repo дҫқиіҙйҖҷеҖӢ accountпјҹгҖҚ(е°Қ url_patterns еҒҡеҸҚжҹҘ)пјӣdefault еҲҮжҸӣдёҖйҚөпјӣlegacy `github_token_map` д»ҚйЎҜзӨәдҪҶжЁҷгҖҢLegacy (will auto-migrate on next login)гҖҚ <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-9 shipped: 1 deleted (legacy `MultipleInstancesSection` + `TokenMapInstance` + `serializeTokenMap` helpers, -283 lines) + 1 new component (`AccountManagerSection` ~440 lines inside `components/omnisight/integration-settings.tsx`) + 7 new lib/api.ts client functions + 13 vitest cases + 1 existing test fixture refresh. **Component**: drives the `/api/v1/git-accounts` REST surface (Phase-5-4) end-to-end вҖ” `listGitAccounts` on mount, four platform tabs (github/gitlab/gerrit/jira) with per-platform-shaped ADD form (instance_url for github/gitlab/jira; ssh_host+ssh_port+project for gerrit; ssh_key for gerrit), `url_patterns` newline-textarea parsed via comma-or-newline split, `is_default` toggle, "TEST BEFORE SAVE" calling `testGitForgeToken` for github/gitlab/gerrit candidates and short-circuiting JIRA with "must save first" hint (since `testGitForgeToken` doesn't speak JIRA). Per-row TEST button calls the saved-account probe `POST /git-accounts/{id}/test` (loads decrypted token server-side, never crosses the wire). Per-row "вҳ… SET" calls `updateGitAccount({is_default:true})` вҖ” backend's partial-unique index serialises the cross-account demotion atomically (Phase-5-4 guarantee). Per-row delete opens a confirm dialog with two warnings: (a) "this account has N URL patterns вҖ” repos matching X may be left without credential" if `url_patterns.length > 0`, (b) "this is the platform default вҖ” backend will auto-elect next" if `is_default`. Confirm calls `deleteGitAccount(id, {auto_elect_new_default: true})`. Legacy `github_token_map` / `gitlab_token_map` JSON blobs surface as an orange "Legacy (will auto-migrate on next login)" banner only when non-empty вҖ” disappears once Phase-5-5 lifespan auto-migration converts them to `ga-legacy-*` rows. Plaintext tokens never render вҖ” only `вҖҰlast4` fingerprints from backend `secret_store.fingerprint`. **lib/api.ts additions**: `GitAccount` / `GitAccountCreate` / `GitAccountUpdate` / `GitAccountListResponse` / `GitAccountTestResult` / `GitAccountResolveResponse` interfaces matching `_row_to_public_dict` shape; `listGitAccounts({platform?, enabled_only?})` / `getGitAccount` / `createGitAccount` / `updateGitAccount` / `deleteGitAccount({auto_elect_new_default?})` / `testGitAccountById` / `resolveGitAccountForUrl` fetchers вҖ” all going through the existing `request<T>` helper (CSRF + tenant-id header + retry ladder + 15s abort timeout inherited). **Tests**: `test/components/account-manager-section.test.tsx` 13 йЎҶ вҖ” list+filter (3) / add form (2 вҖ” github + gerrit body shape) / TEST-before-save (2 вҖ” github calls `testGitForgeToken`, JIRA short-circuits) / per-row actions (4 вҖ” TEST + вҳ… SET + DELETE confirm + DELETE cancel) / legacy banner (2 вҖ” renders when non-empty + hidden when empty). Existing `integration-settings.test.tsx` row 232 assertion updated to look for the new `account-manager-section` testid + `GIT ACCOUNTS` heading instead of the deleted `Multiple Instances` label. **й©—иӯү**: `pnpm vitest run test/components/integration-settings.test.tsx test/components/integration-settings-sse.test.tsx test/components/account-manager-section.test.tsx` вҶ’ 69/69 passed in 4.63s. `pnpm tsc --noEmit` shows the 3 pre-existing TS2322 errors at GitHub/GitLab/Gerrit `onTest` overrides (called out in Phase-4-2/4-3 HANDOFF entries) вҖ” `git stash` confirmed zero new TS errors. `pnpm eslint` shows the 1 pre-existing `set-state-in-effect` error at JiraRotateDialog L2939 (formerly L2704; offset because of -283 line delta) вҖ” `git stash` confirmed zero new lint errors. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` е°Қ 3 touched files (`integration-settings.tsx` + `lib/api.ts` + new test file) **0 е‘Ҫдёӯ**. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer N/A вҖ” frontend, no Python workers)**: pure React component state via `useState`/`useEffect` вҖ” per-component-instance, not module-global. Re-fetch after every mutation (`refresh()`) gives canonical PG state вҖ” no read-after-write timing concerns. **Read-after-write audit**: `handleSubmitNew` / `handleSetDefault` / `handleConfirmDelete` all `await refresh()` after the mutating call returns 2xx вҖ” `refresh` re-issues `GET /git-accounts` which the Phase-5-4 backend confirms commits-before-return. **Scope зҙҖеҫӢ**: еҡҙж јеҸӘе®ҢжҲҗ row 5-9 вҖ” 0 иЎҢ deprecation path (5-10) / 0 иЎҢ soak (5-11) / 0 иЎҢ OAuth (5-12) / 0 иЎҢ Phase-5b LLM credentials. **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + tests з¶ ; Operator needs `pnpm build` + frontend image rebuild + rolling recreate + `docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml restart frontend` for the new UI to surface; backend image is unchanged (the routes already shipped in Phase-5-4 `f76b...` lifespan). Empty `git_accounts` deployments will show empty platform tabs + the "No accounts yet" hint and the legacy banner if `*_token_map` settings are non-empty вҖ” operator can either let Phase-5-5 auto-migrate on next backend boot (recommended) or manually create accounts via the new ADD form. **Next gate**: dev-only вҶ’ operator live verify (open the modal in a real browser, add one github account, hit "TEST BEFORE SAVE", confirm SAVE, see row appear, hit per-row TEST, hit вҳ… SET, hit DELETE вҶ’ CANCEL, then DELETE вҶ’ CONFIRM, observe row disappears) вҖ” Phase 5 ж•ҙй«”иҰҒеҲ° 5-11 (real-credential soak across 4 platforms + per-tenant isolation drill) жүҚ flip deployed-active. **Rollback**: revert this commit вҖ” restores `MultipleInstancesSection` (legacy github/gitlab token-map UI) + removes new section + new lib/api.ts client functions. The 7 new backend `git-accounts` REST endpoints stay live (they were Phase-5-4) but no UI consumes them; old `*_token_map` UI works as before. -->

  - [x] **5-12 пјҲoptional follow-upпјүOAuth flow**пјҡPAT жҳҜ MVPпјҢOAuth 2.0 (GitHub App install / GitLab OAuth2 / JIRA OAuth) жҳҜеҫҢзәҢеҚҮзҙҡпјӣзӣ®еүҚе…ҲдёҚеҒҡгҖҒдҪҶ data model иҰҒз•ҷ `auth_type TEXT DEFAULT 'pat'` ж¬„дҪҚ + code_verifier JSON ж¬„дҪҚ for жңӘдҫҶз”Ё <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-12 shipped (OAuth-prep schema only; no OAuth implementation per spec "зӣ®еүҚе…ҲдёҚеҒҡ"): 1 new alembic migration + 1 SQLite bootstrap mirror edit + 1 design-doc section + 1 new drift-guard test file + 1 test-fixture-frozen-set extension = 5 touched files, 0 CRUD / resolver / UI changes. **Schema**: (1) `backend/alembic/versions/0028_git_accounts_code_verifier.py` вҖ” PG path `ALTER TABLE git_accounts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS code_verifier JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb` (metadata-only op on PG 11+, no table rewrite, no lock escalation вҖ” safe against live prod); SQLite path `ALTER TABLE git_accounts ADD COLUMN code_verifier TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'` (dev parity, TEXT-of-JSON) with try/except for duplicate-column on dev re-runs; both downgrade paths drop the column with `IF EXISTS` / try-swallow. `down_revision="0027"`, chains cleanly after row 5-1's `0027_git_accounts`. (2) `backend/db.py::_SCHEMA` mirror вҖ” added `code_verifier TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'` at the end of the SQLite `git_accounts` create block (matches alembic 0028 for fresh SQLite bootstraps that skip the incremental alembic path); kept the existing 21-column trailing shape above it intact. **Why additive with DEFAULT, not a table recreate**: 0027's `git_accounts` is already populated by row 5-5's auto-migration lifespan hook; any destructive rewrite would lose operator-added rows. NOT NULL + DEFAULT `'{}'` means existing rows read as `{}` without a backfill UPDATE. Zero blast radius. **Why `auth_type` column is already present and not part of this commit**: row 5-1's `0027_git_accounts.py` shipped `auth_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pat'` day-1 (cheap one-token discriminator every row carries); row 5-4's `_VALID_AUTH_TYPES = {"pat","oauth","ssh"}` + Pydantic `pattern=r"^(pat|oauth|ssh)$"` on `GitAccountCreate.auth_type` + `GitAccountUpdate.auth_type` already accept `'oauth'` as a valid discriminator value. Row 5-12's job was only the remaining `code_verifier` half of the reservation. **Scope discipline (strict)**: NO CRUD surface change вҖ” `_GIT_ACCOUNTS_COLS` in both `backend/git_accounts.py` and `backend/git_credentials.py` keep their 21-column SELECT list unchanged (`code_verifier` is unread by resolver + CRUD response shape); `update_account`'s `allowed_direct` / `allowed_json` / `allowed_enc` / `allowed_flag` allowlists do NOT list `code_verifier` (a PATCH attempt raises `ValueError("Unknown update fields: ['code_verifier']")`); `GitAccountCreate` / `GitAccountUpdate` Pydantic models do NOT declare the field; `AccountManagerSection` UI unchanged; no resolver / auto-migration / audit changes. The column is writable only by a future OAuth handler that row 5-12's TODO header explicitly defers. **Docs**: (3) `docs/phase-5-multi-account/01-design.md` В§10 "OAuth prep columns (row 5-12)" вҖ” 6 sub-sections (~150 lines): what shipped on 5-12 / why JSONB not TEXT / what 5-12 deliberately does NOT do (no OAuth handler, no CRUD exposure, no UI, no migration from existing OAuth infra) / drift guards (cross-reference to test file) / rollback posture (non-destructive drop until OAuth lands) / production-readiness gate (dev-only; [V] waits for OAuth landing). **Tests**: (4) `backend/tests/test_phase5_12_oauth_prep.py` NEW ~360 LOC, 4 layers: **Layer 1** (3 pure-unit migration sanity) вҖ” 0028 file exists / revision chain `0028 вҶ’ 0027` / load-bearing fragments grep (PG `JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb` + SQLite `TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'` + both up/downgrade branches). **Layer 2** (5 scope-discipline guards, pure unit) вҖ” `code_verifier` NOT in `git_accounts._GIT_ACCOUNTS_COLS` / NOT in `git_credentials._GIT_ACCOUNTS_COLS` / NOT in `update_account` source body / NOT in `GitAccountCreate.model_fields` + NOT in `GitAccountUpdate.model_fields` / `_VALID_AUTH_TYPES` still contains both `'pat'` and `'oauth'` (future-landing OAuth row should expect the discriminator already works). These 5 are the real "don't ship OAuth under 5-12" guards вҖ” if any test in this group fails, the commit trying to land it is extending 5-12's scope and should break out into its own row. **Layer 3** (4 SQLite-live contract tests) вҖ” column present after fresh `db.init` / `DEFAULT '{}'` fires on minimal INSERT / `auth_type DEFAULT 'pat'` still fires on minimal INSERT (belt+braces on 5-1) / JSON round-trip with a realistic OAuth payload (verifier+state+method+scopes+expires_at) works without codec surprises. **Layer 4** (4 PG-live contract tests, gated on `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL`) вҖ” column present with `data_type='jsonb'` in information_schema / `column_default` contains `'{}'` + `jsonb` / DEFAULT fires on PG INSERT / JSON round-trip via `$N::jsonb` asyncpg cast / `NotNullViolationError` on explicit NULL write. (5) `backend/tests/test_git_accounts_schema.py::_EXPECTED_SQLITE_COLUMNS` frozenset grew a `"code_verifier"` entry with an inline comment pointing to design В§10, so the existing "unexpected column" guard now accepts the new column without regressing. **й©—иӯү**: `pytest backend/tests/test_phase5_12_oauth_prep.py + test_git_accounts_schema.py` in local venv **21 passed, 12 PG-live skipped, 2 pre-existing failures on `test_migration_*_revision_chain` caused by alembic missing from local `.venv` (import side-effect at `spec.loader.exec_module(m)` вҖ” same failure mode already present in row 5-1's `test_migration_0027_revision_chain` in this venv; git-stash-verified predates this commit; passes in CI where alembic is a transitive dep of the backend requirements.txt)**. Phase-5 neighbour sweep `pytest test_git_accounts_crud + test_git_credentials_phase5_2 + test_git_credentials_phase5_3 + test_phase5_6/7/8_call_site_sweep + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_phase5_10_deprecation + test_phase5_11_tenant_isolation/rotation_drill/dryrun_script` вҶ’ **144 passed, 41 PG-live skipped, 0 regressions**. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on `0028_git_accounts_code_verifier.py` **0 hits**; on `test_phase5_12_oauth_prep.py` hits are all in Layer 3 SQLite-live block (legal вҖ” aiosqlite uses `?` placeholders + explicit `commit()`, same pattern as `test_git_accounts_schema.py`'s Layer 2 block); Layer 4 PG-live uses `$N` asyncpg placeholders + auto-commit (0 hits); `backend/db.py` diff is 7 lines all inside the SQLite `_SCHEMA` block (expected `?`-era SQL pattern for dev parity, not new code). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #2 вҖ” PG/SQLite migration)**: schema-only migration. Alembic upgrade is a single-writer lifespan op on the canonical DB; every worker reads the same PG / SQLite row set after upgrade. No new module-level state, no singleton, no cache. Cross-worker consistency by construction. **Read-after-write audit**: 0 new write path in application code. The migration itself writes once at upgrade time; no test downstream of 5-12 depends on `INSERT INTO git_accounts` serialisation timing (column is unread by app code). **Migrator drift guard**: `scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_pg.py::list_source_columns` uses `PRAGMA table_info()` dynamic introspection вҖ” picks up `code_verifier` automatically without code change. **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” column lands on `alembic upgrade head` during next backend `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate lifespan init; operator needs **zero** manual action (idempotent migration, `ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS` on PG, try/swallow-duplicate on SQLite). **Next gate**: stays `dev-only` until the future OAuth implementation lands (PKCE exchange handler + token-exchange handler + `_GIT_ACCOUNTS_COLS` extension + `allowed_json` entry for rotation UI). Row 5-12's reservation is complete. **Rollback**: `alembic downgrade -1` drops the column only; non-destructive against PAT-only deployments since the column is unread and unwritten today. Revert commit = remove 2 new files + 3 line edits (db.py + test frozen-set + design doc В§10) + TODO row restore `- [x]` вҶ’ `- [ ]`. No schema impact on existing `git_accounts` rows beyond losing their `'{}'` default value for this column. -->

  - [x] **5b-2 Backend resolver refactor**пјҡ`backend/agents/llm.py::get_llm()` еҺҹжң¬ `api_key = getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key")` ж”№жҲҗ `api_key = await get_llm_credential(provider, tenant_id)`пјӣresolver и®Җ `llm_credentials` table вҶ’ fallback еҲ° `settings.{provider}_api_key`пјҲlegacy `.env` read-onlyпјүвҶ’ fallback еҲ° missingвҶ’raise `LLMCredentialMissingError`пјӣ`list_providers()` зҡ„ `configured` ж¬„дҪҚд№ҹиө° resolverгҖҒдёҚеҶҚзӣҙжҺҘ `bool(settings.{provider}_api_key)` <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-2 shipped: (1) new module `backend/llm_credential_resolver.py` вҖ” `async get_llm_credential(provider, tenant_id=None) -> LLMCredential` (DB-first chain: `llm_credentials` row вҶ’ `settings.{provider}_api_key` legacy fallback вҶ’ raise `LLMCredentialMissingError`), `get_llm_credential_sync(...)` (Settings-only sibling for the sync LangChain factory path in `get_llm`), `is_provider_configured(...)` (sync boolean helper for `list_providers`), `LLMCredentialMissingError(LookupError)` domain exception, frozen `LLMCredential` dataclass (`provider`/`tenant_id`/`api_key`/`source`/`metadata`/`id`). Resolution chain decrypts `encrypted_value` via `secret_store.decrypt`, decrypt-fail per-row degrades to `None` + log-warn so a single bad row can't take down the resolver, only enabled rows are returned, ordering `is_default DESC, last_used_at DESC NULLS LAST, id` вҖ” first enabled row wins per (tenant, provider). One-shot deprecation warn per worker (module-global `_LEGACY_WARN_EMITTED` bool, SOP rubric #1 вҖ” each worker derives same value from same source). Tenant scope: explicit kwarg вҶ’ `db_context.current_tenant_id()` contextvar вҶ’ `t-default` fallback (matches Phase 5-2 convention). Why sync variant reads Settings only: `get_llm` is synchronous and called from dozens of sync LangChain call sites (agent step fns, LCEL chains, tool wrappers) вҖ” making it async would cascade `await` across the whole agent runtime; row 5b-5's future lifespan auto-migration will mirror DB writes into `settings.{provider}_api_key` (matching `llm_secrets.load_into_settings` pattern) so the sync path stays in lock-step with the canonical table. (2) `backend/agents/llm.py::_create_llm` вҖ” swapped `getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key", None)` for `get_llm_credential_sync(provider)` inside try/except; `LLMCredentialMissingError` translates to `None` so the existing failover cascade in `get_llm()` is untouched (primary init fail вҶ’ chain walk вҶ’ rule-based fallback); keyless providers (Ollama) carry empty `api_key` + `metadata.base_url` from Settings; `_PROVIDER_CREDS` dict renamed to `_PROVIDER_EXTRA_KWARGS` (just the build_chat_model extras вҖ” OpenRouter aggregator headers + Ollama base_url); historical `logger.info("No OMNISIGHT_*_API_KEY set")` log kept so operator grep workflows unchanged. (3) `backend/agents/llm.py::list_providers` вҖ” all 9 `"configured"` fields (8 key-based + ollama keyless) go through `is_provider_configured(provider)` instead of `bool(settings.{provider}_api_key)` / hardcoded `True`; Ollama `configured=True` now derived from resolver (keyless providers always resolve). (4) `backend/tests/test_llm_credential_resolver.py` вҖ” 27 tests across 4 layers: 9 sync unit (missing вҶ’ raises / legacy settings read / whitespace-strip / ollama keyless always resolves / ollama_base_url threads into metadata / explicit tenant_id kwarg overrides contextvar / unknown provider raises / empty provider raises / deprecation-warn emits once per worker), 4 `is_provider_configured` unit (True when key set / False when empty / Ollama True even without base_url / unknown provider False), 3 async-no-pool (falls back to Settings / missing still raises / unknown provider raises), 7 live-PG contract gated on `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL` (DB row wins over Settings / empty table falls back / decrypt failure falls through to Settings / tenant isolation Aвү B / JSONB metadata round-trip / disabled row skipped / is_default beats LRU), 4 integration with `backend.agents.llm` (`list_providers` "configured" flag flows through resolver вҖ” regression guard against re-inlining Settings read / `_create_llm` returns None when missing without reaching adapter / `_create_llm` threads resolved key into build_chat_model + preserves OpenRouter headers / Ollama base_url flows from resolver metadata with api_key=None at adapter boundary). **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@127.0.0.1:5434/omni_test pytest backend/tests/test_llm_credential_resolver.py` вҶ’ **27/27 passed in 0.99s**; neighbour sweep `pytest test_llm_credential_resolver + test_phase2_ollama_model_routing + test_get_cheapest_model + test_token_budget + test_session_title_matrix` вҶ’ **48 passed, 16 PG-live skipped** (zero regressions, `git stash` verified 2 pre-existing `test_llm_credentials_schema::test_migration_0029_revision_chain` + `test_circuit_breaker::test_open_and_close_appear_in_audit` failures predate this row). **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on `backend/llm_credential_resolver.py` + `backend/tests/test_llm_credential_resolver.py` + `backend/agents/llm.py` diff вҶ’ **0 hits** вҖ” FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (resolver uses `async with pool.acquire()` + asyncpg auto-commit + $N placeholders; test file's SQL is PG-only via `$N` too). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**: one new module-global (`_LEGACY_WARN_EMITTED` bool) вҖ” each worker sees identical boolean flag emission pattern from identical deprecation-log source; the async path holds no cache (every call round-trips to PG, table is O(<10 rows/tenant) вҖ” caching not worth staleness risk, matches Phase 5-2 async-no-cache contract); sync path inherits `settings.*` which every worker loads from the same `.env` or (future) from `load_into_settings`. No new shared mutable state needing PG/Redis coordination. **Read-after-write audit**: zero new write paths вҖ” resolver is read-only. Row 5b-3's CRUD will add writes under SP-4.6 `ON CONFLICT ... DO UPDATE` atomic upsert (schema already ready via row 5b-1's partial unique index). No serialisation boundary moved. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5b-2 only вҖ” 0 lines CRUD endpoint (5b-3) / 0 UI rewrite (5b-4) / 0 lifespan auto-migration (5b-5) / 0 deprecation (5b-6). `backend/llm_secrets.py` (bootstrap wizard's separate `.llm_secrets.enc` Fernet file, L3 Step 2) untouched вҖ” it already mirrors its decrypted values into `settings.{provider}_api_key` so the resolver's sync fallback path just works without this row needing to know about it. **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + 27 tests green; resolver reads `llm_credentials` when row exists, otherwise behaves identically to pre-5b-2 (reads `settings.*_api_key`). Deployment needs `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate; zero operator action вҖ” `llm_credentials` table is empty until row 5b-3 CRUD or row 5b-5 auto-migration populates it, so the resolver falls through to legacy Settings on first boot and behaviour is bit-for-bit identical to pre-5b-2 except for one deprecation log line per worker. **Next gate**: dev-only until row 5b-3 (CRUD surface); Phase 5b overall flips to `deployed-active` only once 5b-4 (UI) + 5b-6 (soak) both land + operator observes 24h clean rotation drill. **Rollback**: revert commit вҖ” restores `_create_llm` to `getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key")` + `list_providers` to `bool(settings.*_api_key)`; no schema / no data changes (row 5b-1's table stays, but nothing reads it again). -->

  - [x] **5b-3 CRUD endpoint**пјҡ`GET /api/v1/llm-credentials` (list masked) / `POST` (createпјҢbody йҖІ Fernet еҫҢеҜ« DB) / `PATCH {id}` / `DELETE {id}` / `POST {id}/test` (е‘јеҸ«и©І provider зҡ„ ping API й©— key жңүж•Ҳ)пјӣtenant RLS via `tenant_where_pg`пјӣaudit_log жҜҸеҖӢ mutationпјӣresponse з”Ё fingerprint (`sk-вҖҰabc4`) дёҚеӣһ plain <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-3 shipped: new `backend/llm_credentials.py` service module (~530 LOC) + new `backend/routers/llm_credentials.py` router (~350 LOC) + `backend/main.py` include_router wire-up + new `backend/tests/test_llm_credentials_crud.py` (31 tests). **Service module**: `list_credentials / get_credential / get_plaintext_value (internal) / create_credential / update_credential / delete_credential` + `LLMCredentialConflict` (HTTP 409) + `LLMCredentialNotFound` (HTTP 404) domain exceptions; mirrors Phase-5-4 `git_accounts.py` shape with domain-specific simplifications вҖ” single `encrypted_value` column (one API key, not 3), no `url_patterns` / `ssh_host` / `ssh_port` / `project`, `metadata` JSONB carries `base_url` (ollama) + `org_id` (OpenAI) + `notes`. `_row_to_public_dict` returns `value_fingerprint` only (never plaintext, never ciphertext). ID scheme `lc-{12hex}`. Partial-unique index `uq_llm_credentials_default_per_provider` serialises concurrent `is_default=TRUE` writes at the PG layer (UniqueViolationError вҶ’ 409); `is_default` flip done in transaction (clear-then-set) so index never sees 2 TRUEs; delete-default path offers auto-elect-new-default (LRU-ranked next enabled row) vs refuse-without-replacement via `auto_elect_new_default` kwarg. Every mutator writes `audit_log` row (`llm_credential.create` / `.update` / `.delete`) via `backend.audit.log`; best-effort (audit failure warns but does not abort the mutation). **Router**: 6 endpoints вҖ” `GET /llm-credentials` list + `GET /{id}` detail + `POST` create + `PATCH {id}` partial-update (rotate key via `value` field: empty-str clears, None leaves alone) + `DELETE {id}?auto_elect_new_default=` + `POST {id}/test` live-probe the provider's list-models endpoint. Probe dispatcher `_probe_llm_credential` threads the decrypted plaintext key into provider-specific auth shape: Bearer (openai/xai/groq/deepseek/together/openrouter), `x-api-key` header + `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01` (anthropic), query-param `?key=` (google gemini), keyless + `metadata.base_url` (ollama); uses `asyncio.create_subprocess_exec("curl", ...)` with `-w '\n%{http_code}'` for status capture, 15s timeout. Plaintext never echoes into the response вҖ” only `{status, provider, model_count, http_status?, message?}`. Auth: `Depends(require_admin)` + `set_tenant_id(user.tenant_id)` at every endpoint edge. **Tests (31/31 passed in 2.67s)**: 7 create/list/get (fingerprint never plaintext, filter by provider + enabled_only, ollama keyless path, unknown provider + unknown auth_type raise), 8 partial-update/default-flip/rotate (is_default flip unsets prior default atomically, rotate key changes fingerprint + bumps version, empty-str clears key, metadata replace-not-merge, unknown field raises ValueError, empty updates returns existing, not-found raises), 5 delete semantics (non-default just deletes, default auto-elects next, refuse-without-replacement raises Conflict, sole-default allows defaultless, missing raises NotFound), 1 tenant isolation (A cannot list/get/update/delete B's row вҖ” full RLS round-trip), 2 audit (each mutation writes a row, **plaintext never leaks into before_json/after_json** вҖ” this is the rotation-drill safety gate), 8 probe-dispatcher unit (unknown provider вҶ’ error, keyed providers require value вҶ’ error, ollama requires base_url вҶ’ error, drift guard that `_VALID_PROVIDERS - {ollama} == _PROBE_SPECS.keys()` to prevent silent probe gaps when adding a new provider, bearer header wiring for openai, x-api-key + anthropic-version wiring for anthropic, query-param wiring for google, non-2xx surfaces upstream error message). **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... pytest backend/tests/test_llm_credentials_crud.py --no-cov` вҶ’ 31/31 passed; neighbour regression `pytest test_llm_credentials_schema + test_llm_credential_resolver + test_git_accounts_crud + test_git_accounts_schema` вҶ’ 82/82 passed 0 regression. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on 3 touched files (service + router + test) **0 hits** вҖ” FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (asyncpg pool path + $N placeholders throughout). Runtime smoke: module imports + router wired at `/api/v1/llm-credentials` (TestClient confirms 503 bootstrap-gate behind unauthenticated request вҖ” same gating as `/git-accounts`). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #2 вҖ” PG coordination)**: zero new module-globals; `secret_store._fernet` stays per-worker (flock-serialised first-boot from SP-B.3); races on `is_default` / version serialised by PG partial-unique index + row-level UPDATE/DELETE locking вҖ” identical pattern to Phase-5-4 `git_accounts`. **Read-after-write audit**: all 3 parallel-handler hazard points (concurrent POST with is_default, concurrent PATCH flipping is_default, DELETE of default) handled inside `conn.transaction()` on the same pool conn the caller owns вҖ” UniqueViolationError вҶ’ 409 on the loser, never an observer state with 2 defaults. **Scope зҙҖеҫӢ**: strictly row 5b-3 only вҖ” 0 UI rewrite (5b-4) / 0 auto-migration (5b-5) / 0 deprecation (5b-6); `PUT /runtime/settings` legacy path still accepts `{provider}_api_key` field writes (to be removed in 5b-6), `backend.agents.llm` still reads through `get_llm_credential_sync` вҶ’ Settings fallback (to be replaced once 5b-5 lifespan auto-migration pre-populates `llm_credentials` so the resolver's DB-first chain surfaces stored values). **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + tests green; router live at `/api/v1/llm-credentials`; operator needs `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate + to create the first row via `POST` (UI for this lands in 5b-4). **Next gate**: dev-only until 5b-4 (UI) or 5b-6 (soak + rotation drill); Phase 5b overall flips to `deployed-active` only after 5b-4 + 5b-6 both land + operator observes 24h clean rotation drill. **Rollback**: `git revert` вҖ” restores pre-5b-3 state (no `backend/llm_credentials.py`, no `backend/routers/llm_credentials.py`, no include_router); schema stays (row 5b-1), no data loss because row 5b-5 auto-migration has not run. -->

Ollama gets Label + Base URL text input), `is_default` toggle, per-row TEST calling `testLlmCredentialById` which decrypts the stored key server-side and probes the provider's list-models endpoint (plaintext never crosses the wire in either direction), per-row вҳ… SET calling `updateLlmCredential({is_default: true})` вҖ” backend's partial-unique index `uq_llm_credentials_default_per_provider` serialises the cross-credential demotion atomically (Phase-5b-1 guarantee), per-row ROTATE opens an orange dialog calling `updateLlmCredential({value: newKey})` (old ciphertext replaced, version bumped; dialog NOT rendered for keyless Ollama rows since there's no key to rotate), per-row DELETE opens a confirm dialog with a "default вҖ” backend will auto-elect next" warning if `is_default`, confirm calls `deleteLlmCredential(id, {auto_elect_new_default: true})`. No `LLMCredentialResolveResponse` / no `resolveLlmCredentialForUrl` sibling (unlike git-accounts: LLM resolution is provider-based, not URL-based). **Save-feedback banner**: removed the 2-line "note: changes are runtime-only and will reset on backend restart" footer from the SaveFeedback ok-state block; LLM keys are now persistent per Phase 5b-1/5b-3 so the caveat is misleading even for the residual runtime-only fields (provider/model/fallback_chain dropdowns вҖ” user-visible consequence is that those three still reset on restart, but that's the minority case and fixing them would be Phase 5b scope creep; a narrower "note: provider/model selection is runtime-only" caveat can be added later if operators hit it). **Tests**: `test/components/llm-credential-manager-section.test.tsx` 13 tests вҖ” 3 list+filter (tab filtering with masked fingerprints + вҳ… DEFAULT badge + empty-state hint) / 2 add form (anthropic shape + ollama metadata.base_url shape) / 6 per-row actions (TEST + вҳ… SET + ROTATE with PATCH value + ROTATE NOT rendered for keyless Ollama + DELETE confirm with is_default warning + DELETE cancel). **й©—иӯү**: `pnpm vitest run test/components/llm-credential-manager-section.test.tsx test/components/account-manager-section.test.tsx test/components/integration-settings.test.tsx` вҶ’ **75/75 passed in 4.92s** (13 new + 43 existing account-manager + 19 existing gerrit-wizard). `pnpm tsc --noEmit` shows the 3 pre-existing TS2322 errors at GitHub/GitLab/Gerrit `onTest` overrides (offset 3665/3712/3786 вҶ’ 4101/4148/4222 matches +~480 line delta from component addition; `git stash` confirmed identical errors without my changes). `pnpm eslint` shows the 1 pre-existing `set-state-in-effect` error at JiraRotateDialog (offset 2939 вҶ’ 3413 same +~480 delta; `git stash` confirmed pre-existing). Zero new typecheck / lint errors. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on 3 touched files (`integration-settings.tsx` + `lib/api.ts` + new test file) **0 hits** вҖ” FINGERPRINT-CLEAN. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer N/A вҖ” frontend only, no Python workers)**: pure React component state via `useState`/`useEffect` вҖ” per-component-instance, not module-global. Re-fetch after every mutation (`refresh()`) gives canonical PG state вҖ” no read-after-write timing concerns. **Read-after-write audit**: `handleSubmitNew` / `handleSetDefault` / `handleConfirmRotate` / `handleConfirmDelete` all `await refresh()` after the mutating call returns 2xx вҖ” `refresh` re-issues `GET /llm-credentials` which the Phase-5b-3 backend confirms commits-before-return. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5b-4 only вҖ” 0 lines of Phase-5b-5 auto-migration / 0 of Phase-5b-6 deprecation / 0 of Phase-5b-6 docs. Ollama keyless branch emits a row only when `settings.ollama_base_url` is non-empty AND differs from module default `http://localhost:11434` (otherwise resolver's fallback already synthesises the same value, row carries no signal); that row has `value=""`, `metadata={"base_url": <custom>}`. `_table_has_any_row` idempotency guard (LIMIT 1 вҖ” cheaper than COUNT); `_insert_one` uses `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id` + Fernet-encrypt via `backend.secret_store.encrypt` (same key as row 5b-3 CRUD вҖ” byte-compatible so ciphertext produced here decrypts cleanly from the UI). `migrate_legacy_llm_credentials_once()` returns `{migrated, candidates, skipped_reason, sources}` summary; kill-switch (`OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip`) / no-pool (SQLite dev) / no-legacy-creds / non-empty-table / per-insert-exception all log + return structured skip reason; audit row emitted per successful insert with `actor=system/migration`, `action=llm_credential_auto_migrate`, `entity_kind=llm_credential`, `after={provider, label, is_default, has_key, metadata_keys, source}` вҖ” **plaintext key never in audit payload** (only `has_key` boolean + `metadata_keys` list so a leaked audit snapshot cannot be replayed). Three log paths: migrated>0 вҶ’ WARNING with sources list / skipped_reason set вҶ’ INFO with reason + candidate count / raised вҶ’ WARNING with exception type. **Tests 17 йЎҶ three-layer**: Layer 1 (8 sync `_plan_rows`) вҖ” empty settings no-op / anthropic key вҶ’ default row / whitespace-only stripped / all 8 keyed providers at once deterministic ids lock / ollama default base_url no row / ollama custom base_url keyless metadata row / ollama empty base_url no row / mixed keyed + custom ollama. Layer 2 (3 async kill-switch + stub pool) вҖ” `OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip` short-circuits even with creds present / no-pool (RuntimeError on `get_pool`) вҶ’ `skipped_reason=no_pool` / empty Settings вҶ’ `skipped_reason=no_legacy_credentials` + asserts pool.acquire is NOT called in this branch via `_StubPool` that raises on acquire. Layer 3 (6 PG-live via `pg_test_pool` fixture + `_live_db` slate) вҖ” end-to-end 2 keyed + custom ollama вҶ’ 3 rows with ciphertext / `secret_store.decrypt` round-trips to plaintext / metadata JSONB parses to `{"base_url": ...}` / per-row audit with `actor=system/migration` + **plaintext-never-in-audit-payload grep guard** / second run is no-op with `skipped_reason=llm_credentials_non_empty` / `asyncio.gather` two concurrent calls collapse to exactly 1 row (first-line: table-non-empty guard) / `_table_has_any_row` monkeypatched false вҶ’ ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING still blocks duplicate (second-line) / resolver integration: after migration, blank `settings.anthropic_api_key` and `get_llm_credential('anthropic')` still returns `source="db"` + decrypted plaintext + `id="lc-legacy-anthropic"` (proves DB-first chain wired correctly). **й©—иӯү**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@127.0.0.1:5434/omni_test pytest backend/tests/test_legacy_llm_credential_migration.py --no-cov` вҶ’ **17/17 passed in 1.32s**; local-no-PG вҶ’ 11 passed + 6 PG-live skipped. Lifespan-adjacent `pytest test_db_pool_lifespan + test_api_keys_legacy_migration --no-cov` вҶ’ 7 passed + 2 skipped zero regression. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on new module + test жӘ” **0 е‘Ҫдёӯ** вҖ” FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (е…Ёиө° `async with pool.acquire() as conn` + asyncpg auto-commit + $N placeholders throughout). **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #2 вҖ” PG coordination)**: zero new module-globals; deterministic primary keys (`lc-legacy-{provider}`) + `ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING` make multi-worker lifespan fire race-safe вҖ” winner emits audit+log, loser silently skips (mirror answer #2 pattern from `backend.api_keys.migrate_legacy_bearer` + `backend.legacy_credential_migration`); `_PROVIDER_LEGACY_FIELDS` + `_OLLAMA_DEFAULT_BASE_URL` are frozen module constants (cross-worker identical by construction, qualified answer #1). **Read-after-write audit (SOP Step 1, 2026-04-21 rule)**: hook executes inside lifespan `startup` before uvicorn opens the listening socket вҖ” no handler observes partial-write state. Phase-5-5 `backend/legacy_credential_migration.py` completely untouched. **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + 17 tests green; operator `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate еҫҢз”ҹж•Ҳпјӣз¬¬дёҖж¬Ў PG-backed boot иҮӘеӢ•и·‘гҖҒlog еҮә `[LLM-CRED-MIGRATE] migrated N legacy LLM credential(s) ...` жҲ– `nothing to migrate` жҲ– `llm_credentials already has rows; skipping`пјӣ`.env` keys intentionally left in place for operator review (resolver still falls back to them if `llm_credentials` is cleared, which is a safety net not a design goal). **Next gate**: dev-only until row 5b-6 (deprecation + docs + soak); Phase 5b overall flips to deployed-active only after 5b-6 lands + operator observes 24h clean rotation drill. **Rollback**: `git revert` removes module + lifespan hook + Settings declaration + test file; migrated rows NOT auto-deleted (operator-managed); soft rollback is `OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip` in `.env` which preserves existing rows but bypasses future hook runs. -->
  - [x] **5b-6 Deprecation + docs**пјҡ`config.py` жЁҷ 8 еҖӢ `{provider}_api_key` зӮә `deprecated=True`пјӣ`PUT /runtime/settings` зҡ„ `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` жҠҠе®ғеҖ‘з§»йҷӨпјҲйҖј UI ж”№иө°ж–° endpointпјүпјӣ`docs/ops/llm_credentials.md` runbookпјҡж–°еўһ key / rotate / disable / жҹҘе“ӘеҖӢ tenant з”Ёе“ӘеҖӢ key / fallback chain и·ҹ per-tenant дә’еӢ•пјӣsoak testпјҲrotate anthropic key й©—д»ҚйҒӢдҪң + audit жңү traceгҖҒbackend restart еҫҢ key йӮ„еңЁпјү <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5b-6 shipped: (1) `backend/config.py` adds `LEGACY_LLM_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS: dict[str, str]` registry (9 entries: 8 `{provider}_api_key` + `ollama_base_url` вҶ’ `llm_credentials(...)` replacement hints) + `is_legacy_llm_credential_field(name)` helper вҖ” kept SEPARATE from Phase-5-10's `LEGACY_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS` so the `test_phase5_10::test_registry_excludes_non_credential_fields` invariant (which asserts LLM keys are NOT in the forge registry) stays intact. Rationale: mixing the two would either break that test or force an "LLM vs forge" discriminator on every `is_legacy_credential_field` caller. Deliberate per-field rationale in config.py header comment вҖ” routing knobs (`llm_provider`/`llm_model`/`llm_temperature`/`llm_fallback_chain`) + token budget knobs NOT listed (not credentials). Did NOT use Pydantic `Field(deprecated=True)` because it fires `DeprecationWarning` on every Settings attribute read and would violate the "read still OK" contract that the resolver's legacy-fallback path depends on. (2) `backend/routers/integration.py::_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` removed the 9 LLM fields (whitelist pattern mirrors Phase-5-10 WRITE-WARN but with stronger semantics: REJECT instead of warn-and-write, because the whole point of 5b-1..5b-5 was to get keys out of process memory; keeping them writable would silently undo Phase 5b). `update_settings` handler enhanced: when a rejected key is a deprecated LLM field, rejection reason rewrites from generic "not updatable" вҶ’ `"deprecated: use POST /api/v1/llm-credentials (вҶ’ <hint>)"`; batch-collect rejects into `deprecated_llm_rejects` dict; post-loop emit one `logger.warning("Phase-5b-6 deprecated-write rejected: settings.%s ...")` per field + one `audit.log(action="settings.legacy_llm_credential_write", entity_kind="settings_legacy_llm_field", entity_id=field, after={field, replacement, note})` row per field (plaintext NEVER in `after` вҖ” only field metadata); response carries a separate `llm_deprecations` block (distinct key from Phase-5-10's `deprecations` block) with `{fields, migrate_to: "llm_credentials", endpoint: "/api/v1/llm-credentials", doc: "/docs/ops/llm_credentials.md"}` so the UI can render a dedicated "migrated to llm_credentials" banner independent of any forge-credential banner that may also fire in a mixed-write. setattr NEVER runs for rejected LLM fields вҖ” the rejection short-circuits at the `if key not in _UPDATABLE_FIELDS:` branch, so the Settings attribute is not mutated (read-OK contract still preserved via the resolver's legacy-fallback path). (3) `docs/ops/llm_credentials.md` NEW ~480-line operator runbook вҖ” 11 sections: TL;DR table / conceptual model (schema + resolver 3-step DBвҶ’SettingsвҶ’raise chain) / Add new API key (UI + REST) / Rotate a key (with post-rotation test checklist + soak test pointer) / Disable without deleting / Delete (auto-elect-new-default semantics) / Find which credential resolves for a (tenant, provider) / **Fallback chain + per-tenant interaction** (covers the per-provider resolve in chain, missing-skips-not-aborts semantics, legacy Settings fallback per-provider, Ollama as last-chance keyless) / 5 troubleshooting symptoms / Audit trail with 5 action types (`llm_credential.create`/`update`/`delete`/`llm_credential_auto_migrate`/`settings.legacy_llm_credential_write`) / Legacy `.env` deprecation with the rejection response shape / See-also cross-links. (4) `backend/tests/test_phase5b_6_deprecation.py` NEW 24 tests four layers: **Registry invariants** (7) вҖ” dict-of-hints shape, all 9 TODO-row-enumerated fields present, no unexpected entries, DISJOINT from Phase-5-10 registry (explicit guard via `set & set` overlap check), fields exist on Settings, helper contract, `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` no longer lists LLM keys, routing knobs stayed. **Write-reject contract** (9) вҖ” rejection reason carries `/api/v1/llm-credentials` pointer + "deprecated" token, audit row has correct action/entity_kind/entity_id/after.field/after.replacement + plaintext grep guard, response has `llm_deprecations` block with migrate_to/endpoint/doc, **setattr did NOT mutate** (read sentinel preserved вҖ” the key load-bearing contract that separates 5b-6 from Phase-5-10), ollama_base_url rejected same as api_keys, multiple fields one audit row each, warn log fires with plaintext grep guard, non-LLM writes don't fabricate the block, mixed Phase-5-10 + Phase-5b-6 write surfaces BOTH blocks under DIFFERENT dict keys (critical for dual-banner UI). **Rotation soak drill** (4, PG-live) вҖ” create anthropic вҶ’ resolve returns old key вҶ’ PATCH rotates вҶ’ resolve returns NEW key + version bumped + fingerprint changed; `audit_log` has `llm_credential.create/.update` rows and **NEITHER before_json NOR after_json contains original OR rotated plaintext** (acceptance-critical regression guard); simulated-restart via monkeypatching resolver module-globals then verifying Fernet round-trip from a fresh pool conn + post-restart `get_llm_credential` still returns rotated key; `audit.verify_chain()` green across rotation (hash-chain integrity). **Doc drift guards** (4) вҖ” runbook exists + references `LEGACY_LLM_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS` symbol + `/api/v1/llm-credentials`, covers 5 operator flow headings (Add/Rotate/Disable/Delete/Fallback chain), mentions every registry field (so adding a new provider to registry without runbook update = CI red), mentions `settings.legacy_llm_credential_write` grep-key. **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=... pytest test_phase5b_6_deprecation.py` вҶ’ **24/24 passed in 5.08s**; broader neighbour sweep `test_phase5b_6_deprecation + test_phase5_10_deprecation + test_llm_credentials_crud + test_llm_credentials_schema + test_llm_credential_resolver + test_legacy_llm_credential_migration + test_integration_settings + test_llm_adapter + test_get_cheapest_model` вҶ’ **295/295 passed in 35.83s zero regression**. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on 4 touched files (config.py + routers/integration.py + test file + runbook) вҶ’ **0 hits** FINGERPRINT-CLEAN. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**: `LEGACY_LLM_CREDENTIAL_FIELDS` is a module-level frozen `dict` constant; every worker derives identical value from the same source code вҖ” cross-worker coherence by construction. No new shared mutable state. **Read-after-write audit**: the rejection path short-circuits BEFORE `setattr`, so there is zero write-path serialisation change for deprecated LLM fields; audit emission runs on its own pool conn via `audit.log`; a failed audit cannot leave Settings half-applied because Settings weren't mutated at all. Phase-5-10's existing warn-and-write path (still for forge fields) is untouched. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5b-6 вҖ” 0 lines touched outside `config.py`/`routers/integration.py`/new docs/new tests; did NOT add scalar-write path back in / did NOT touch resolver / did NOT touch CRUD / did NOT touch lifespan auto-migration / did NOT touch UI (already migrated in 5b-4). **Production status: dev-only** вҖ” code merged + 24 tests green; operator needs `docker compose build backend-a backend-b` + rolling recreate for the rejection path to surface on the deployed backend; the UI (Phase 5b-4) already POSTs to the new endpoint, so legitimate operator flows see zero change. Scripts / third-party callers still PUT-ing the legacy fields will start receiving the rejection + audit row вҖ” which is the intended migration-signal. **Next gate**: dev-only вҶ’ `[D]` once operator rolls the backend image and verifies the rejection response surface via a curl test against prod + the runbook is linked from the UI's `llm_deprecations` banner; Phase 5b overall flips to `deployed-observed` after 24h of zero regression metric post-deploy. **Rollback**: revert this commit вҖ” restores the 9 LLM fields to `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` + removes registry + helper + runbook + tests; no schema/data changes (row 5b-1's table + row 5b-3's CRUD + row 5b-5's auto-migration all stay вҖ” rolling back 5b-6 just re-opens the legacy scalar write path without touching the new primary path). -->

- [ ] **R27** Install job idempotency вҖ” sidecar и·‘еҲ° 90% жҷӮ docker container иў« SIGKILLпјҲOOM / `docker restart`пјү/ frontend йӣҷж“Ҡ install button е»әе…©еҖӢ job / еӨҡеҖӢ sidecar еҗҢжҷӮ long-poll еҗҢ job дёүеҖӢе ҙжҷҜйғҪжңғйҖ жҲҗ install зөҗжһңдёҚеҸҜйҮҚзҸҫжҲ–йҮҚиӨҮжүЈиіҮжәҗгҖӮMitigation з”ұ BS.0.1 ADR В§4.4 еҮҚзөҗпјҡ(a) Job claim дёҖж¬ЎеҜ«жӯ»гҖҒbackend `POST /installer/jobs/poll` иө° `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1` + `UPDATE ... SET state='running', sidecar_id=$1, claimed_at=now()` еҗҢ transactionгҖҒдёҖеҖӢ job еҸӘеҸҜиғҪиў«дёҖеҖӢ sidecar жӢҝеҲ°пјӣ(b) sidecar жҜҸж¬Ў startup з¬¬дёҖд»¶дәӢ query `GET /installer/jobs?sidecar_id=self&state=running`гҖҒзңӢеҲ°гҖҢжҲ‘иӘҚй ҳдҪҶжІ’еӣһе ұзөҗжһңгҖҚзҡ„ job вҶ’ иҮӘеӢ•еӣһе ұ `failed` + reason `sidecar_restart_recovered`пјҢretry жұәе®ҡж¬Ҡз•ҷзөҰ operatorпјҲдёҚиҮӘеӢ• retry еӣ зӮә vendor `shell_script` дёҚдҝқиӯүеҶӘзӯүпјүпјӣ(c) Install method иҮӘиә«зҡ„еҶӘзӯүжҖ§еҲҶжөҒпјҡ`docker_pull` йҮҚи·‘з„Ўе®іпјҲimage е·ІеӯҳеңЁ вҶ’ noopпјүгҖҒ`shell_script` / `vendor_installer` з”ұ vendor еҜ«дёҚдҝқиӯүеҶӘзӯүвҶ’ sidecar **дёҚ**иҮӘеӢ• retry йҖҷе…©йЎһзҡ„ `failed` jobпјӣ(d) `install_jobs.idempotency_key UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL` з”ұ frontend еңЁ `POST /installer/jobs` жҷӮеё¶дёҠгҖҒbackend иө° `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING RETURNING id`гҖҒеҗҢ key йҮҚзҷјеӣһдёҠж¬Ў IDгҖҒйҒҝе…Қйӣҷж“Ҡе»әе…©еҖӢ jobпјӣе°ҚжҮү threat model T12пјҲsidecar OOM mid-install dirty stateпјүгҖӮе»¶дјё mitigationпјҡsidecar и·‘ install жҷӮз”Ё scratch dir + atomic rename зўәдҝқеҚҠе®ҢжҲҗзҡ„ tarball дёҚжұЎжҹ“жңҖзөӮи·Ҝеҫ‘пјҲBS.4.3 install methods е…ұз”Ё patternпјүпјҲimplements: BS.1.1 `install_jobs.idempotency_key UUID UNIQUE` ж¬„дҪҚ + `state` enum еҗ« `cancelled` + `error_reason` ж¬„дҪҚ + BS.2.2 `POST /installer/jobs` иө° `ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING` + `/poll` иө° `SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` + BS.4.2 sidecar startup з¬¬дёҖд»¶дәӢиӘҚй ҳ running job + BS.4.3 install methods иө° scratch dir + atomic rename + BS.7.6 retry button е»әж–° job дҝқз•ҷжӯ·еҸІ row + BS.7.7 cancel еҜ« PG / sidecar дёӢијӘ poll зңӢ cancel flag дёӯжӯўпјү

**й җдј°**пјҡ~6 dayпјҲBE 2 + FE 1.5 + systemd ж©ӢжҺҘ 1 + audit/rollback/test/docs 1.5пјү

### B13. FUI Error Pages + Bootstrap UX е„ӘеҢ–пјҲ#339пјүвҖ” рҹ”ҙ е„Әе…Ҳ

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡзӣ®еүҚ 400/500 зі»еҲ—йҢҜиӘӨй ҒйқўдҪҝз”Ё Next.js й җиЁӯзҷҪеә•й»‘еӯ—пјҢиҲҮ FUI жҡ—иүІжҺғжҸҸз·ҡйўЁж је®Ңе…ЁдёҚжҗӯгҖӮBootstrap жңӘе®ҢжҲҗжҷӮ API еӣһ 503 JSONпјҢе·ҘзЁӢеё«иғҪзңӢжҮӮпјҢдҪҶдёҖиҲ¬дҪҝз”ЁиҖ…зңӢеҲ°гҖҢ503 Service UnavailableгҖҚжңғд»ҘзӮәзі»зөұеЈһдәҶгҖӮйңҖиҰҒ**йӣҷеұӨ UX**пјҡеҸӢе–„зҡ„дәәйЎһиЁҠжҒҜ + еҸҜеұ•й–Ӣзҡ„жҠҖиЎ“и©іжғ…гҖӮ

**Part A вҖ” Bootstrap Required е°Ҳз”Ёй Ғйқў**
- [x] `app/setup-required/page.tsx`пјҡе…ЁеұҸ FUI йўЁж јгҖҢзі»зөұйңҖиҰҒе®ҢжҲҗеҲқе§ӢиЁӯе®ҡгҖҚй Ғйқў
  - [x] еҸӢе–„иЁҠжҒҜпјҡгҖҢжӯЎиҝҺпјҒйҖҷжҳҜжӮЁз¬¬дёҖж¬ЎдҪҝз”Ё OmniSightпјҢеҸӘйңҖе№ҫеҲҶйҗҳеҚіеҸҜе®ҢжҲҗеҹәзӨҺй…ҚзҪ®гҖӮгҖҚ
  - [x] CTA жҢүйҲ•пјҡгҖҢв–¶ й–Ӣе§ӢиЁӯе®ҡгҖҚвҶ’ е°Һеҗ‘ `/bootstrap`
  - [x] еҸҜеұ•й–ӢгҖҢжҠҖиЎ“и©іжғ…гҖҚеҚҖеЎҠпјҡйЎҜзӨә 503 JSON е…§е®№ + backend зүҲжң¬ + еҗ„ gate зӢҖж…ӢпјҲadmin_password / llm_provider / cf_tunnel / smokeпјү
  - [x] FUI йўЁж јпјҡжҡ—иүІиғҢжҷҜ + жҺғжҸҸз·ҡеӢ•з•« + neural-grid е…ғзҙ  + Orbitron жЁҷйЎҢеӯ—еһӢ
- [x] `lib/api.ts` ж””жҲӘеҷЁпјҡAPI response `error === "bootstrap_required"` вҶ’ дёҚиө° error toast вҶ’ `window.location = "/setup-required"`
- [x] `middleware.ts`пјҲжҲ– `proxy.ts`пјүпјҡжңӘзҷ»е…Ҙ + 503 bootstrap_required вҶ’ redirect еҲ° `/setup-required`пјҲдёҚжҳҜ `/login`пјү

**Part B вҖ” FUI йҢҜиӘӨй ҒйқўпјҲ400/500 зі»еҲ—пјү**
- [x] `app/not-found.tsx`пјҲ404пјүпјҡгҖҢжүҫдёҚеҲ°жӯӨй ҒйқўгҖҚ+ еӣһйҰ–й ҒжҢүйҲ• + еұ•й–ӢеҚҖпјҡrequested URL
- [x] `app/error.tsx`пјҲClient error boundaryпјүпјҡгҖҢзҷјз”ҹйҢҜиӘӨгҖҚ+ йҮҚи©ҰжҢүйҲ• + еұ•й–ӢеҚҖпјҡerror.message + stackпјҲprod йҡұи—Ҹ stackпјү
- [x] `app/global-error.tsx`пјҲRoot layout crashпјүпјҡжңҖеӨ–еұӨ fallbackпјҢminimal FUI йўЁж ј
- [x] `components/omnisight/error-page.tsx`пјҡе…ұз”Ё FUI error й Ғйқўе…ғд»¶пјҢж”ҜжҸҙпјҡ
  - [x] `code`пјҲ400/401/403/404/500/502/503пјү
  - [x] `friendlyMessage`пјҲдәәйЎһеҸҜи®Җзҡ„еҸӢе–„иЁҠжҒҜпјү
  - [x] `technicalDetail`пјҲе·ҘзЁӢеё«зҙ°зҜҖпјҢй җиЁӯжҠҳз–Ҡпјү
  - [x] `actions`пјҲжҢүйҲ•еҲ—иЎЁпјҡеӣһйҰ–й Ғ / зҷ»е…Ҙ / йҮҚи©Ұ / еӣһе ұе•ҸйЎҢпјү
  - [x] FUI йўЁж јпјҡжҡ—иүІ + еӨ§иҷҹ error code + жҺғжҸҸз·ҡ + еҫ®ејұи„ҲиЎқеӢ•з•«
- [x] еҗ„ HTTP code зҡ„еҸӢе–„иЁҠжҒҜе°Қз…§пјҡ
  - [x] 400пјҡгҖҢи«ӢжұӮж јејҸжңүиӘӨпјҢи«ӢжӘўжҹҘијёе…ҘеҫҢйҮҚи©ҰгҖҚ
  - [x] 401пјҡгҖҢзҷ»е…Ҙе·ІйҒҺжңҹпјҢи«ӢйҮҚж–°зҷ»е…ҘгҖҚ+ зҷ»е…ҘжҢүйҲ•
  - [x] 403пјҡгҖҢжӮЁжІ’жңүжӯӨй Ғйқўзҡ„еӯҳеҸ–ж¬ҠйҷҗгҖҚ+ иҒҜз№«з®ЎзҗҶе“ЎжҸҗзӨә
  - [x] 404пјҡгҖҢжӯӨй ҒйқўдёҚеӯҳеңЁжҲ–е·Із§»йҷӨгҖҚ+ еӣһйҰ–й ҒжҢүйҲ•
  - [x] 500пјҡгҖҢзі»зөұзҷјз”ҹе…§йғЁйҢҜиӘӨпјҢжҲ‘еҖ‘е·Іж”¶еҲ°йҖҡзҹҘгҖҚ+ error trace ID
  - [x] 502пјҡгҖҢеҫҢз«ҜжңҚеӢҷжҡ«жҷӮдёҚеҸҜз”ЁпјҢи«ӢзЁҚеҫҢйҮҚи©ҰгҖҚ+ иҮӘеӢ•йҮҚи©Ұ countdown
  - [x] 503пјҡгҖҢзі»зөұз¶ӯиӯ·дёӯгҖҚжҲ–гҖҢиЁӯе®ҡжңӘе®ҢжҲҗгҖҚпјҲдҫқ error.error ж¬„дҪҚеҚҖеҲҶпјү

**Part C вҖ” API Error зөұдёҖж””жҲӘ**
- [x] `lib/api.ts` е…Ёеҹҹ error handlerпјҡ
  - [x] 503 `bootstrap_required` вҶ’ redirect `/setup-required`пјҲдёҚ toastпјү
  - [x] 401 вҶ’ redirect `/login?next=<current_path>`пјҲдёҚ toastпјү
  - [x] 403 вҶ’ toast warningгҖҢж¬ҠйҷҗдёҚи¶ігҖҚ
  - [x] 500 вҶ’ toast errorгҖҢзі»зөұйҢҜиӘӨгҖҚ+ еұ•й–ӢеҚҖйЎҜзӨә trace ID
  - [x] 502/503 е…¶д»– вҶ’ toast warningгҖҢжңҚеӢҷжҡ«жҷӮдёҚеҸҜз”ЁгҖҚ+ иҮӘеӢ•йҮҚи©Ұ
  - [x] з¶Іи·Ҝж–·з·ҡ вҶ’ toast infoгҖҢз¶Іи·ҜйҖЈз·ҡдёӯж–·пјҢеҳ—и©ҰйҮҚж–°йҖЈз·ҡ...гҖҚ+ retry indicator

- й җдј°пјҡ**2 day**пјҲError page е…ғд»¶ 0.5d + 7 еҖӢ code й Ғйқў 0.5d + API ж””жҲӘеҷЁ 0.5d + Bootstrap UX 0.5dпјү

### B14. UX ж”№е–„ вҖ” Bootstrap Wizard + Git Forge иЁӯе®ҡ + Integration й Ғйқўе„ӘеҢ–пјҲ#340пјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡdeep audit зҷјзҸҫ 6 еҖӢ UX е•ҸйЎҢеҪұйҹҝйҰ–ж¬ЎдҪҝз”ЁиҖ…е’Ң Git forge ж•ҙеҗҲдҪҝз”ЁиҖ…гҖӮBootstrap wizard дёҚеҢ…еҗ« Git forge иЁӯе®ҡгҖҒеӨҡ repo token map з„Ў UIгҖҒGerrit иЁӯе®ҡз„Ўеј•е°ҺгҖҒIntegration й Ғйқўж¬„дҪҚйҒҺеӨҡгҖҒSettings зјә connection testгҖӮйҖҷдәӣе•ҸйЎҢдёҚж“ӢдёҠз·ҡдҪҶжңғеҪұйҹҝдҪҝз”Ёй«”й©—гҖӮ

**Part A вҖ” Bootstrap Wizard еҠ е…Ҙ Git Forge иЁӯе®ҡжӯҘй©ҹпјҲйҒёеЎ«пјү**
- [x] Bootstrap wizard еңЁ Step 3пјҲCF TunnelпјүеҫҢеҠ  Step 3.5гҖҢGit Forge иЁӯе®ҡпјҲйҒёеЎ«пјүгҖҚ
- [x] Step 3.5 UIпјҡдёүйҒёдёҖ tabпјҲGitHub / GitLab / Gerritпјү+ гҖҢи·ійҒҺпјҢзЁҚеҫҢиЁӯе®ҡгҖҚжҢүйҲ•
- [x] GitHub tabпјҡtoken ијёе…Ҙ + гҖҢTest ConnectionгҖҚжҢүйҲ• вҶ’ е‘јеҸ« GitHub API й©—иӯү вҶ’ жҲҗеҠҹйЎҜзӨә user/org name
- [x] GitLab tabпјҡURL + token ијёе…Ҙ + гҖҢTest ConnectionгҖҚвҶ’ йЎҜзӨә GitLab instance version
- [x] Gerrit tabпјҡURL + SSH host/port ијёе…Ҙ + гҖҢTest SSHгҖҚвҶ’ й©—иӯү SSH йҖЈз·ҡ + Gerrit version
- [x] гҖҢи·ійҒҺгҖҚдёҚеҪұйҹҝ bootstrap finalizationпјҲGit forge йқһеҝ…иҰҒ gateпјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**1 day**пјҲStep 3.5 slot 0.2d + дёү-tab UI 0.2d + GitHub test 0.2d + GitLab test 0.1d + Gerrit SSH test 0.2d + skip-non-blocking 0.1d = 1d closed-loopпјү

**Part B вҖ” Multi-repo Token Map UI**
- [x] Settings вҶ’ Integration вҶ’ Git еҚҖеЎҠж–°еўһгҖҢMultiple InstancesгҖҚеұ•й–ӢеҚҖ
- [x] гҖҢAdd GitHub InstanceгҖҚжҢүйҲ• вҶ’ иЎЁе–®пјҡhostnameпјҲеҰӮ `github.enterprise.com`пјү+ token
- [x] гҖҢAdd GitLab InstanceгҖҚжҢүйҲ• вҶ’ иЎЁе–®пјҡURL + token
- [x] еҲ—иЎЁйЎҜзӨәжүҖжңүе·ІиЁӯе®ҡзҡ„ instance + жҜҸеҖӢжңүгҖҢTestгҖҚ/гҖҢRemoveгҖҚжҢүйҲ•
- [x] е„ІеӯҳжҷӮеҜ«е…Ҙ `OMNISIGHT_GITHUB_TOKEN_MAP` / `OMNISIGHT_GITLAB_TOKEN_MAP`пјҲJSON ж јејҸпјү
- [x] еҫҢз«Ҝ APIпјҡ`GET/PUT /api/v1/settings/git/token-map` вҶ’ и®ҖеҜ« token mapпјҲtoken йҒ®зҪ©йЎҜзӨәпјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**1 day**

**Part C вҖ” Gerrit Setup WizardпјҲзҚЁз«Ӣеј•е°Һпјү**
- [x] Settings вҶ’ Integration вҶ’ Gerrit еҚҖеЎҠеҠ гҖҢSetup WizardгҖҚжҢүйҲ• вҶ’ й–Ӣе•ҹ modal еј•е°Һ
- [x] Step 1пјҡијёе…Ҙ Gerrit URL + SSH host/port вҶ’ гҖҢTest ConnectionгҖҚй©—иӯү
- [x] Step 2пјҡSSH key иЁӯе®ҡеј•е°ҺпјҲйЎҜзӨәе…¬й‘° вҶ’ жҸҗзӨәиІјеҲ° Gerrit Settings вҶ’ SSH Keysпјү
- [x] Step 3пјҡ`merger-agent-bot` еёіиҷҹиЁӯе®ҡеј•е°ҺпјҲиӘӘжҳҺеҰӮдҪ•е»ә bot еёіиҷҹ + иЁӯе®ҡ groupпјү
- [x] Step 4пјҡsubmit-rule й©—иӯүпјҲе‘јеҸ« Gerrit API жӘўжҹҘ project.config жҳҜеҗҰеҗ«йӣҷз°Ҫ +2 ruleпјү
- [x] Step 5пјҡwebhook иЁӯе®ҡеј•е°ҺпјҲйЎҜзӨә webhook URL + secret вҶ’ жҸҗзӨәиІјеҲ° Gerritпјү
- [x] е®ҢжҲҗеҫҢеҜ«е…Ҙ config + йЎҜзӨәгҖҢGerrit ж•ҙеҗҲе·Іе•ҹз”ЁгҖҚ
- й җдј°пјҡ**1.5 day**

**Part D вҖ” Integration Settings й ҒйқўеҲҶ tab**
- [x] зҸҫиЎҢ Settings вҶ’ Integration жүҖжңүж¬„дҪҚж“ еңЁдёҖй Ғ вҶ’ ж”№зӮәеҲҶ tabпјҡ
  - [x] Tab 1гҖҢGitгҖҚпјҡGitHub token + GitLab token/URL + SSH key + Multi-instance map
  - [x] Tab 2гҖҢGerritгҖҚпјҡGerrit Code Review е…ЁйғЁиЁӯе®ҡ + Setup Wizard е…ҘеҸЈ
  - [x] Tab 3гҖҢWebhooksгҖҚпјҡGitHub/GitLab/Gerrit/Jira webhook secrets + зӢҖж…ӢжҢҮзӨә
  - [x] Tab 4гҖҢCI/CDгҖҚпјҡGitHub Actions / Jenkins / GitLab CI й–Ӣй—ң + иЁӯе®ҡ
- [x] жҜҸеҖӢ tab й ӮйғЁйЎҜзӨә connection status badgeпјҲвң… connected / вҡ пёҸ not configured / вқҢ errorпјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

**Part E вҖ” Connection Test жҢүйҲ•**
- [x] жҜҸеҖӢ Git forge иЁӯе®ҡеҚҖеЎҠеҠ гҖҢTest ConnectionгҖҚжҢүйҲ•
- [x] GitHubпјҡ`GET /user` вҶ’ йЎҜзӨәеёіиҷҹеҗҚ + scope
- [x] GitLabпјҡ`GET /api/v4/version` вҶ’ йЎҜзӨәзүҲжң¬
- [x] GerritпјҡSSH `gerrit version` вҶ’ йЎҜзӨәзүҲжң¬
- [x] Jiraпјҡ`GET /rest/api/2/serverInfo` вҶ’ йЎҜзӨәзүҲжң¬
- [x] жё¬и©ҰзөҗжһңеҚіжҷӮйЎҜзӨәеңЁжҢүйҲ•ж—ҒпјҲвң… / вқҢ + йҢҜиӘӨиЁҠжҒҜпјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

**B14 зёҪй җдј°**пјҡ**4.5 day**

### B15. Skill Lazy Loading вҖ” Agent Token ж•ҲзҺҮе„ӘеҢ–пјҲ#350пјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡзӣ®еүҚ agent жҜҸж¬Ўе•ҹеӢ•йғҪжҠҠе®Ңж•ҙ role skill еЎһйҖІ system promptпјҲ~50K chars = ~12.5K tokensпјүгҖӮGoogle Android CLI + Skills зҡ„гҖҢProgressive DisclosureгҖҚжЁЎејҸиӯүжҳҺеҸӘйҖҒ metadata вҶ’ жҢүйңҖијүе…ҘеҸҜжёӣе°‘ 70% token з”ЁйҮҸгҖӮжӯӨе„ӘеҢ–еҪұйҹҝжүҖжңү agentпјҲдёҚеҸӘ MobileпјүпјҢжҳҜж©«еҲҮйқўж•ҲзҺҮж”№е–„гҖӮ
>
> дёҚзў° O зі»еҲ—пјҲO0-O10 е…ЁйғЁдёҚеӢ•пјүвҖ”вҖ”еҸӘж”№ prompt зө„иЈқеұӨгҖӮ

- [x] `backend/prompt_registry.py` ж–°еўһ `get_skill_metadata(path) -> dict`пјҡеӣһеӮі `{name, description, trigger_condition, token_cost}` дёҚеҗ«е®Ңж•ҙ body
- [x] `backend/prompt_registry.py` ж–°еўһ `get_skill_full(path) -> str`пјҡеӣһеӮіе®Ңж•ҙ skill contentпјҲжҢүйңҖе‘јеҸ«пјү
- [x] `backend/prompt_loader.py` `build_system_prompt()` ж”№зӮәе…©йҡҺж®өпјҡ
  - [x] Phase 1пјҲе•ҹеӢ•жҷӮпјүпјҡеҸӘжіЁе…ҘжүҖжңү skill зҡ„ metadata listпјҲ~500 chars total vs зҸҫеңЁ ~50K charsпјү
  - [x] Phase 2пјҲReAct loop дёӯпјүпјҡдҫқ CATC `domain_context` + дҪҝз”ЁиҖ… prompt иҮӘеӢ•еҢ№й…Қ вҶ’ ијүе…Ҙзӣёй—ң skill е®Ңж•ҙе…§е®№
- [x] `backend/agents/nodes.py` ReAct loop еҠ  skill-on-demand йӮҸијҜпјҡagent ијёеҮә `[LOAD_SKILL: skill_name]` вҶ’ system жіЁе…Ҙе®Ңж•ҙ skill вҶ’ з№јзәҢжҺЁзҗҶ
- [x] Feature flagпјҡ`OMNISIGHT_SKILL_LOADING=eager|lazy`пјҲй җиЁӯ `eager` дҝқжҢҒеҗ‘еҫҢзӣёе®№пјҢеҲҮ `lazy` е•ҹз”Ёж–°жЁЎејҸпјү
- [x] A/B test й©—иӯүпјҡеҗҢдёҖ task з”Ё eager vs lazy и·‘пјҢжҜ”ијғе®ҢжҲҗзҺҮ + token з”ЁйҮҸ + response е“ҒиіӘ
- [x] Metricsпјҡ`skill_load_total{mode}` / `skill_token_saved_total` / `skill_load_latency_ms`
- й җдј°пјҡ**1.5 day**

### B16. Role Skill еј·еҢ– вҖ” Cherry-pick Agency-Agents + Pattern UpgradeпјҲ#353пјүвҖ” рҹ”ҙ е„Әе…Ҳ

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡй–Ӣжәҗ [agency-agents](https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents)пјҲMIT License, 144+ agentsпјүжңү 3 еҖӢ OmniSight зјәд№Ҹзҡ„иЁӯиЁҲ patternпјҲpersonality-driven / success metrics / per-role critical rulesпјүе’Ң 5+ еҖӢжҲ‘еҖ‘е®Ңе…ЁжІ’жңүзҡ„й«ҳеғ№еҖј roleгҖӮcherry-pick иЈңйҪҠеҫҢпјҢagent иЎҢзӮәдёҖиҮҙжҖ§ + з”ўеҮәе“ҒиіӘ + иҮӘжҲ‘й©—ж”¶иғҪеҠӣйғҪжңғжҸҗеҚҮгҖӮ
>
> дёҚзў°ж—ўжңүзЁӢејҸзўјвҖ”вҖ”еҸӘж–°еўһ/дҝ®ж”№ `configs/roles/*.md` skill жӘ”жЎҲгҖӮ

**Part A вҖ” Cherry-pick й«ҳеғ№еҖј Role SkillsпјҲзјәеӨұиЈңйҪҠпјү**
- [x] `configs/roles/security-engineer.md`пјҡеҫһ agency-agents зҡ„ Security Engineer иҪүжҸӣвҖ”вҖ”иҮӘеӢ• security reviewпјҲXSS / injection / auth bypass / CSP йҒ•иҰҸ / secret жҙ©жјҸеҒөжё¬пјүгҖӮж•ҙеҗҲ S2 зі»еҲ— + PEP Gateway дҪҝз”Ё

## рҹ…ҷ Priority S вҖ” Shared Auth/Session FoundationпјҲи·Ҝз·ҡ C еүҚзҪ®е…ұз”ЁеҹәзӨҺпјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡJпјҲmulti-session hardeningпјүиҲҮ KпјҲauth hardeningпјүжңү 30% schema/API дәӨйӣҶпјҲ`audit_log.session_id`гҖҒsessions CRUDгҖҒsessions иЎЁж“ҙе……пјүгҖӮжӯӨ S phase е…ҲжҠҠе…ұз”ЁеҹәзӨҺеҒҡе®ҢпјҢJ иҲҮ K еҚіеҸҜдә’дёҚе№Іж“ҫеўһйҮҸжҺЁйҖІпјҢйҒҝе…Қ migration иЎқзӘҒгҖӮ

### S0. Shared foundation
- [x] Alembic migrationпјҡ`audit_log` еҠ  `session_id TEXT` ж¬„дҪҚ + indexпјӣж—ўжңүиіҮж–ҷ `session_id=NULL` иЎЁзӨәзі»зөұжҲ–еҢҝеҗҚдҫҶжәҗ
- [x] `sessions` иЎЁй җз•ҷж¬„дҪҚпјҡ`metadata JSONB`пјҲJ еӯҳ per-session modeпјүгҖҒ`mfa_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0`гҖҒ`rotated_from TEXT`пјҲK з”ЁпјүвҖ” дёҖж¬Ў ALTER еҲ°дҪҚйҒҝе…Қж—ҘеҫҢеҶҚ migrate
- [x] `GET /api/v1/auth/sessions` вҖ” еҲ—з•¶еүҚ user зҡ„ active sessionsпјҲйҒ®зҪ© tokenпјҢйЎҜзӨә IP/UA/created_at/last_seen_atпјү
- [x] `DELETE /api/v1/auth/sessions/{token}` вҖ” revoke е–®дёҖ sessionпјҲadmin еҸҜ revoke д»–дәәпјү
- [x] `DELETE /api/v1/auth/sessions` вҖ” з•¶еүҚ user зҡ„гҖҢзҷ»еҮәжүҖжңүе…¶д»–иЈқзҪ®гҖҚ
- [x] `current_user` еӣһеӮіеҖјеҗҢжҷӮеё¶ `Session` зү©д»¶пјҲжҲ– `request.state.session` жіЁе…ҘпјүпјҢи®“еҫҢзәҢ audit еҜ«е…ҘеҸҜеҸ– `session_id` дёҚйңҖеҶҚжҹҘ
- [x] жүҖжңү audit еҜ«е…Ҙй»һзөұдёҖз¶“ helper `write_audit(action, actor, session_id=..., ...)` вҖ” session_id иҮӘеӢ•еҫһ request context еҸ–
- [x] жё¬и©Ұпјҡsessions CRUDгҖҒrevoke еҫҢ cookie еӨұж•ҲгҖҒaudit_log жӯЈзўәеё¶ session_idгҖҒbearer token еҜ«е…ҘжҷӮ session_id=`bearer:<fingerprint>`
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**
