picker subordinate to line picker + /customers/{id} и·Ё line еҲ—иЎЁй Ғ + churn banner + lifecycle stage badge + Y9 audit йӣҷ partial index + customer audit export endpoint зјәеҸЈпјӣжҳҺеҲ— git_resolve_account дёҚж“ҙ project scope вҖ” git resolver е°Қ project йҖҸжҳҺ project е…ұз”Ё line default git account еӣ  git account жҳҜйҒӢзҮҹиіҮжәҗдёҚи©ІжҜҸ project еҗ„иЁӯпјүгҖӮ(c) **и®Ҡжӣҙжӯ·еҸІиЎЁ append дёҖиЎҢ** иЁҳж—Ҙжңҹ + еӢҫйҒё + S-5 10 еӯҗзҜҖ 6 й»һи®Ҡжӣҙж‘ҳиҰҒгҖӮ **иЁӯиЁҲеҸ–жҚЁ** вҖ” (1) зӮәдҪ• 6-persona иҖҢйқһ 4пјҡS-5 еј•е…Ҙ project owner дҪңзӮә project scope е…§зҡ„жұәзӯ–иҖ…гҖҒйңҖиҰҒ 3 иЎҢпјҲQuinn/Rita/SamпјүиҰҶи“Ӣдёү project еҗ„иҮӘзҚЁз«Ӣ ownerпјҲеҗҢжҷӮе°ҚжҮүдёүеҖӢ lifecycle stageпјҡproduction / poc / rndпјүгҖҒеҠ дёҠ Doris дҪңзӮә line owner й җиЁӯиіҰж¬Ҡе°Қз…§гҖҒCarol дҪңзӮә line member contributor е°Қз…§пјҲеј·иӘҝ contributor дёҚиғҪж”№ customer / lifecycle дҪҶеҸҜ push и·‘ workflow_runпјүгҖҒBob дҪңзӮә tenant admin и·Ё project е°Қз…§пјҲеҗ« customer и®Ҡжӣҙ + lifecycle йӣҷз°ҪеӢ•дҪңпјүвҖ” е…ұ 6 еҝ…иҰҒ personaпјӣе°‘ж–ј 6 жңғжјҸгҖҢline owner иҲҮ project owner ж¬Ҡйҷҗе·®гҖҚйҖҷеҖӢй—ңйҚөиЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖгҖӮ(2) зӮәдҪ• customer_accounts з”ЁзҚЁз«ӢиЎЁиҖҢйқһ metadata.tagsпјҡmetadata.tags жҳҜиҮӘз”ұж¬„дҪҚгҖҒз„Ўжі• schema еұӨ unique constraintгҖҒз„Ўжі•еҜ« type-safe иЁҲиІ» exportгҖҒз„Ўжі•еј·еҲ¶ auditпјӣcustomer_accounts жҳҜ first-class иЁҲиІ»жӯёеұ¬ entityпјҲеҗҲзҙ„ / NDA / billing email / external_refпјүвҖ” еҝ…й Ҳ typed schemaгҖӮ(3) зӮәдҪ• customer_account_id иҲҮ is_internal дә’ж–Ҙ CHECK иҖҢйқһе–®ж¬„ nullableпјҡеј·иҝ«жҜҸ project йЎҜејҸе®Је‘ҠгҖҢе°ҚеӨ–иЁҲиІ» vs е…§йғЁиҮӘзҮ’гҖҚгҖҒйҒҝе…ҚгҖҢеҝҳеЎ« customer вҶ’ иЁҲиІ» export жјҸе–®гҖҚsilent bugпјӣCHECK constraint еңЁ schema еұӨеј·еҲ¶пјӣUI е…©-choice radio button еј•е°Һпјӣйӣҷ NULL жҳҜ silent bug source еҝ…й Ҳ rejectгҖӮ(4) зӮәдҪ• lifecycle_stage 6 stage иҖҢйқһ 4 stageпјҡrnd + poc + production жҳҜжңҖе°ҸйӣҶпјҲз„Ў customer / жңүе®ўжҲ¶ POC / жңүе®ўжҲ¶йҮҸз”ўпјүпјҢдҪҶ graduated дёӯд»ӢзӢҖж…Ӣеҝ…иҰҒпјҲйҒҝе…Қ POC йҖҡйҒҺзӣҙжҺҘеҚҮ production cap зӘҒи·і + з•ҷе®ўжҲ¶жі•еӢҷз°ҪеҗҲзҙ„з·©иЎқпјү + rejected иҲҮ archived йЎҜејҸеҲҶе…© enumпјҲеӨұж•— vs жӯЈеёёйҖҖе ҙи®“иЁҲиІ» dashboard еҚҖеҲҶпјүвҖ” е…ұ 5 active stage + 1 archived зөӮж…Ӣ = 6пјӣе°‘ж–ј 6 жјҸй—ңйҚөжҘӯеӢҷиӘһж„ҸгҖӮ(5) зӮәдҪ• graduated жҳҜеј·еҲ¶дёӯд»ӢзӢҖж…ӢпјҡиҲҮ S-3.6 и·Ё tenant share дёүж®өејҸзӢҖж…Ӣж©ҹеҗҢиЁӯиЁҲе“Іеӯё вҖ” и·ЁйҮҚеӨ§йӮҠз•Ңеҝ…жңүдёӯд»Ӣж…ӢпјӣйҒҝе…ҚгҖҢеҚҮйҡҺеҚізҮ’зҲҶй җз®—гҖҚ + е®ўжҲ¶жі•еӢҷз°ҪеҗҲзҙ„з·©иЎқ + и§ҖеҜҹзӘ—й©—иӯү POC йҖҡйҒҺ вү  йҮҸз”ўз©©е®ҡгҖӮ30d и§ҖеҜҹзӘ—жҳҜеҗҲзҗҶ defaultпјҲиҲҮ S-1.7 Day 30 / S-2.7 Day 30 / S-3.6 Day 60 зҙҡеҲҘдёҖиҮҙгҖҒдёҚйҒҺй•·дёҚйҒҺзҹӯпјүгҖӮ(6) зӮәдҪ• SOP inheritance жҳҜй җиЁӯ clone жҳҜйЎҜејҸпјҡйҒҝе…ҚгҖҢQuinn йҡЁжүӢ fork вҶ’ еҚҠе№ҙеҫҢ Doorbell з·ҡ SOP еҚҮзүҲ V1 жІ’и·ҹеҲ° вҶ’ дёҚдёҖиҮҙгҖҚе…ёеһӢе·ҘзЁӢжІ»зҗҶ anti-patternпјӣS-5.1 иЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 5 гҖҢдёү project е…ұз”Ё Doorbell SOP жҳҜ invariant дёҚжҳҜ defaultгҖҚжҳҜж ёеҝғеҲӨж–· вҖ” жғійЎҜејҸеҲҶж”ҜйңҖйЎҜејҸжҢүйҲ• + UI иӯҰе‘ҠгҖӮ(7) зӮәдҪ• skill_pack caller pays иҲҮ S-3.4 и·Ё tenant caller pays е°ҚзЁұпјҡcaller pays и®“гҖҢиӘ°з”ЁиӘ°иІ иІ¬гҖҚжё…жҷ° + йҒҝе…ҚгҖҢfork skill_pack и®ҠжҲҗз№һйҒҺиҮӘе·ұ cap зҡ„еҫҢй–ҖгҖҚпјӣе°ҚзЁұиЁӯиЁҲпјҲS-3 и·Ё tenant + S-5 и·Ё projectпјүи®“ reviewer зңӢеҫ—еҮәиҰҸеҫӢжҖ§ + Y6 еҜҰдҪңеҸҜе…ұз”Ё caller_project_id context йӮҸијҜгҖӮ(8) зӮәдҪ• lifecycle_stage з”Ё text + CHECK иҖҢйқһ PG enum typeпјҡPG enum value add жҳҜ ALTER TYPE дҪҶ remove / rename еӣ°йӣЈгҖҒmigration з—ӣпјӣCHECK зөҰеҗҢжЁЈеј·еһӢеҲҘдҝқиӯү + migration иө°жЁҷжә– ALTER TABLEпјӣS-3.5 / S-4.6 ж—ўжңү CHECK иЁӯиЁҲдёҖиҮҙгҖӮ(9) зӮәдҪ• sop_overrides иө° parameters jsonb merge иҖҢйқһж•ҙ body deep mergeпјҡзөҗж§Ӣз°Ўе–® reviewer дёҖзңјзңӢеҮә override ж”№дәҶд»Җйәјпјӣdeep merge е®№жҳ“еҮә bugпјҲе“Әдәӣ list и©І replace е“Әдәӣи©І appendпјүпјӣY4 иҗҪең°жҷӮ SOP runtime еңЁ invoke жҷӮеҒҡпјҡline SOP body + project override parameters вҶ’ final config з°Ўе–® dict update дёҚйҒһиҝҙгҖӮ(10) зӮәдҪ• product_line_id NOT NULL дёҚж”ҫй¬ҶдҪҶ customer_account_id nullableпјҡS-4.6 иЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 3 е·ІиҰҒжұӮ product_line_id NOT NULLпјҲжҜҸ project еҝ…еұ¬дёҖжўқ line жҳҜ deterministic жҖ§йңҖиҰҒпјүпјӣcustomer_account_id жҳҜ project йЎҚеӨ–еұ¬жҖ§гҖҒиҲҮ product_line_id orthogonalпјҲеҗҢ customer зҡ„ project еҸҜи·Ё lineпјҡдҫӢ customer A еңЁ Doorbell иҲҮ IPCam еҗ„жңү projectпјүгҖӮ(11) зӮәдҪ• git resolver дёҚж“ҙ project и»ёе°Қз…§иЎЁпјҲLLM cap з«ӢеҚійҮӢж”ҫ / disk artifact 90d з·©иЎқ / workflow_run + branch е…Ё freeze / project_members status='offboarded_from_project' / customer_account з¶Ғе®ҡдҝқз•ҷ / зөұиЁҲеҲҮеҲ° archived bucketпјү+ 7 жўқиЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖпјҲarchive жҳҜ admin зҙҡ purge жҳҜ cron зҙҡгҖҒun-archive 90d иҲҮ branch 30d е°ҚжҜ”гҖҒcross-tenant share frozen дёҚ revokeгҖҒз«ӢеҚійҮӢж”ҫ LLM cap **и®Ҡжӣҙжӯ·еҸІиЎЁ append дёҖиЎҢ** иЁҳж—Ҙжңҹ + еӢҫйҒё + S-7 10 еӯҗзҜҖ + schema еўһйҮҸ + дёүжўқжҷӮй–“и»ё 6 й»һи®Ҡжӣҙж‘ҳиҰҒгҖӮ **иЁӯиЁҲеҸ–жҚЁ** вҖ” (1) зӮәдҪ• 5-persona иҖҢйқһ 6пјҡS-7 дёүжўқ offboarding и·Ҝеҫ‘пјҲuser / tenant / projectпјүиҰҶи“Ӣеҝ…йңҖ 5 persona вҖ” CarolпјҲйӣўиҒ·дё»й«”пјү+ BobпјҲadmin actor еҹ·иЎҢдәәпјү+ AliceпјҲowner / churn жұәзӯ–иҖ…пјү+ PatпјҲplatform super-admin и·Ё tenant + GDPR redactionпјү+ CherпјҲguest survivor и·Ё tenant иҰ–и§’пјүпјӣе°‘ж–ј 5 жјҸй—ңйҚө graceful offboarding actorпјӣеӨҡеҠ пјҲеҰӮ Doris line ownerпјүжңғзЁҖйҮӢз„Ұй»һ вҖ” line owner еңЁ S-7 дёҚжҳҜзҚЁз«Ӣжұәзӯ–иҖ…гҖҒиҲҮ admin иЎҢзӮәдёҖиҮҙгҖӮ(2) зӮәдҪ•гҖҢuser йӣўиҒ·гҖҚгҖҢtenant йҖҖиЁӮгҖҚгҖҢproject е°ҒеӯҳгҖҚж”ҫеҗҢдёҖз« иҖҢйқһеҲҶдёүз« пјҡдёүиҖ…е…ұдә« 4 invariantпјҲaudit chain дёҚж–· + ownership migrate + quota йҮӢж”ҫйӣҷеҜ« + SSE йҖҡзҹҘпјүгҖҒе…ұдә« redaction жЎҶжһ¶гҖҒе…ұдә« 28d/60d/90d з·©иЎқжңҹжЁЎејҸ вҖ” йӣҶдёӯдёҖз« еҸҜи®“ reviewer жҜ”ијғиЎҢзӮәе·®з•°пјҲS-7.6 6-row е°Қз…§иЎЁжҳҜж ёеҝғдәӨд»ҳзү©пјүпјӣеҲҶдёүз« жңғи®“ redaction / chain-hash / SSE жЎҶжһ¶йҮҚиӨҮгҖӮ(3) зӮәдҪ• tenant lifecycle 4 stage иҖҢйқһ 3 stageпјҡactive + cancelled е…© stage еӨӘе°‘гҖҒз„Ў export з·©иЎқжңҹпјӣsuspendedпјҲеҸҜйҖҶпјү+ wind_downпјҲз·ҡжҖ§еҖ’ж•ёпјүеҝ…еҲҶе…© stageпјҲS-7.3 иЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 1пјүвҖ” е•ҶжҘӯ SaaS йҖҖиЁӮжөҒзЁӢиЎҢжҘӯжЁҷжә–пјҲеҰӮ AWS 6-month lifecycle / Stripe subscription cancellation йғҪжңү grace period дёӯд»Ӣж…Ӣпјүпјӣе°‘ж–ј 4 жјҸ graceful йҖҖиЁӮзҡ„ж ёеҝғз·©иЎқгҖӮ(4) зӮәдҪ• chain hash дёҚйҮҚз®—пјҲиЎҢжҘӯжЁҷжә–е°ҚйҪҠпјүпјҡе°ҚйҪҠ AWS CloudTrail Log File Integrity ValidationгҖҒSplunk Audit TrailгҖҒHashiCorp Vault Audit Device зӯүиЎҢжҘӯж—ўжңү audit иЁӯиЁҲ вҖ” йҖҷдәӣж–№жЎҲйғҪйҒёж“ҮгҖҢappend-only + redaction marker + дёҚйҮҚз®— hashгҖҚпјӣиҮӘиЎҢйҮҚз®— hash жңғи®“жүҖжңүжӯ·еҸІиӯүж“ҡпјҲе·ІиЁҳйҢ„зҡ„гҖҢжҲ‘зңӢйҒҺ hash XгҖҚпјүеӨұж•ҲгҖҒеҗҲиҰҸйҒ•иҰҸпјӣS-7.5 иЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 1 жҠҠйҖҷеҖӢе°ҚйҪҠжҳҺзўәеҢ–гҖӮ(5) зӮәдҪ• ownership_migrations append-only дёҚйңҖ chain hashпјҡиҲҮ audit_log дёҰеӯҳпјҲжҜҸзӯҶ migration еҗҢжҷӮеҜ« audit_log иЎҢпјүгҖҒе®Ңж•ҙжҖ§йқ  audit chain дҝқиӯүгҖҒдёҚйңҖиҮӘе·ұйҮҚж–°е»әдёҖжўқ chainпјӣappend-only жҳҜгҖҢиЎҢзӮәеұӨгҖҚforensicпјҲиӘ°жҠҠ V1 еҫһ Carol transfer еҲ° QuinnпјүгҖҒaudit_log жҳҜгҖҢдәӢд»¶еұӨгҖҚforensicпјҲзі»зөұеҹ·иЎҢдәҶ migration еӢ•дҪңпјүвҖ”е…©жўқ forensic и»ҢйҒ“дёҰеӯҳйҒҝе…Қе–®й»һеӨұиӘӨгҖӮ(6) зӮәдҪ• redaction surface жҳҜ column зҙҡиҖҢйқһ row зҙҡпјҡrow зҙҡ hard delete жңғз ҙ chain hashгҖҒcolumn зҙҡ redaction дҝқ row з•ҷ hashпјӣе°ҚйҪҠ GDPR right-to-erasure гҖҢreasonable steps to ensure erasureгҖҚеҜҰеӢҷ вҖ” зӣЈз®ЎеҜҰиёҗдёӯеҸҜжҺҘеҸ— PII column nullifyгҖҒдёҚиҰҒжұӮж•ҙ row еҲӘйҷӨпјҲеүҚжҸҗжҳҜ row д»ҚеҸҜиў« audit chain еј•з”ЁдҪҶз„Ўжі•еҸҚжҺЁ PIIпјүгҖӮ(7) зӮәдҪ• 28d / 60d / 90d дёүеұӨз·©иЎқжңҹеҲҶеұӨпјҡ28dпјҲuser йӣўиҒ·пјүе°ҚжҮү HR жөҒзЁӢ + йҠҖиЎҢе°ҚеёійҖұжңҹпјӣ60dпјҲtenant wind_downпјүе°ҚжҮүе•ҶжҘӯеҗҲзҙ„зөӮжӯў + жі•еӢҷз°Ҫж”¶пјӣ90dпјҲproject archiveпјүе°ҚжҮүйҮ‘иһҚеҗҲиҰҸжңҹ + е®ўжҲ¶жі•еӢҷиҲүиӯүпјӣдёүеұӨжңҹйҷҗеҹәж–јиЎҢжҘӯеҜҰеӢҷгҖҒдёҚжҳҜ arbitraryгҖӮ(8) зӮәдҪ• LLM еҒҸйҮӢж”ҫгҖҒdisk еҒҸеҮҚзөҗпјҡжҷӮй–“з¶ӯеәҰ вҖ” LLM cap жҳҜ 30d ж»‘зӘ—пјҲиҮӘз„¶ж»‘еҮәпјүгҖҒйҮӢж”ҫзөҰе…¶д»– user з«ӢеҚіеҸҜз”Ё + йҮҚеҲҶй…Қйҳ»еҠӣдҪҺпјӣdisk жҳҜе„ІеӯҳпјҲйҮҚе»әжҲҗжң¬й«ҳ + е®ўжҲ¶жі•еӢҷеҸҜиғҪдәӢеҫҢиҰҒеӣһй ӯзңӢпјүгҖҒеҮҚзөҗжңҹй–“дёҚз®— GC жүҚжңүеҗҲиҰҸз·©иЎқпјӣS-7.6 иЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 2 жҠҠйҖҷеҖӢйқһе°ҚзЁұжҖ§жҳҺзўәеҢ–йҒҝе…Қ reviewer ж©ҹжў°ејҸеҘ—з”ЁгҖҢе…ЁйғЁйҮӢж”ҫгҖҚжҲ–гҖҢе…ЁйғЁеҮҚзөҗгҖҚгҖӮ(9) зӮәдҪ• redaction еҝ…йӣҷйҸҲеҜ«пјҡе°ҚйҪҠ S-3 / S-5 / S-6 ж—ўжңүйӣҷйҸҲиЁӯиЁҲе“Іеӯё вҖ” и·Ё tenant ж¶үеҸҠ user PII redactгҖҒguest tenant owner еҝ…й ҲзҹҘйҒ“пјҲеҗҲиҰҸйҖҸжҳҺжҖ§пјүпјӣе–®йҸҲеҜ«жңғи®“ guest tenant зңӢдёҚеҲ°иҮӘе·ұ user зҡ„ PII еңЁ host з«Ҝзҷјз”ҹи®ҠеҢ–гҖҒйҒ•еҸҚгҖҢиіҮж–ҷеҸӘйҖІдёҚеҮәгҖҚиҲҮгҖҢи·Ё tenant йҖҸжҳҺгҖҚе…©еҖӢ OmniSight ж—ўжңү invariantгҖӮ(10) зӮәдҪ• service token дёҚзҙҡиҒҜеҲ° user offboardingпјҡS-1.1 иЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 3 е·ІйҮҳгҖҢservice token дёҚеҸҰиө·и§’иүІгҖҚпјӣS-7 жҠҠйҖҷе»¶дјёеҲ° offboarding вҖ” service token жІ’жңү audit-actor иӯҳеҲҘжңҹеҫ…пјҲе®ғжҳҜ capability bearerпјүгҖҒдёҚи©Іеӣ  owner йӣўиҒ·е°ұ break CIпјӣservice token иө°зҚЁз«Ӣ rotation cron + зҚЁз«Ӣ audit + зҚЁз«Ӣ revoke endpointгҖӮ(11) зӮәдҪ• 18 ж¬„ + 2 ж–°иЎЁ + 4 partial index + 2 CHECK иҖҢйқһеҸҰиө· user_offboardings иЎЁ + tenant_lifecycle_history иЎЁпјҡиҲҮ S-3 / S-4 / S-5 / S-6 ж—ўжңү schema иЁӯиЁҲдёҖиҮҙ вҖ” 1:1 еұ¬жҖ§еҠ еңЁдё»иЎЁгҖҒ1:N дәӢд»¶еҸҰиө·иЎЁпјӣownership_migrations + redaction_requests жҳҜ 1:N дәӢд»¶пјҲжҜҸ user еӨҡзӯҶ migration / еӨҡзӯҶ redaction requestпјүеҝ…йңҖзҚЁз«ӢиЎЁпјӣuser.disabled_* / tenant.lifecycle_stage / project.archived_* жҳҜ 1:1 еұ¬жҖ§еҠ еңЁдё»иЎЁпјҲж—ўжңү row зҙҡ query maxпјҡе°ҚйҪҠ Ghodsi DRF еҺҹж–Ү NSDI'11 иЁӯиЁҲпјӣPam зҡ„ dominant жҳҜ tokenгҖҒDoris зҡ„ dominant жҳҜ slotгҖҒSam зҡ„ dominant жҳҜ cpu вҖ” е…Ёеҹҹе–®дёҖ axis client йҮҚи©ҰйӮҸијҜпјӣж··з”Ёжңғи®“ frontend retry йӮҸијҜж··дәӮ + UI banner иЁҠжҒҜдёҚе°Қпјӣ7 е ҙжҷҜ dispatch иЎЁжҠҠжҜҸжўқи§ёзҷјжўқд»¶е°ҚеҲ° HTTP code еҜ«жӯ»йҒҝе…ҚеҫҢзәҢйҮҚиӯ°гҖӮ(5) зӮәдҪ• 402 vs 429 еҡҙж јеҚҖеҲҶпјҡ402 жҳҜиЁҲиІ»иіҮжәҗдёҚи¶іпјҲneed plan upgradeпјүгҖҒ429 жҳҜи«ӢжұӮй »зҺҮйҒҺй«ҳпјҲneed slow downпјүпјӣж··з”Ёжңғи®“ client з«ҜгҖҢrate-limited иҮӘеӢ• backoffгҖҚйӮҸијҜиӘӨи§ё plan upgrade жөҒзЁӢпјӣж—ўжңү RedisLimiter е·ІжҳҜ 429пјҲHTTP request зҙҡпјүгҖҒtoken cap еҝ…иө° 402пјҲplan upgrade зҙҡпјүгҖӮ(6) зӮәдҪ• token meter 5-key иҖҢйқһ 3-keyпјҡtenant + line + project жҳҜ enforcementпјҲreal-time gatingпјүеҝ…иҰҒпјӣuser + share жҳҜ attributionпјҲdashboard / billingпјүдҪҶдёҚ enforce вҖ” S-1.2 е·ІйҮҳгҖҢжӯёеӣ дёҚжҳҜ enforcementгҖҚпјӣ5 key дёӯеҸӘ 3 key и·‘ atomic checkпјҲйҒҝе…ҚжҜҸж¬Ў LLM call ж’һ 5 еҖӢ counter и®ҠзҶұй»һпјүгҖӮ(7) зӮәдҪ• reservation TTL 5minпјҡ5min жҳҜгҖҢLLM call еҫһ reserve еҲ° commit зҡ„еҗҲзҗҶдёҠйҷҗгҖҚпјҲеҗ« retry / failoverпјүпјӣй•·йҒҺ 5min жҳҜ worker жӯ»жҺү / network зҷұ вҖ” иө° TTL иҮӘеӢ•йҮӢж”ҫйҒҝе…Қ leakпјӣиҲҮж—ўжңү secret_store 30s lease + redis SET EX жЁЎејҸе°ҚйҪҠгҖӮ(8) зӮәдҪ• emergency burst жңҲйҷҗ 1 hard capпјҡburst иЁӯиЁҲжҳҜгҖҢеҒ¶зҷј incident з·©иЎқгҖҚгҖҒиӢҘжҜҸжңҲз”Ё = plan дёҚеӨ  = иө° plan upgrade и·Ҝеҫ‘пјӣжңҲйҷҗ N й…ҚзҪ®жңғи®“ burst и®ҠгҖҢж—Ҙеёёи¶…йЎҚгҖҚз ҙеЈһ fairnessпјӣеҲқзүҲйҺ– 1 ж¬ЎгҖҒY10 й–Ӣ per-plan configurableпјҲе‘јжҮү S-8.9 Open Q3пјүгҖӮ(9) зӮәдҪ• дёүеұӨ floor жҺЎ max иҖҢйқһд№ҳпјҡзҙҜд№ҳдёүеұӨ 0.1 Г— 0.1 Г— 0.1 = 0.001 (вүӨ floor) йҒ•еҸҚ floor дёҚйӨ“жӯ»дҝқиӯүпјӣmax(еҗ„еұӨ floor) = 0.1 з¶ӯжҢҒгҖҢиҮіе°‘ 10% baselineгҖҚпјӣS-8.8 йӮҠз•Ң 11 жҳҺжЁҷгҖӮ(10) зӮәдҪ• schema audit_log зҙ”еҠ  enum дёҚеҠ  columnпјҡS-8 forensic йғҪз”Ёж—ўжңү action / actor / target дёүж¬„иЎЁйҒ”пјӣж–° action зӯ–з•Ҙ еҚ дҪҚгҖҚж—ўжңү 3 жӯҘпјҲY1 еҠ иЎЁ / Y4 еҠ ж¬„дҪҚ / Y6 workspace жҗ¬йҒ·пјүе°Қз…§гҖҒжң¬ row еҠ дёҠ Y10 hygiene з§»йҷӨ hardcoded fallback жҳҜеҝ…иҰҒз¬¬ 4 phaseпјҲдёҚеҒҡжңғи®“ dead fallback code ж°ёд№…ж®ҳз•ҷпјүпјӣ3 phase жјҸжҺү Phase D жңғи®“ reviewer еҫҢжңҹеӣһй ӯиЈңеҒҡ Phase D жҷӮз„Ў single source of truth еҸҜеҸғиҖғгҖӮ (3) зӮәдҪ• read OR fallback иҲҮ write explicit default дёҚе°ҚзЁұпјҡwrite и·Ҝеҫ‘еҝ…й ҲйЎҜејҸпјҲйҒҝе…Қ silent schema DEFAULT йҡұи—ҸжҮүз”ЁеұӨеҝҳеЎ« bugпјүпјӣread и·Ҝеҫ‘еҝ…й Ҳе®№еҝҚ NULLпјҲж—ўжңү row йӮ„жІ’ backfillгҖҒPhase B жңҹй–“жҳҜй җжңҹзӢҖж…Ӣпјүпјӣе°ҚжҮү SOPгҖҢModule-global state зЁҪж ёгҖҚж—ўжңүеҗҲж јзӯ”жЎҲ #2 + йӣҷеҜ«жңҹ timing йӮҠз•ҢгҖӮ (4) зӮәдҪ•еӯ—дёІ PK иҖҢйқһ UUIDпјҡdeterministicгҖҒforensic еҸҜиҝҪи№ӨпјҲдёҖзңјзңӢеҮәгҖҢfall through еҲ° default жЎ¶гҖҚпјүгҖҒиҲҮж—ўжңү t-default еӯ—дёІ PK е°ҚйҪҠпјӣUUID PK еҚҮзҙҡжҳҜ Y10 hygiene зҜ„з–ҮгҖҒS-9 дёҚиҖғж…®гҖӮ (5) зӮәдҪ• 7 еӨ©и§ҖеҜҹзӘ—пјҡе°ҚжҮү SOPгҖҢProduction Readiness GateгҖҚж—ўжңү 24h и§ҖеҜҹзӘ— Г— 7пјҲзӮә backfill cron и·‘ж»ҝ + еӨҡжҷӮж®өйӮҠз•Ң case и§ҖеҜҹ + prod incident и·Ҝеҫ‘и¶іеӨ пјүпјӣ< 7d еӨӘзҹӯеҸҜиғҪжјҸжҺүйҖұжң« / жңҲеә•йӮҠз•ҢгҖҒ> 7d еӨӘй•·жӢ–ж…ў Y4 иҗҪең°зҜҖеҘҸгҖӮ (6) зӮәдҪ• ж—ўжңү alembic 0012 пҪһ 0029 еӯ—дёІж°ёйҒ дёҚеӢ•пјҡalembic migration жҳҜ immutable жӯ·еҸІгҖҒж”№е®ғзӯүж–јж”№ж—ўжңү prod schema еҚҮзҙҡи·Ҝеҫ‘гҖҒжңғи®“гҖҢ`alembic upgrade head` еҫһ baseline и·‘гҖҚdisaster recovery еӨұж•—пјӣS-9 / Y10 hygiene еӢ•дҪңеҸӘжё…гҖҢruntime / frontend hardcoded fallbackгҖҚгҖҒдёҚжё… migration еӯ—дёІгҖӮ (7) зӮәдҪ•дёҚеҸҰиө·ж–°иЎЁпјҡS-4.6 + S-5.6 е·Іе»ә product_lines + projects е…©иЎЁгҖҒS-9 зҙ”зІ№жҳҜгҖҢseed 2 rowгҖҚ+гҖҢж—ўжңүиЎЁеҠ ж–°ж¬„дҪҚгҖҒY4 иҗҪең°гҖҚзҡ„зө„еҗҲпјӣеҸҰиө·ж–°иЎЁжҳҜ over-engineeringгҖҒйҒ•еҸҚгҖҢж“ҙе……ж—ўжңү schemaгҖҚж—ўжңүиЁӯиЁҲе“ІеӯёгҖӮ (8) зӮәдҪ• default seed еңЁ tenant еүөе»ә transaction е…§ vs lazy seedпјҡlazy seed жңғи®“ RBAC жӘўжҹҘи·Ҝеҫ‘еҮәзҸҫгҖҢи©І tenant жІ’ default project вҶ’ fallthrough еҲ°пјҹгҖҚйӮҠз•ҢгҖҒeasy to bugпјӣеҗҢ transaction seed дҝқиӯү tenant дёҖеӯҳеңЁе°ұжңүе®Ңж•ҙйҡҺеұӨгҖҒжүҖжңү query иө° deterministic pathпјӣе°ҚжҮү SOPгҖҢRead-after-write timingгҖҚж—ўжңүиЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖгҖӮ (9) зӮәдҪ• audit_log chain hash дёҚйҮҚз®—пјҡе°ҚйҪҠ S-7.5 ж—ўжңүиЁӯиЁҲж–·иЁҖ 1пјҲchain hash дёҚйҮҚз®—жҳҜ chain е®Ңж•ҙжҖ§ж ёеҝғпјүпјӣж—ўжңү 100 пҪһ 1000+ row йҮҚз®— hash = 1 пҪһ 10 з§’ PG load + chain hash з®—жі•е·Іиў«еӨ–йғЁ SIEM forensic е·Ҙе…·еј•з”ЁгҖҒж”№ hash зӯүж–јжҜҖжҺүжүҖжңүеӨ–йғЁ forensic claimгҖӮ (10) зӮәдҪ• 4 phase еҗ„иҮӘзҚЁз«Ӣ rollbackпјҡжҜҸ phase жҳҜ atomicпјҲfeature flag / git revert / alembic downgrade дёүзЁ®зҚЁз«Ӣ rollback path еҗ„ вүӨ 5 minпјүпјӣе°ҚжҮү SOPгҖҢProduction Readiness GateгҖҚж—ўжңүгҖҢrollback и·Ҝеҫ‘жҳҺзўәгҖҚиҰҒжұӮпјӣж··еҗҲ phase жңғи®“ rollback и·Ҝеҫ‘жҢҮж•ёзҲҶзӮёгҖӮ (11) зӮәдҪ• е…ұз”ЁеҚҖж®өеҪҷж•ҙж”№жЁҷгҖҢдёӢдёҖијӘ rowгҖҚзӢҖж…ӢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜжң¬ row й ҶжүӢеҒҡпјҡе°ҚжҮүгҖҢScope зҙҖеҫӢгҖҚеҡҙж јеҸӘе®ҢжҲҗз¬¬ 9 еӢҫйҒёпјӣER mermaid + ж¬Ҡйҷҗзҹ©йҷЈ + migration жӯҘй©ҹж”¶е°ҫжҳҜзҚЁз«Ӣе·ҘдҪңй …зӣ®пјҲй җдј° 0.5 пҪһ 1 dayпјүгҖҒиҲҮ й җдј°пјҡ**2 day**

### Y1. Schema: memberships + projects + invites + shares (#277)

I/Oпјӣupgrade д№ҹиө° walk дҪҶ hard_bytes и®ҠеӨ§дёҚжңғ failвҖ”вҖ”з°ЎеҢ– branchпјүпјӣиө° `_measure_disk_safely` (filesystem 4-subdir walk in `asyncio.to_thread`)пјӣжҜ”е°Қ / rows_deletedпјүгҖҒзөҗжқҹзҷј `completed` eventпјҲеҗ« elapsed_seconds + per-table deleted_counts + bytes_freedпјүпјҢеӨұж•—зҷј `failed` event дёҰ audit `tenant_delete_failed`гҖӮstrong-ref set ### Y3. Admin REST API вҖ” User / Membership / Invite з”ҹе‘ҪйҖұжңҹ (#279)

multi-user зҡ„з®ЎзҗҶйқўпјҡйӮҖи«ӢйҖІ tenantгҖҒиӘҝж•ҙ roleгҖҒиёўдәәгҖҒи·Ё tenant membershipгҖӮ

invited_by, created_at, expires_at}` вҖ” **token_hash еҲ»ж„Ҹ omit**пјҲз„Ў operator valueгҖҒbroaden д»»дҪ•жңӘдҫҶ logging ж„ҸеӨ–зҡ„ leak surfaceпјүпјҢplaintext жң¬дҫҶе°ұдёҚеӯҳпјҲеҸӘеңЁ POST йӮЈдёҖеҲ»еӣһ жңҖж–°е„Әе…Ҳ + еҗҢз§’ stable orderingгҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 200 success / 403 RBAC / 404 well-formed unknown id / 422 (id pattern fail / unknown status / oversized limit)гҖӮ**SOP еј·еҲ¶жӘўжҹҘ**: (1) еҸ–жұәж–је“ӘеҖӢ transaction е…Ҳ commitгҖҒжҳҜ PG read-committed жЁҷжә–иЎҢзӮәйқһ regressionгҖӮ(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` вҶ’ 0 - [x] `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/invites/{id}` вҖ” ж’ӨйҠ·йӮҖи«ӢгҖӮ **(2026-04-25)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/routers/tenant_invites.py` +~270 иЎҢ `@router.delete("/tenants/{tenant_id}/invites/{invite_id}")` handlerгҖҒ`INVITE_ID_PATTERN` / `_INVITE_ID_RE` / `_is_valid_invite_id` дёүеҖӢ module-level constants/helpersгҖҒ2 еҖӢ SQL еёёж•ё `_REVOKE_INVITE_SQL` (atomic UPDATEвҖҰRETURNINGгҖҒscope by `id + tenant_id + status='pending'`) + `_FETCH_INVITE_FOR_REVOKE_SQL` (UPDATE-miss жҷӮ disambiguate з”ЁгҖҒдёҚ project token_hash)) + 1 ж–° test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_invites_revoke.py` 24 tests / 11 PASS pure-unit / 13 SKIP no-PG)гҖӮ**State machine иЁӯиЁҲ**: `pending вҶ’ revoked` happy path / `revoked вҶ’ revoked` idempotent (200 + `already_revoked=True` зөҰ UI жҠ‘еҲ¶йҮҚиӨҮ toast) / `accepted вҶ’ 409` (membership е·І materialiseгҖҒadmin ж”№иө° membership management) / `expired вҶ’ 409` (distinct terminal stateгҖҒдёҚ silent transmute)гҖӮ**Defence-in-depth**: жҢҒд№… `status='pending'` but `expires_at < now` зҡ„ stale-pending row д»ҚеҸҜ revokeвҖ”вҖ”admin е·Ій»һдёӢ revokeгҖҒhousekeeping sweep йӮ„жІ’зҝ» status дёҚи©ІеҪұйҹҝ UXгҖӮ**Atomic check-and-flip**: з”Ё `UPDATE вҖҰ WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2 AND status='pending' RETURNING id, ...` дёҖиЎҢеҺҹеӯҗзҝ»иҪүйҒҝй–Ӣ SELECT-then-UPDATE TOCTOUпјӣUPDATE-miss жҷӮжүҚ issue з¬¬дәҢж”Ҝ SELECT еҚҖеҲҶгҖҢrow дёҚеӯҳеңЁгҖҚvsгҖҢrow еӯҳеңЁдҪҶйқһ pendingгҖҚпјҢcommon happy path дёҖж¬Ў round-tripгҖӮ**Tenant scoping**: `WHERE tenant_id=$2` йҳІжӯўи·Ё tenant id зҢңжё¬ж”»ж“ҠпјҲA tenant зҡ„ invite дёҚиғҪеҫһ B tenant URL ж’ӨйҠ·пјүгҖӮ**Auth model**: жІҝз”Ё row 1/2 зҡ„ `_user_can_invite_into` helperгҖҒtenant-admin-or-above on target tenant or platform super_adminгҖҒmember/viewer ж”¶ 403гҖҒRBAC reject дёҚ silently flip rowпјҲtestedпјүгҖӮ**Response shape**: `{invite_id, tenant_id, status, already_revoked, email, role, created_at, expires_at}` вҖ” token_hash еҲ»ж„Ҹ omitпјҲжІҝиҘІ row 2 зҡ„ leak surface йҳІиӯ·пјүгҖӮ**Audit emission**: `tenant_invite_revoked` action / before `{status: pending}` / after `{status: revoked, email, role}` / actor=actor.email / token_hash ж—ўдёҚеңЁ row д№ҹдёҚеңЁ audit blobгҖҒself-test grep `[0-9a-f]{64}` жҠ“д»»дҪ• sha256-shaped leakгҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 200 happy + idempotent / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant жҲ– well-formed unknown invite / 409 terminal-state guard / 422 (tenant id pattern fail / invite id pattern fail)гҖӮ**SOP еј·еҲ¶жӘўжҹҘ**: (1) Module-global state зЁҪж ёеҗҲж јзӯ”жЎҲ #1пјҲ2 SQL + 1 regex string + 1 compiled regex йғҪ module-level immutableгҖҒжҜҸ worker еҫһеҗҢжЁЈ source жҺЁе°ҺеҗҢжЁЈеҖјпјү+ #2пјҲDB state иө° PGпјү+ дёҚеј•ж–° in-memory cacheгҖӮ(2) Read-after-write timingпјҡDELETE жҳҜ write pathгҖҒз”Ё single-statement UPDATEвҖҰRETURNING serialised by PG row-lockгҖҒfollow-up SELECT only on UPDATE-missгҖҒidempotent revoke жҳҜеҲ»ж„Ҹ designпјҲеҗҢ admin йҮҚ click еҗҢжЁЈ terminal stateпјүгҖӮ(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` вҶ’ 0 е‘Ҫдёӯ FINGERPRINT-CLEANгҖӮ**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 ж–° wheelпјҲFastAPI / asyncpg ж—ўжңүпјүгҖҒ0 schema migrationпјҲзҙ”ж”№ж—ўжңү `tenant_invites.status` ж¬„пјүгҖҒ0 ж–° env knobгҖҒ0 docker changeгҖҒroute е·І mounted зўәиӘҚ `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/invites/{invite_id}`гҖӮ**Drift guard test дёғж—Ҹ 24 жўқ**: (a) `INVITE_ID_PATTERN` shape + `_is_valid_invite_id` accept POST shape + reject еӨ§е°ҸеҜ« / еӨӘзҹӯ / unanchored 7 жўқгҖҒ(b) `_REVOKE_INVITE_SQL` pending-only + tenant-scoped + RETURNING + no-token_hash 4 жўқгҖҒ(c) `_FETCH_INVITE_FOR_REVOKE_SQL` SELECT-only + no-token_hash + PG-placeholder 4 жўқпјҲГ— 2 sql parametriseпјүгҖҒ(d) router DELETE endpoint mounted + main app full-prefix mounted + handler з”Ё `auth.current_user` dependency 3 жўқгҖҒ(e) HTTP happy 3 жўқ (pendingвҶ’revokedгҖҒrevokedвҶ’already_revoked idemгҖҒstale-pending д»Қ revocable)гҖҒ(f) HTTP terminal-state 2 жўқ (accepted 409гҖҒexpired 409)гҖҒ(g) HTTP scope 1 жўқ (и·Ё tenant 404 + persisted state untouched)гҖҒ(h) HTTP error 4 жўқ (malformed tid 422 / malformed iid 422 / unknown tenant 404 / unknown invite 404)гҖҒ(i) RBAC 2 жўқ (tenant member 403 + state untouched / tenant admin 200 + state flipped)гҖҒ(j) audit chain 1 жўқ (`tenant_invite_revoked` row + before/after no token_hash + no sha256 hex)гҖҒ(k) self-fingerprint guard 1 жўқгҖӮ**79/79 ancestor + 11 жң¬ row pure-unit tests 0 д№ҹдёҚе…Ҙ auditгҖҒwrong-token вҶ’ 403гҖӮ**State machine + replay йҳІиӯ·**: `pending вҶ’ accepted` е”ҜдёҖ happy pathгҖҒ`accepted` йҮҚ POST еҗҢ token вҶ’ 409 (дёҚ 200 silently confirm leaked plaintext validгҖҒж”»ж“ҠиҖ… leak еҫҢ replay зңӢдёҚеҮә token жҳҜеҗҰ valid)гҖҒ`revoked` вҶ’ 409гҖҒ`expired` (persisted) вҶ’ 410гҖҒ`pending AND expires_at < now` (sweep gap) вҶ’ 410 йҳІи…җгҖӮ**Atomic transaction**: ж•ҙж®ө `SELECTвҖҰFOR UPDATE вҶ’ token check вҶ’ INSERT users (anon-new) вҶ’ INSERT memberships вҶ’ UPDATE invites SET status='accepted'` еҢ…еңЁдёҖеҖӢ `async with conn.transaction()` е…§гҖҒPG row-lock еәҸеҲ—еҢ–е…©еҖӢ anon caller еҗҢ token зҡ„ raceгҖҒloser еңЁ FOR UPDATE йҳ»еЎһгҖҒretry-read зңӢеҲ° status='accepted' еҫҢ 409гҖҒдёҚжңғ double-flipгҖӮ**Rate-limit иЁӯиЁҲ**: еӨұж•— attempts жүҚжүЈ token (capacity 10 / window 60sгҖҒTODO row 7 literal)гҖҒkey=`invite_accept_fail:{invite_id}` (per-invite йҳІз©ҝгҖҒдёҚ per-IP йҳІз©ҝдёҚеҗҢ IP)гҖҒsuccess дёҚ decrement (admin жҠҠ link mail зөҰ recipientгҖҒrecipient еӨҡиЈқзҪ® click дёҚз®— abuse)гҖҒauth-branch email-mismatch дёҚжүЈ token (caller е·І prove sessionгҖҒйқһ brute force)гҖӮ429 её¶ Retry-AfterгҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 200 happy / 403 token mismatch / 404 unknown invite / 409 not-pending or auth email mismatch / 410 expired (persisted or wallclock) / 422 (malformed iid / missing token / token < 16 char) / 429 brute-force pathгҖҒж•ҙж®ө `async with conn.transaction()` + SELECTвҖҰFOR UPDATE еәҸеҲ—еҢ– concurrent acceptгҖҒUPDATE / INSERT йғҪеңЁ lock еҫҢеҹ·иЎҢгҖҒPG жЁҷжә– read-committed иЎҢзӮәгҖӮ(3) Pre-commit fingerprint вҶ’ 0 left) еңЁ advisory lock дёӢеј·еҲ¶дёІиЎҢгҖҒloser еңЁ lock йҳ»еЎһгҖҒwinner commit еҫҢ loser йҮҚ count зңӢеҲ° 0 вҶ’ иө° 409 branchгҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 200 happy + idempotent / 403 caller йқһ `LISTABLE_MEMBERSHIP_STATUSES=("active","suspended","all")` дёүеёёж•ёе°ҚйҪҠ alembic 0032 CHECKгҖҒ`_TENANT_ADMIN_TIER_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})` floor-check йӣҶеҗҲгҖҒ`LIST_MEMBERS_DEFAULT_LIMIT=100/MAX=500` е…©йҷҗйЎҚгҖҒ`_MEMBERSHIP_DEMOTE_LOCK_PREFIX="omnisight_membership_demote:"` advisory-lock key еүҚз¶ҙ (per-tenant дёҚ platform-wideгҖҒи·Ё tenant дёҚдә’йҺ–)гҖҒ9 SQL constants `_FETCH_TENANT_SQL` + `_LIST_MEMBERS_ACTIVE_SQL` (`m.status='active'` filter) + `_LIST_MEMBERS_BY_STATUS_SQL` ($2 status param) + `_LIST_MEMBERS_ALL_SQL` (no status filter) + `_FETCH_MEMBERSHIP_SQL` (read-only) + `_FETCH_MEMBERSHIP_FOR_UPDATE_SQL` (`FOR UPDATE OF m` иЎҢйҺ–) + `_UPDATE_MEMBERSHIP_ROLE_SQL` + `_UPDATE_MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_SQL` + filter)) + 1 main.py wire-up edit (`from backend.routers import tenant_members as _tenant_members_router; app.include_router(...)` Y3 row 6 иЁ»и§Ј) + 1 ж–° test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_members.py` 108 tests / 82 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 26 SKIP no-PG)гҖӮ**RBAC иЁӯиЁҲ**: жІҝз”Ё row 1/2/3 зҡ„ `_user_can_invite_into` еҗҢжЁЎејҸж–°еҜ«дёҖд»Ҫ `_user_can_manage_members` (super_admin зӣҙйҖҡгҖҒеҗҰеүҮеҝ…й Ҳ active membership + roleвҲҲ{owner,admin}гҖҒжҹҘ `user_tenant_memberships` иЎЁгҖҒдёҚжҺЎдҝЎ `users.role` cache)гҖҒtenant-admin-or-above on target tenant or platform super_adminгҖҒmember/viewer ж”¶ 403гҖҒemail еҲ—иЎЁжҳҜ PII дёҚе…¬й–ӢгҖӮ**Soft-delete иЁӯиЁҲ**: DELETE еҜҰйҡӣжҳҜжҠҠ status еҫһ active зҝ» suspendedгҖҒrow дҝқз•ҷгҖҒaudit и¶іи·Ўдҝқз•ҷгҖҒfollow-up GET з”Ё status=suspended/all д»ҚиҰӢ rowпјӣзЎ¬еҲӘеҸӘеңЁ Y2 admin tenants DELETE её¶ cascade жүҚзҷјз”ҹ (admin_tenants.py `tenant_deletion_cleanup` е·І chain йҒҺ)гҖӮ**Last-admin floor йҳІйҺ–жӯ»**: д»»дҪ• tenant ж°ёйҒ иҮіе°‘иҰҒжңү 1 еҖӢ active admin-tier (owner|admin) member with `users.enabled=1`гҖҒйҷҚеҮә admin-tier жҲ– suspend и©Іе”ҜдёҖ member йҒ•еҸҚ floor вҶ’ 409 with `would_leave_zero_admin_members=True` + `other_active_admin_member_count=0` зөҰ UI renderгҖӮmember/viewer д»»дҪ•зӢҖж…Ӣи®ҠжӣҙдёҚи§ёзҷј floorгҖӮdisabled (users.enabled=0) target и·ійҒҺ floor (дёҚиғҪ loginгҖҒдёҚз®— live operatorгҖҒdisabled-admin вҶ’ suspended иҰ–зӮә row tidy)гҖӮ**дёҰзҷј demote race йҳІиӯ·**: PATCH/DELETE е…ЁзЁӢ `async with conn.transaction()` е…§з¬¬дёҖеҸҘ `SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('omnisight_membership_demote:' || tenant_id))` еәҸеҲ—еҢ– per-tenant demote attemptsгҖӮйӣҷж®әе ҙжҷҜ (admin A suspend admin B еҗҢжҷӮ admin B suspend admin AгҖҒеҗ„иҮӘзҚЁз«Ӣ count > 0 вҶ’ еҗ„иҮӘ commit вҶ’ 0 left) еңЁ advisory lock дёӢеј·еҲ¶дёІиЎҢгҖҒloser еңЁ lock йҳ»еЎһгҖҒwinner commit еҫҢ loser йҮҚ SELECT FOR UPDATE и®ҖеҲ°ж–° state йҮҚ count зңӢеҲ° 0 вҶ’ иө° 409 branchгҖӮlock йҚө per-tenant дёҚ platform-wideгҖҒи·Ё tenant дёҚдә’йҺ–гҖҒжёӣе°‘ contentionгҖӮ**FOR UPDATE OF m**: SELECT иЎҢйҺ–еҸӘйҺ– membership йӮЈдёҖ rowгҖҒJOIN еҮәдҫҶзҡ„ users row дёҚйҺ– (йҒҝе…ҚеҪұйҹҝе…¶д»– user-level ж“ҚдҪң)гҖҒPG 8.4+ syntaxгҖӮ**Atomic UPDATEвҖҰRETURNING**: дёү UPDATE SQL еҗ„е°ҚжҮү role-only / status-only / role+status дёүи®ҠеҢ–гҖҒ`RETURNING` еӣһ post-update rowгҖҒhandler жҠҠ before_state + new_row еҗҢжҷӮз”Ёж–ј audit иҲҮ responseгҖҒе–®дёҖ source of truthгҖӮ**Idempotent**: PATCH зӣёеҗҢ state вҶ’ `no_change=True` + дёҚ emit audit (no state change)гҖҒDELETE е·І suspended вҶ’ `already_suspended=True` + дёҚ emit auditгҖҒUI жҠ‘еҲ¶йҮҚиӨҮ toastгҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: GET 200 / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant / 422 (id pattern fail / unknown status / oversized limit)гҖӮPATCH 200 happy + idempotent / 400 дёҚеӯҳеңЁ (pydantic 422 жӣҝд»Ј) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant жҲ– unknown membership / 409 last-admin floor / 422 (id pattern fail / unknown enum / empty body)гҖӮDELETE 200 happy + idempotent / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant жҲ– unknown membership / 409 last-admin floor / 422 (id pattern fail)гҖӮ**Audit emission**: `tenant_member_updated` зөұдёҖ action / before `{tenant_id, user_id, role:<prev_role>, status:<prev_status>}` / after `{tenant_id, user_id, role:<new_role>, status:<new_status>}` / actor=actor.emailгҖҒidempotent no-op + 409 floor-block йғҪдёҚ emit audit (no state change)гҖҒжүҖжңү audit blob йғҪдёҚеҗ« password_hash / oidc_subject / oidc_provider / token_hash (test SQL projection guard йҒҺ 9 SQL Г— no-secret-leak parametrize)гҖҒentity_kind='tenant_membership' и·ҹ entity_id=user_id е°ҚйҪҠ audit ж…ЈдҫӢгҖҒtenant_id иҗҪеңЁ before/after dict е…§гҖӮ**Response shape**: дёү endpoint йғҪеӣһ `{tenant_id, user_id, role, status, ..., email, name, user_enabled, joined_at, last_active_at}`пјӣGET йЎҚеӨ–жңү `{tenant_id, status_filter, count, members:[вҖҰ]}` еҢ…иЈқгҖӮ**SOP еј·еҲ¶жӘўжҹҘ**: (1) Module-global state зЁҪж ёеҗҲж јзӯ”жЎҲ #1 (9 SQL + 4 enum/set + 4 pattern/regex + 3 limit/lock еёёж•ё + PatchMemberRequest pydantic class йғҪ module-level immutableгҖҒжҜҸ worker еҫһеҗҢжЁЈ source жҺЁе°ҺеҗҢжЁЈеҖј) + #2 (DB state иө° PGгҖҒadvisory lock per-tenant еәҸеҲ—еҢ–и·Ё workerгҖҒFOR UPDATE иЎҢйҺ–еәҸеҲ—еҢ–еҗҢ tenant е…§ demote) + дёҚеј•ж–° in-memory cacheгҖӮ(2) Read-after-write timingпјҡGET зҙ” read дёҚеј•е…Ҙж–° write pathгҖҒPATCH/DELETE йғҪ single tx е…§е®ҢжҲҗ SELECT FOR UPDATE вҶ’ floor count вҶ’ UPDATEвҖҰRETURNINGгҖҒadvisory lock йЎҚеӨ–еәҸеҲ—еҢ– concurrent demoteгҖҒPG read-committed жЁҷжә–иЎҢзӮәгҖҒз„Ўж–° timing еҸҜиҰӢ regressionгҖӮ(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` вҶ’ 0 е‘Ҫдёӯ FINGERPRINT-CLEAN (prod + test file йғҪ clean)гҖӮ**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 ж–° wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg / Pydantic ж—ўжңү)гҖҒ0 schema migration (зҙ”и®ҖеҜ«ж—ўжңү `user_tenant_memberships` + `users` + `tenants` дёүиЎЁгҖҒCHECK constraint е·ІеңЁ alembic 0032 еј·еҲ¶ role + status enum)гҖҒ0 ж–° env knobгҖҒ0 docker changeгҖҒroute е·І mounted зўәиӘҚ `GET /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/members` + `PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/members/{user_id}` + `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{tenant_id}/members/{user_id}` дёү path Г— method еңЁ main app routes иЎЁе…§гҖӮ**Drift guard test 11 ж—Ҹ 108 жўқ**: (a) ### Y4. Admin REST API вҖ” Project + Product Line CRUD (#280)

жҠҠ tenant дёӢзҡ„е·ҘдҪңиІ ијүжӢҶжҲҗгҖҢз”ўе“Ғз·ҡ / е°ҲжЎҲ / жҲҗе“ЎгҖҚдёүеұӨпјҢе°ҚжҮү L4 skill pack зҡ„ D / W / P / X еҲҶйЎһгҖӮ

жІ’жңүе°ҚжҮү `users.id` rowгҖҒresolver иҗҪ `NULL`гҖҒйҒҝе…Қ FK violationпјӣжӯЈеёёиӘҚиӯү user иҗҪ actor.idгҖҒй…ҚеҗҲ alembic 0033 `ON DELETE SET NULL` (project жҜ” user й•·еЈҪгҖҒuser еёіиҷҹеҲӘйҷӨдёҚи©ІзүҪйҖЈ project)гҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 201 happy / 403 RBAC (tenant member йқһ admin) / 404 unknown tenant / 409 slug йҮҚиӨҮж–ј (tenant, product_line) еҗ« existing_project_id / 422 (malformed tenant_id pattern / unknown product_line / unknown plan / negative budget / oversize name / oversize slug / malformed parent_id pattern / parent дёҚеӯҳеңЁ / parent и·Ё tenant)гҖӮ**Audit ж¬„гҖҒentity_kind='project' entity_id=project_idгҖҒactor=actor.emailгҖҒidempotent (no idempotent path on POST create вҖ” йҮҚ POST еҗҢ slug иө° 409 + дёҚ emit audit)гҖҒжүҖжңү audit blob йғҪдёҚеҗ« template + 3 archived branches**: жҠҠ visibility ж”¶ж–ӮжҲҗдёҖеҖӢ boolean з®—еңЁ handler з«ҜгҖҒSQL з”Ё `$2::bool OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_members ...)` зҹӯи·ҜвҖ”вҖ”full-visibility caller PG planner зӣҙжҺҘи·ійҒҺ per-row probeпјӣexplicit-only caller иө°дёҖж¬Ў EXISTSгҖӮдёү archived еҲҶж”Ҝеӣ зӮәжҳҜ column shape дёҚжҳҜ value (`IS NULL` / `IS NOT NULL` / no filter) дёҚиғҪ tid pattern / unknown product_line / unknown archived value / oversize limit / zero limit)гҖӮ**Pagination**: `?limit=` вүӨ 500гҖҒй җиЁӯ 100гҖҒиҲҮ Y3 invite-list дёҖиҮҙ shapeпјӣ`?archived=` й җиЁӯ +~330 иЎҢ `@router.patch("/tenants/{tenant_id}/projects/{project_id}")` handlerгҖҒ`PatchProjectRequest` pydantic schema (4 nullable Optional fields + `model_fields_set` tri-state semantics)гҖҒ4 WHEN $flag THEN $val::type ELSE col END` 4 еҲ—еҗ„её¶ boolean flag pair + `RETURNING` е…Ё 12 ж¬„)) + 1 ж–° test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_patch.py` ~1030 иЎҢ / 64 tests / 41 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 23 SKIP no-PG / 64 PASS HTTP-PG bodies + 21 known-infra teardown errors)гҖӮ**Tri-state JSON-PATCH semantics**: йҖҸйҒҺ Pydantic v2 `model_fields_set` еҚҖеҲҶдёүзЁ® caller intent вҖ” (1) field зјәеёӯ вҶ’ дёҚеӢ•и©Іж¬„гҖҒ(2) field еңЁдҪҶйқһ null вҶ’ set зӮәи©ІеҖјгҖҒ(3) field еңЁдҪҶ explicit JSON null вҶ’ жё…з©әи©Іж¬„ (plan_override/budget и®Ҡеӣһз№јжүҝ tenantгҖҒparent_id и®Ҡеӣһ top-level)гҖӮ`name` field зҡ„ explicit null еңЁ handler еұӨжӢ’ 422 (column NOT NULLгҖҒCHECK length>=1)гҖӮ**Single static UPDATE SQL**: з”Ё `CASE WHEN $flag THEN $val::cast ELSE col END` per column жЁЎејҸгҖҒжҜҸж¬„её¶ boolean flag pairгҖҒhandler з«Ҝ set boolean flag = (field name in model_fields_set)гҖҒдёҚйңҖеӢ•ж…Ӣ SQL дёҚйңҖ NГ—еӨҡзүҲжң¬ UPDATE constantsгҖҒдё”иғҪзІҫзўәиЎЁйҒ” "set to NULL" иҲҮ "leave alone" е…©зЁ® distinct intentгҖӮCast `::text/::integer` еҝ…иҰҒеӣ  asyncpg еҫһйҰ–ж¬Ўйқһ NULL use жҺЁ typeгҖҒйҰ– call е…Ё NULL жңғжүҫдёҚеҲ° type infoгҖӮ**Cycle detection**: PATCH жҜ” POST еӨҡдәҶгҖҢre-parent existing projectгҖҚsurfaceгҖҒйңҖиҰҒ cycle check йҒҝе…Қ AвҶ’BгҖҒB.parent_id=A и®Ҡ AвҶ”BгҖӮ`_CYCLE_DETECT_SQL` з”Ё `WITH RECURSIVE ancestor_chain` еҫһ proposed new parent иө·иө° `parent_id` chain (`WHERE c.parent_id IS NOT NULL` зөӮжӯў recursive arm еңЁ root)гҖҒиӢҘ patched project_id еңЁ chain дёӯеҮәзҸҫ вҶ’ 422 cycle detectedгҖӮSelf-loop (`parent_id == project_id`) еңЁ handler ж—©жңҹ short-circuit 422 (зңҒ CTE round-trip)гҖӮ**Concurrent re-parent race йҳІиӯ·**: Worker A patch P1.parent=P2 еҗҢжҷӮ Worker B patch P2.parent=P1гҖҒеҗ„иҮӘзҚЁз«Ӣ cycle probe йғҪйҒҺгҖҒcommit еҫҢ cycle е·ІжҲҗгҖӮtxn е…§з¬¬дёҖеҸҘ `SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('omnisight_project_patch:' || tenant_id))` еәҸеҲ—еҢ– per-tenant re-parent attemptsгҖҒloser йҳ»еЎһгҖҒwinner commit еҫҢ loser йҮҚ cycle probe зңӢеҲ°ж–° stateгҖҒиө° 422 branchгҖӮlock per-tenant (и·Ё tenant дёҚдә’йҺ–)пјӣеҸӘжңү `parent_id вҲҲ set_fields` жҷӮ take lock (name/plan/budget patches дёҚйңҖиҰҒгҖҒжёӣ contention)гҖӮ**FOR UPDATE row lock**: `_FETCH_PROJECT_FOR_UPDATE_SQL` еңЁ patch txn е…§ SELECTвҖҰFOR UPDATE йҺ–и©І project rowгҖҒconcurrent same-row PATCH йҳ»еЎһиҖҢйқһ race on stale stateгҖҒUPDATE еҫҢ RETURNING None дёҚеҸҜиғҪ (FOR UPDATE еҗҢ txn е…§дҝқиӯү row еӯҳеңЁ + assert ж–Үд»¶еҢ–)гҖӮ**RBAC**: `_user_can_create_project_in` йҮҚз”Ё row 1 йӮҸијҜ вҖ” super_admin зӣҙйҖҡ / еҗҰеүҮ active membership вҲҲ {owner,admin} on target tenantгҖҒmember/viewer ж”¶ 403гҖҒдёҚжҺЎдҝЎ `users.role` cacheгҖӮ**Cross-tenant parent guard**: иӢҘ `parent_id` set non-nullгҖҒhandler е…©йҡҺж®өй©—иӯү вҖ” (1) validation) дёҚ 403 (caller еңЁ target tenant дёҠжҳҜеҗҲжі• adminгҖҒparent_id жҳҜ body йҢҜдёҚжҳҜж¬ҠйҷҗйҢҜ)гҖӮ**Tenant-scoped UPDATE**: `WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2` defence-in-depthгҖҒstolen project_id pointed at wrong tenant вҶ’ 404 (caller дёҚи©ІзҹҘйҒ“ row еңЁд»–иҷ•)гҖҒ`UPDATE` еҗҢжЁЈ scope (еҚідҪҝ SELECT йҒҺдәҶ tenant guardгҖҒUPDATE WHERE д»Қ tenant-scope зӮәеҶ—йӨҳдҝқиӯ·)гҖӮ**No-change short-circuit**: handler жҜ”ијғ set_fields жҜҸдёҖж¬„ vs cur_row[same field]гҖҒиӢҘе…Ёзӯү вҶ’ 200 with `no_change=True` + дёҚзҷј UPDATE + дёҚзҷј auditгҖҒUI жҠ‘еҲ¶йҮҚиӨҮ toastгҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 200 happy + idempotent (no_change=True) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant or unknown project in this tenant (cross-tenant project д№ҹ 404 йҳІжҙ©жјҸ) / 422 (malformed tid/pid pattern / empty body / explicit name=null / parent_id == project_id / parent_id дёҚеӯҳеңЁ / parent и·Ё tenant / cycle)гҖӮ**Audit emission**: `tenant_project_updated` action / before+after dict еҗ„её¶ `tenant_id`+`project_id`+each changed field зҡ„ prev/new еҖј (еғ…и®Ҡжӣҙж¬„гҖҒдҝқжҢҒ audit blob з·Ҡж№ҠгҖҒз„Ў secret жҙ©жјҸ)гҖҒactor=actor.emailгҖҒentity_kind='project' entity_id=project_idгҖҒno_change вҶ’ дёҚ emit audit (no state change)гҖҒcycle/422/404/403 вҶ’ дёҚ emit audit (no mutation)гҖҒжүҖжңү audit blob йғҪдёҚеҗ« password_hash / oidc_subject / token_hash (test SQL projection guard + audit blob grep)гҖӮ**SOP - [x] `POST /.../projects/{pid}/archive` + `POST /.../projects/{pid}/restore` вҖ” soft-archiveпјӣarchived еҫҢ workspace / agent / cron е…ЁйғЁеҒңе·ҘдҪҶиіҮж–ҷдҝқз•ҷ 90 еӨ©пјҲconfig еҸҜиӘҝпјүгҖӮ90 еӨ©еҫҢиғҢжҷҜ GC жӯЈејҸеҲӘйҷӨпјҢemit дёҖеҖӢ billing дәӢд»¶гҖӮ **(2026-04-25)** 1 prod file edit (`backend/routers/tenant_projects.py` +~440 иЎҢ: `@router.post("/tenants/{tid}/projects/{pid}/archive")` + `.../restore` е…©еҖӢ handlerгҖҒ`gc_archived_projects(*, retention_days=None, now_utc=None)` иғҢжҷҜ helperгҖҒ`_resolve_archive_retention_days()` env-resolverгҖҒ3 module-level constants `_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS_ENV="OMNISIGHT_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS"` + `_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS_DEFAULT=90` + `_PROJECT_ARCHIVE_ALLOWED_MEMBERSHIP_ROLES=frozenset({"owner","admin"})`гҖҒ4 SQL constants `_ARCHIVE_PROJECT_SQL` (`SET archived_at = to_char(now() at time zone 'utc', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE вҖҰ AND archived_at IS NULL RETURNING вҖҰ` 12 ж¬„) + `_RESTORE_PROJECT_SQL` (`SET archived_at = NULL WHERE вҖҰ AND archived_at IS NOT NULL RETURNING вҖҰ`) + `_LIST_GC_ELIGIBLE_PROJECTS_SQL` (`WHERE archived_at IS NOT NULL AND archived_at < $1 ORDER BY archived_at ASC, id ASC`) + `_DELETE_PROJECT_SQL` (`DELETE FROM projects WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2`)) + 1 main.py wire-up comment edit (Y4 row 1+2+3 вҶ’ row 1+2+3+4) + 1 ж–° test file (`backend/tests/test_tenant_projects_archive.py` ~870 иЎҢ / 51 tests / 33 PASS pure-unit + ASGI / 18 SKIP no-PG / 51 PASS HTTP-PG bodies + 16 known-infra teardown errors)гҖӮ**Idempotent precondition pattern**: archive `UPDATE вҖҰ WHERE вҖҰ AND archived_at IS NULL` иҲҮ restore `UPDATE вҖҰ WHERE вҖҰ AND archived_at IS NOT NULL` з”Ё SQL еұӨ precondition еҸ–д»Ј handler зҡ„ if-else state жҜ”ијғвҖ”вҖ”RETURNING None дёҖеҫӢе°ҚжҮүгҖҢзӢҖж…Ӣе·ІжҳҜзӣ®жЁҷеҖјгҖҚ(no_change=True 200 + дёҚзҷј audit)гҖҒhandler дёҚйңҖе…Ҳ SELECT еҶҚжұәе®ҡиҰҒдёҚиҰҒ UPDATEгҖҒйҒҝе…Қ SELECT-then-UPDATE TOCTOUгҖӮ404 vs no_change зҡ„еҚҖеҲҶд»Қиө° SELECT FOR UPDATEпјҡcur_row=None вҶ’ 404 (well-formed id but no row in this tenant)гҖҒcur_row еӯҳеңЁдҪҶ RETURNING None вҶ’ 200 no_changeгҖӮ**Idempotent design decision**: жІ’йҒё 409 / 422 гҖҢalready archivedгҖҚжҳҜеӣ зӮә (a) archive жң¬иіӘжҳҜ desired-state ж“ҚдҪңгҖҒ`POST X е…©ж¬Ў = state X` иҲҮ RESTful ж…ЈдҫӢе°ҚйҪҠ (b) UI йӣҷж“ҠжҲ–з¶Іи·ҜйҮҚи©Ұи©Іж”¶ 200 иҖҢйқһ error toast (c) иҲҮ row 3 PATCH зҡ„ no_change=True ж…ЈдҫӢе°ҚйҪҠгҖӮ**90-day retention config**: env knob `OMNISIGHT_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS`гҖҒ`_resolve_archive_retention_days()` per-call и®Җ env (дёҚжҳҜ module-cacheгҖҒoperator з·Ё .env еҫҢйҮҚе•ҹ uvicorn з«ӢеҲ»з”ҹж•ҲгҖҒtests з”Ё monkeypatch.setenv override)гҖҒз©әеҖј / йқһж•ҙж•ё / вүӨ0 дёҖеҫӢ fallback еҲ° 90 дёҰ log warning (best-effort knob дёҚ gate)гҖҒй җиЁӯ 90 еӨ©зІҫзўәеҢ№й…Қ TODO row literalгҖӮ**Background GC helper signature**: `async def gc_archived_projects(*, retention_days: int|None = None, now_utc=None) -> list[dict]` вҖ” е…© kw еҸғж•ёйғҪеҸҜжіЁе…ҘгҖҒ`retention_days=None` иө° env-resolverгҖҒ`now_utc=None` иө° `datetime.utcnow()`пјӣtest з”Ё `retention_days=3` + `_force_archived_at(pool, pid, "5 days ago")` иӯүжҳҺ override и·Ҝеҫ‘гҖҒдёҚйңҖ sleepгҖӮ`retention_days вүӨ 0` иө° `raise ValueError` йҳІ misconfigured cron дёҖйҚөеҲӘе…үжүҖжңү archiveгҖӮ**Cutoff text comparison**: cutoff еңЁ Python з«Ҝз®—жҲҗ `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS"` UTC еӯ—дёІгҖҒSQL з”Ё `archived_at < $1` зҙ”ж–Үеӯ—жҜ”ијғвҖ”вҖ”format жҳҜ lexicographically sortableгҖҒиҲҮ row schema (alembic 0033 `archived_at TEXT`) + create_at еҗҢ format е°ҚйҪҠпјӣдёҚйңҖиҰҒ PG `INTERVAL` з®—иЎ“гҖҒдёҚйңҖиҰҒ timezone иҪүжҸӣ (`archived_at` еҜ«е…ҘжҷӮе·Із¶“ `now() at time zone 'utc'`)гҖҒдёҚйңҖиҰҒ dialect-specific date еҮҪејҸ (и·ҹ main.py `_startup_cleanup` еҗҢжЁЎејҸ)гҖӮ**Per-row delete вү  single transaction**: GC tick дёҚжҠҠжүҖжңү DELETE еҢ…еңЁдёҖеҖӢеӨ§ txn (ж•ёеҚғ row зҡ„и©ұжңғ pin table)гҖҒж”№жҲҗ enumerate вҶ’ loop per-row {transaction(DELETE + audit)}гҖҒconcurrent GC ticks и·Ё worker йӣҷеҲӘеҗҢ row йҖҸйҒҺ `DELETE вҖҰ RETURNING command tag` еҒөжё¬ (loser зңӢеҲ° `"DELETE 0"` skip audit)гҖҒaccuracy з”ұ `DELETE вҖҰ WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2` зҡ„ row identity дҝқиӯү (CASCADE еңЁ `project_members.project_id` ON DELETE CASCADE / `projects.parent_id` ON DELETE SET NULL еңЁ alembic 0033/0034 е·І documented)гҖӮ**Billing event surface**: жІ’ж–°е»ә `billing.emit` жЁЎзө„гҖҒжІҝз”Ёж—ўжңү `audit.log` pipeline зҷј `tenant_project_billing_gc` action вҖ” зҗҶз”ұпјҡ(1) audit chain е·Іжңү tamper-evident + tenant-scoped + time-ordered + queryable + per-tenant еәҸеҲ—еҢ– advisory lockгҖҒ(2) зӯүзңҹжӯЈ billing pipeline иҗҪең°жҷӮ migration жҳҜдёҖжўқ `audit.query(action='tenant_project_billing_gc')` projectionгҖҒ(3) дёҚеј•ж–° module дёҚеј•ж–°иЎЁ дёҚеј•ж–° wheelгҖҒ(4) accountants з«ӢеҲ»еҸҜеңЁ audit_log и·‘ SQL reconcile freed quotaгҖӮAudit row её¶ `tenant_id` + `project_id` + `disk_budget_bytes` + `archived_at` + `retention_days` + `gc_at` 6 ж¬„гҖҒactor=`system:gc`гҖҒentity_kind='project'гҖӮ**GC и·Ё tenant_context иҷ•зҗҶ**: GC helper и·‘еңЁ background (cron / manual ops) жІ’ request contextгҖҒ`db_context._tenant_var` й җиЁӯ NoneгҖҒ`tenant_insert_value()` fallback еҲ° `t-default` жңғжҠҠжүҖжңү billing event и·ҜеҲ°йҢҜ chainгҖӮhelper еңЁ audit.log д№ӢеүҚе…Ҳ `set_tenant_id(tid)` pin еҲ° deleted project зҡ„ tenantгҖҒtry/finally йӮ„еҺҹ prev_tid (иҰҶи“ӢеұӨ nested call дёҚжұЎжҹ“ outer context)гҖҒtest `test_gc_helper_emits_billing_audit_event` зӣҙжҺҘй©—иӯү `audit_log.tenant_id == tid` дёҚжҳҜ 't-default'гҖӮ**RBAC**: жІҝз”Ё row 1/2/3 еҗҢ `_user_can_create_project_in` (super_admin зӣҙйҖҡ / еҗҰеүҮ active membership вҲҲ {owner,admin})гҖҒmember/viewer ж”¶ 403гҖҒarchive иҲҮ restore йӣҷз«Ҝе…ұз”ЁеҗҢдёҖ role gate (test `test_archive_non_admin_member_gets_403` еҗҢжҷӮи·‘е…© endpoint й©—дёҖиҮҙ)гҖӮ**Cross-tenant йҡ”йӣў**: `WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2` defence-in-depth еңЁ archive / restore / GC delete дёүиҷ•йғҪ enforceгҖҒstolen project_id pointed at wrong tenant вҶ’ 404 (defence in depth) + 0 row affected (test `test_archive_cross_tenant_project_returns_404` й©—иӯү tenant A row archived_at д»Қ None)гҖӮ**йҢҜиӘӨзўј**: 200 happy + idempotent (no_change=True) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant or unknown project in this tenant / 422 (malformed tid/pid pattern)гҖӮ**SOP еј·еҲ¶жӘўжҹҘ**: (1) Module-global state зЁҪж ёеҗҲж јзӯ”жЎҲ #1 (3 const + 4 SQL + helper functions йғҪ module-level immutableгҖҒжҜҸ worker еҫһеҗҢжЁЈ source жҺЁе°ҺеҗҢжЁЈеҖјпјӣenv knob per-call и§Јжһҗйқһеҝ«еҸ–) + #2 (DB state иө° PGгҖҒarchive/restore precondition WHERE еәҸеҲ—еҢ–еҗҢ row state ж”№и®ҠгҖҒGC з”Ё row identity еәҸеҲ—еҢ–) + дёҚеј•ж–° in-memory cacheгҖӮ(2) Read-after-write timingпјҡarchive/restore жҳҜе–®жўқ UPDATEвҖҰRETURNING with preconditionгҖҒPG иЎҢйҺ–еәҸеҲ—еҢ–гҖҒRETURNING None unambiguously signalsгҖҢзӢҖж…Ӣ already жҳҜ targetгҖҚгҖҒз„Ўж–° timing-visible regressionпјӣGC дёҚеңЁдәӢеӢҷе…§гҖҒloop per-row delete е®№йҢҜ concurrent GC tickгҖӮ(3) Pre-commit fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` вҶ’ prod file 0 е‘Ҫдёӯ FINGERPRINT-CLEANгҖӮ**Production Readiness Gate**: 0 ж–° wheel (FastAPI / asyncpg ж—ўжңү)гҖҒ0 schema migration (зҙ”и®ҖеҜ«ж—ўжңү alembic 0033 `projects.archived_at` ж¬„)гҖҒж–°еўһ 1 env knob `OMNISIGHT_PROJECT_GC_RETENTION_DAYS` (operator еҸҜйҒёгҖҒдёҚиЁӯ fallback 90гҖҒдёҚеҪұйҹҝ dev/CI й җиЁӯиЎҢзӮә)гҖҒ0 docker changeгҖҒroute е·І mounted зўәиӘҚ `POST default fallback / env override / parametrize 4 invalid fallback / whitespace strip / 4 жўқе…ұ 8 жўқгҖҒ(c) 4 SQL Г— pg-placeholder 4 жўқ + 4 SQL Г— no-secret-leak 4 жўқ + archive precondition `archived_at IS NULL` 1 жўқ + archive tenant-scope 1 жўқ + restore precondition `archived_at IS NOT NULL` 1 жўқ + restore tenant-scope 1 жўқ + GC enumeration cutoff filter 1 жўқ + DELETE tenant-scope 1 жўқ = 14 жўқгҖҒ(d) router е…© endpoint expose 1 жўқ (parametrize 2) + handler depend on auth.current_user 1 жўқ (parametrize 2) = 4 жўқгҖҒ(e) main app full-prefix mount archive + restore 1 жўқ = 1 жўқгҖҒ(f) HTTP 12 жўқ PG-skip (archive happy + sets archived_at + format match / archive idempotent no_change + no audit / restore happy + clears archived_at + persisted / restore idempotent on live + no audit / 404 unknown tenant / 404 unknown project / 404 cross-tenant project + state untouched / 422 malformed tenant / 422 malformed project / 422 malformed restore project / 403 non-admin member archive+restore + state untouched)гҖҒ(g) Audit 2 жўқ PG-skip (archive audit row + secret-leak grep + retention_days еҮәзҸҫ / restore audit row)гҖҒ(h) GC helper 5 жўқ PG-skip (deletes only past-cutoff + recent untouched / leaves live alone with 1d retention / emits billing audit event + tenant_id pinned + retention_days/gc_at еҮәзҸҫ / restore after GC = 404 / retention_days override fires shorter window) + 1 жўқ pure (rejects 0/-1/-90 ValueError parametrize 3 жўқ) = 8 жўқгҖҒ(i) self-fingerprint guard 1 жўқгҖӮ**Pure-unit ancestor 491 PASS / 216 SKIP / 0 FAIL** (test_tenant_projects_archive 51 + membership = no membershipгҖҒдёҚжҺЎдҝЎ `users.role` cacheгҖӮ**Soft-delete via row delete**: alembic 0034 docstring жҳҺж–ҮгҖҢSuspension at the project layer is achieved by deleting the row, which falls + DELETE already_removed) / 403 RBAC / 404 unknown tenant or unknown project in this tenant or unknown project_member row (PATCH only вҖ” DELETE иө° idempotent) / 409 dup (POST only) + `existing_role` зөҰ UI жұәе®ҡ PATCH / DELETE / 422 (malformed tid/pid/uid pattern / unknown role / target user жІ’ tenant membership / target user tenant membership suspended)гҖӮ**Tenant-scoped project lookup**: (user_id, project_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING` дёҖжўқ SQL и§Јжұә insert-or-detect-duplicateгҖҒйҒҝй–Ӣ SELECT-then-INSERT TOCTOUгҖҒе…©еҖӢ admin еҗҢжҷӮ POST еҗҢ target еҝ…жҒ°дёҖеҖӢжҲҗеҠҹ (RETURNING populated) дёҖеҖӢ None (иө° 409 branch + иЈң SELECT ж’Ҳ existing_role)гҖӮPG иӨҮеҗҲ PK `(user_id, project_id)` иҮӘеё¶еәҸеҲ—еҢ–гҖӮ**PATCH no_change short-circuit**: handler жҜ”ијғ `cur_row["role"] == body.role` вҶ’ 200 + no_change=True + дёҚзҷј UPDATE + дёҚзҷј auditгҖҒUI жҠ‘еҲ¶йҮҚиӨҮ toastгҖҒиҲҮ row 3 еҗҢжЁЎејҸгҖӮPATCH зҡ„ RETURNING None branch дёҚеҸҜиғҪдҪҶд»Қ documented (concurrent DELETE вҶ’ 404 + concurrent-mutation hint)гҖӮ**DELETE вҖҰ RETURNING иЈңжҠ“ prior role**: дёҖжўқ DELETE её¶ RETURNING еҗҢжӯҘзөҰ audit blob `before["role"]` + еҚҖеҲҶгҖҢrow already goneгҖҚ(RETURNING None вҶ’ already_removed) vs гҖҢrow зңҹзҡ„иў«еҲӘгҖҚгҖҒдёҚйңҖе…Ҳ SELECTгҖӮ**Audit emission**: 3 action вҖ” `tenant_project_member_added` / `_updated` / `_removed`гҖҒentity_kind='project_member' archive cutoff еҗҢ patternгҖӮ**Atomic ON CONFLICT**: POST з”Ё `INSERT вҖҰ ON CONFLICT (project_id, guest_tenant_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING` дёҖжўқ SQL и§Јжұә insert-or-detect-duplicateгҖҒйҒҝй–Ӣ зөұдёҖз”Ё `llm_budget_tokens` (free=1M / pro=100M / enterprise=1BгҖҒе…ЁйғЁ fit int4 comfortably) вҖ” иҲҮ row 7 ж—ўеӯҳиЁӯиЁҲеҗҢжЁЎејҸ (row 7 жңү 6 еҖӢ disk-based test еӣ зӮәзӣёеҗҢ schema е•ҸйЎҢеҜҰйҡӣдёҠжҳҜ broken еңЁ live PGгҖҒеұ¬ row 7 ж—ўзҹҘ latent bugгҖҒдёҚеңЁ row 8 scope е…§дҝ®)гҖӮoversell guard йӮҸијҜжң¬иә«е°Қ disk иҲҮ llm е…© dimension жҳҜеҗҢдёҖд»Ҫ code pathгҖҒfamily C/E з”Ё LLM ### Y5. Query layer: ContextVar expansion + authorisation middleware (#281)

### Y6. Workspace Hierarchy Refactor + GC + Quota (#282)

жҠҠеүҚйқў audit еҲ—еҮәдҫҶзҡ„жүҖжңү workspace еқ‘пјҲжүҒе№іи·Ҝеҫ‘гҖҒз„Ў tenant еҲҶзө„гҖҒз„Ў GCгҖҒз„Ў quotaгҖҒеҗҢеҗҚ collisionпјүдёҖж¬Ўж”¶жҺүгҖӮ

- [x] ж–°и·Ҝеҫ‘пјҡ`{OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_ROOT}/{tenant_id}/{product_line}/{project_id}/{agent_id}/{repo_url_hash}/` дә”еұӨйҡҺеұӨгҖӮ`repo_url_hash = sha256(remote_url)[:16]` йҳІеҗҢ agent clone еӨҡеҖӢеҗҢеҗҚ repo дә’зӣёиҰҶи“ӢгҖӮ
- [x] `backend/config.py` ж–°еўһпјҡ`OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_ROOT`пјҲй җиЁӯ `./data/workspaces`пјү/ `OMNISIGHT_WORKSPACE_QUOTA_MB_DEFAULT`.
- [x] `backend/workspace.py` ж”№ `provision()` жҺҘеҸ— `tenant_id / product_line / project_id / agent_id / remote_url` дә”еҖӢеҸғж•ёпјҢеҫһ ContextVar й җиЁӯи®ҖеҸ–гҖӮиҲҠ callsite зӣёе®№ shim жЁҷиЁҳ deprecated дёҰиЁҳ logпјҲдёӢеҖӢ release еҲӘпјүгҖӮ
- [x] Migration scriptпјҡжҠҠзҸҫжңү `.agent_workspaces/{agent_id}/` йғҪжҗ¬еҲ° `data/workspaces/t-default/default/default/{agent_id}/legacy-hash/`пјӣдҝқз•ҷ symlink дёҖеҖӢ releaseпјҢд№ӢеҫҢз§»йҷӨгҖӮ
- [x] зҙҚе…Ҙ tenant_quotaпјҡ`backend/tenant_quota.py` зҡ„ `check_hard_quota()` жҠҠ `data/workspaces/{tid}/**` иЁҲе…Ҙ `used_bytes`пјӣworkspace еҜ«е…ҘжҷӮиҮӘеӢ• enforceгҖӮ
- [x] иғҢжҷҜ GC reaperпјҡж–° `backend/workspace_gc.py` async taskпјҲlifespan е•ҹеӢ•пјүпјҢжҜҸ 1 е°ҸжҷӮи·‘дёҖж¬Ўпјҡ
  - жүҫ `mtime > keep_recent_workspaces_stale_days`пјҲconfig й җиЁӯ 30пјүдё”е°ҚжҮү agent е·Ізөҗжқҹзҡ„ workspaceпјҢз§»еҲ° `_trash/` жҡ«еӯҳ 7 еӨ©еҫҢзЎ¬еҲӘгҖӮ

### Y8. Frontend вҖ” Tenant switcher + Project switcher + Admin UI (#284)

I7 е·Із¶“жңү `X-Tenant-Id` header + localStorage prefixгҖӮY8 жҠҠ UI зңҹзҡ„е…ңдёҠдҫҶгҖӮ

- [x] `components/omnisight/tenant-switcher.tsx`пјҡdashboard header дёӢжӢүйҒёе–®еҲ—еҮәз•¶еүҚ user жңү membership зҡ„ tenantsпјӣеҲҮжҸӣжҷӮ `set_tenant_id(tid)` + жё… frontend cache + йҮҚж–°жӢү provider list / workflow listгҖӮ **(2026-04-26)** Y8 row 1 жҳҜгҖҢdashboard header tenant switcher е®Ңж•ҙеҘ‘зҙ„гҖҚд№Ӣ deliverable вҖ” `components/omnisight/tenant-switcher.tsx` е·Іеҫһ row 0 зҡ„ picker-only еҚҮзҙҡзӮә 4 д»¶ side-effect дёҖж¬ЎиҗҪең°пјҡ(a) **list memberships** вҖ” йҖҸйҒҺ `useTenant()` и®Җ `tenants[]`пјҲз”ұ `lib/tenant-context.tsx::TenantProvider` еңЁ mount жҷӮе‘ј `listUserTenants()` еҸ–еҫ— `/auth/tenants` еӣһеӮіпјҢuser жңүе№ҫзӯҶ `user_tenant_memberships` еҲ—е№ҫзӯҶпјӣе–®дёҖ `t-default` дёӢ picker иҮӘеӢ•йҡұи—ҸйҒҝе…Қ noiseпјӣ`authMode=open` / жңӘзҷ»е…Ҙд№ҹйҡұи—Ҹпјү (b) **`set_tenant_id(tid)` ordering йҺ–е®ҡ** вҖ” switchTenant е…Ҳе‘ј `setCurrentTenantId(tid)` зҝ» `lib/api.ts::_currentTenantId` module-globalгҖҒ**жүҚ** notify subscribersпјҢйҖҷжЁЈеҫҢзәҢ refetch е…ЁйғЁиө°ж–° tenant зҡ„ `X-Tenant-Id` headerпјҢдёҚжңғ race header зҝ»иҪүпјӣ (c) **жё… frontend cache** вҖ” switchTenant еҗҢжҷӮе‘ј `setCurrentProjectId(null)` жё… `_currentProjectId`пјҲйҒҝе…ҚеүҚ tenant зҡ„ `X-Project-Id` жјҸеҲ°ж–° tenantпјүпјҢдёҰ bump `tenantChangeEpoch` + fire `onTenantChange(tid)` е…Ё listenerпјӣ`useEngine` listener жҠҠ in-memory stateпјҲagents / tasks / messages / artifacts / simulations / notifications / providerBalancesпјүдёҖж¬Ўжё…з©әпјҲйҒҝе…Қ dashboard зҹӯжҡ«йЎҜзӨәеүҚ tenant зҡ„еҲ—пјүпјӣlocalStorage е·Із”ұ `lib/storage.ts` зҡ„ `omnisight:{tenant}:{user}:` prefix иҮӘеӢ• isolateпјҢдёҚйңҖжүӢеӢ•жё…гҖӮ (d) **йҮҚж–°жӢү provider list / workflow list** вҖ” `app/page.tsx` зҡ„ `refetchProviders` effect жҠҠ `tenantChangeEpoch` еҠ йҖІ dep arrayгҖҒtenant-switch еҫҢз«ӢеҲ» `getProviders()` + `getProviderHealth()`пјӣ`hooks/use-workflows.ts` йҖҸйҒҺ `onTenantChange` listener еңЁ mount-effect е…§жё… `runs` + е‘ј `refresh()`пјӣ`useEngine` йЎҚеӨ–йҮҚж–°жӢү `listAgents` + `listTasks` + `getDashboardSummary` + `getProvidersBalance` жҠҠ 11 йЎҶ dashboard еӯҗжҹҘи©ўдёҖж¬ЎйҮҚ seedгҖӮ**Module-global state зЁҪж ё**пјҡжң¬ row и§ёзў° 3 еҖӢ module-global вҖ” е°ұжңғеңЁжҜҸж—Ҙ 02:00 Asia/Taipei иҲҮ push еҲ° master жҷӮ actively и·‘е®Ңж•ҙ flowпјҲspec е…§д»Қдҝқз•ҷйЎҜејҸ `test.skip(auth_mode==="open", ...)` defense-in-depthпјҢdev еңЁ open-mode backend жң¬ең°и·‘д№ҹеҫ—еҲ°жё…жҷ° skip reasonпјүгҖӮ**8 йҡҺж®ө E2E жөҒзЁӢ**пјҡ(1) и·ійҒҺ open modeпјӣ(2) д»Ҙ super-admin иө° REST еүө 2 tenants (TA, TB) + 2 projects (PA in TA, PB in TB) + 1 invite to fresh email into TAпјӣ(3) еҢҝеҗҚзҖҸиҰҪеҷЁ navigate `/invite/<inv-A-id>.<token>` вҶ’ fill `invite-name-input` + `invite-password-input` вҶ’ click `invite-anon-submit` вҶ’ assert `invite-success-panel` еҮәзҸҫ + `invite-success-headline` еҗ« TA tenant_idпјӣ(4) йҖҸйҒҺ `page.request.post('/api/v1/auth/login', ...)` зҷ»е…Ҙж–° userпјҢcookies иҮӘеӢ•иҗҪеҲ° page contextпјӣ(5) admin REST еҶҚй–Ӣ invite to TB email + invitee иҮӘе·ұ `page.request.post('/api/v1/invites/{id}/accept', {token})` иө° authed еҲҶж”ҜпјҢиҰҶи“Ӣ accept endpoint йӣҷжЁЎ (anon + authed)пјӣ(6) sanity check `/api/v1/auth/tenants` еӣһе…©еҖӢ tenantпјӣ(7) **API еұӨ cross-tenant isolation зЎ¬еә•з·ҡ**пјҡд»Ҙ invitee cookies еҖӢеҲҘ GET `/api/v1/tenants/{TA}/projects` + `/api/v1/tenants/{TB}/projects`пјҢassert еҗ„иҮӘ list еҢ…еҗ«иҮӘе·ұ project дҪҶ **NOT** е°Қж–№ projectпјӣ(8) **UI еұӨе®Ңж•ҙ switcher жөҒ**пјҡ`page.goto('/')` вҶ’ зӯү `tenant-switcher-btn` еҮәзҸҫ вҶ’ й–Ӣ dropdown зўәиӘҚ `tenant-option-${TA}` + `tenant-option-${TB}` е…©еҖӢйҒёй …йғҪеҸҜиҰӢ вҶ’ еҲҮеҲ° TA зўәиӘҚ `project-switcher-static` йЎҜзӨә PA name дё” **NOT** PB name вҶ’ еҲҮеҲ° TB зўәиӘҚ `project-switcher-static` йЎҜзӨә PB name дё” **NOT** PA nameпјҲж ёеҝғгҖҢи·Ё tenant иіҮж–ҷдёҚжҙ©жјҸгҖҚж–·иЁҖпјүвҶ’ еҲҮеӣһ TA зўәиӘҚ PA name йҮҚзҸҫ + PB name ж¶ҲеӨұпјҲйӣҷеҗ‘еҲҮжҸӣйҺ–е®ҡпјүгҖӮ**гҖҢproject artifactгҖҚдёҖеӯ—д№ӢеҰҷ**пјҡrepo жІ’жңүе…¬й–Ӣзҡ„ POST artifact REST checkпјҡ(a) `auth.role_at_least(user.role, "super_admin")` вҶ’ ж°ёйҒ йҖҡйҒҺпјҲcross-tenant forensic readпјү; (b) еҗҰеүҮжҹҘ `user_tenant_memberships` еҸ– `(role, status)`пјҢеҝ…й Ҳ `status='active'` дё” `role вҲҲ {owner, admin}` жүҚйҖҡйҒҺпјҲmirrors Y3 row 2 `_user_can_invite_into` + Y4 row 5 `_user_can_manage_project_members` зҡ„еҗҢдёҖ admin-tier helper еҘ‘зҙ„ вҖ” дёҚжҹҘ legacy `users.role` cacheгҖҒйҒҝе…Қ admin-on-tenant-A и¶Ҡж¬ҠжҹҘ tenant-BпјүгҖӮtenant admin и·Ё tenant жҹҘ вҶ’ 403 + `{detail, tenant_id, your_role, your_home_tenant}`пјӣtenant viewer/member еҚідҫҝжҹҘиҮӘе·ұ tenant д№ҹ 403пјҲи©Ұ row йҺ–жӯ»пјүпјӣsuspended membership еҚідҫҝ role=admin д№ҹ 403пјҲstatus checkпјүгҖӮ**404-vs-403 ordering**пјҡtenant дёҚеӯҳеңЁзҡ„ 404 еңЁ authz йҖҡйҒҺеҫҢжүҚеӣһпјҢжүҖд»Ҙ non-super-admin жҺўд»»ж„Ҹ tid ж°ёйҒ е…Ҳж”¶ 403гҖҒз„Ўжі•з”Ё 404 enumerate е“Әдәӣ tid еӯҳеңЁгҖӮ**Filters**пјҡ`since` / `until` (UNIX ts йӣҷйӮҠй–үеҚҖй–“) / `actor` (exact) / `action` (exact, е°Қ Y9 row 1 зҡ„ `tenant.created` зӯү dot-notation еҗҚдҪң surgical filter) / `entity_kind` (exact) / `cursor` (id еҡҙж је°Ҹж–ј) / `limit` (Pydantic le=500 й»ҳиӘҚ 200)гҖӮ`_build_audit_query_sql(...)` еӢ•ж…Ӣзө„ WHEREпјҢжҜҸеҖӢи®Ҡж•ёд»Қиө° asyncpg `$N` з¶ҒеҸғгҖҒдёҚеӯ—дёІжӢјжҺҘ вҖ” 18 зЁ® filter зө„еҗҲпјҲ2^6 - дёҚй–Ӣ cursor е ҙжҷҜпјҢdrift-test е…Ёи·‘йҒҺпјүжҜҸзЁ®йғҪ `?` cleanгҖҒplaceholder еәҸиҷҹйҖЈзәҢгҖҒжңҖй«ҳ `$N` == slot ж•ёгҖӮ**Pagination** newest-first (`ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT $N`)гҖҒ`next_cursor = items[-1].id if len(items) == limit else null`гҖҒoperator UI з”Ё `cursor=<еүҚй ҒжңҖе°Ҹ id>` зҝ»й ҒгҖӮ**гҖҢWho-queried-whichгҖҚforensic rowпјҲж ёеҝғеҘ‘зҙ„пјү**: жҜҸж¬ЎжҲҗеҠҹ 200 еҫҢеҜ«дёҖжўқ `audit.queried` row йҖІ**иў«жҹҘ tenant зҡ„ chain**пјҲйҖҸйҒҺ ContextVar save-and-restoreпјҢpattern е°Қ mirror `audit_events._emit_single_chain` зҡ„ try/finally йҺ–жӯ»гҖҒexception path д№ҹ restoreпјүвҖ” `entity_kind="tenant"` / `entity_id=<иў«жҹҘ tid>` / `actor=user.email` / `after_json={queried_tenant, queried_by_user_id, queried_by_role, querier_home_tenant, cross_tenant: bool, filters: {since, until, actor, action, entity_kind, cursor, limit}, result_count}`гҖӮиў«жҹҘ tenant зҡ„ audit pane зҙҖйҢ„е·ІиҰӢеҖјпјӣи¶…йҒҺ cap еҫҢж–°еҖјеЎҢжҲҗ sentinel `OTHER_BUCKET="other"`пјӣ`None` / `""` зҹӯи·ҜжҲҗ `UNKNOWN_BUCKET="unknown"` еңЁ cap и©•дј°еүҚпјҢйҒҝе…Қз„Ўжӯёеұ¬дәӢд»¶еҗғе…ү 1пјүгҖӮ`cap_status()` еӣһ `{tenant: {seen, cap}, project: {...}, product_line: {...}}` зөҰ diagnostic + еҗҢжӯҘзөҰж–° gauge `omnisight_metrics_label_cap_used{dimension}` (0..1 fraction зөҰ alert rule)гҖӮ**Backend metrics еҠ  7 еҖӢж–° family** (`backend/metrics.py` real-registry block + `_NoOp` else block + `reset_for_tests()` дёүиҷ•еҗҢжӯҘ)пјҡ`billing_llm_calls_total{tenant_id,project_id,product_line,provider,model}` / `billing_llm_input_tokens_total{...}` / `billing_llm_output_tokens_total{...}` / `billing_llm_cost_usd_total{...}` / `billing_workflow_runs_total{tenant_id,project_id,product_line,workflow_kind,workflow_status}` / `billing_workspace_gb_hours_total{tenant_id,project_id,product_line}` / `metrics_label_cap_used{dimension}`гҖӮ**Wired into 3 production code paths**пјҲиҲҮ Y9 row 3 billing_usage е®Ңе…ЁеҗҢ fan-out й»һпјҢдҪҶиө° in-process Prometheus еўһйҮҸ + bucketпјүпјҡ(a) `record_llm_call(...)` жң«ж®ө sync е‘ј `_publish_llm_metrics`пјҲinput/output tokens зӮә 0 жҷӮдёҚ .inc йҒҝе…Қз©ә series жұЎжҹ“ /metrics ијёеҮәпјү/ (b) `record_workflow_run(...)` жң«ж®ө sync е‘ј `_publish_workflow_metrics` / (c) `record_workspace_gb_hour(...)` жң«ж®ө sync е‘ј `_publish_workspace_gb_hour_metrics`пјҲgb_hours==0 зҹӯи·ҜпјүгҖӮжҜҸеҖӢ publish helper з”Ё `try/except` е…ЁеҢ…пјҢmetric publish еӨұж•—еҸӘ `logger.debug` дёҚеӣһеӮізөҰ emitter дҫҶжәҗпјҲbest-effort и§ҖеҜҹжҖ§пјҢnever жӢ– LLM call/workflow finish/GC sweep зҡ„еҫҢи…ҝпјүгҖӮ**`product_line` resolution at 3 call sites**пјҡ(1) `backend/workspace_gc.py::_list_projects_per_tenant` ж”№еӣһеӮі `{tid: [(product_line, project_id, size_bytes), ...]}` дёүе…ғзө„пјҲж—ўжңүе…©е…ғзө„ sole consumer жҳҜ `_emit_workspace_gb_hour_samples`пјҢеҗҢ commit еҗҢжӯҘжӣҙж–° unpacking + йҖҸеӮі `product_line=` kwarg еҲ° emitterпјҢproduct_line д№ҹеё¶йҖІ metadata_json дҫӣ forensicsпјүпјӣ(2) `backend/workflow.py::finish()` SQL ж”№ `LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = wr.project_id` еӨҡ `SELECT p.product_line`пјҲNULL project_id зҡ„ legacy row + е·І archive зҡ„ project йғҪ LEFT JOIN preservesпјҢproduct_line зӮә NULL жҷӮ bucket жҲҗ "unknown"пјҢдёҚзҲҶ SQLпјүпјӣ(3) `backend/routers/system.py::track_tokens()` LLM callback жІ’ж”№ вҖ” зҸҫйҡҺж®ө product_line жңӘеңЁ LLM з«Ҝ thread йҖІдҫҶпјҢmetrics иө° "unknown" bucketпјҲcontract жҳҜ superset еҸӢе–„пјҡжңӘдҫҶж“ҙ `current_product_line()` ContextVar еҫҢеҸҜйҖІдёҖжӯҘеҲҮзүҮпјүгҖӮ**Provider inference**пјҡж–° `_infer_provider(model)` heuristicпјҲ`claude*`вҶ’`anthropic` / `gpt-*` / `o1-*` / `o3-*` / `o4-*`вҶ’`openai` / `gemini*`вҶ’`google` / `mixtral`/`mistral`вҶ’`mistral` / `llama*`вҶ’`meta` / `test_invite_accept_does_not_consume_auth_lockout_known_design` е·ІиӘ еҜҰйҺ–з•¶еүҚзҚЁз«ӢеҪўзӢҖгҖӮ**Y10 epic зӢҖж…Ӣ**пјҡжң¬ row жҳҜ Y10 epic (#286) з¬¬ 6 д№ҹжҳҜжңҖеҫҢдёҖйЎҶйҒӢзҮҹйқўиҖғи©Ұ вҖ” Y10 epic иҮіжӯӨ **6/6 е…Ёз¶ **пјҲrow 1 1000-task дёҰзҷј / row 2 cross-tenant leak / row 3 Migration idempotency / row 4 Guest tenant share / row 5 Workspace GC race / row 6 Invite lockoutпјүгҖӮи©іиҰӢ HANDOFF.md и©Іж—Ҙжңҹ entryгҖӮ

й җдј°пјҡ**2.5 day**

**Y зёҪй җдј°**пјҡ**27 dayпјҲ~5.5 weekпјү**

**зӣёдҫқ**пјҡI1-I10 вң… / G4 вң… / S0 + K-early вң… / H4a вң…гҖӮз„ЎзЎ¬йҳ»еЎһгҖӮ

**е’Ңе…¶д»– Priority зҡ„д»Ӣйқў**пјҡ
- **TпјҲBillingпјү**пјҡY9 жҸҗдҫӣ `(tenant_id, project_id)` з¶ӯеәҰзөҰ T4 з”ЁйҮҸиҝҪи№ӨпјӣT зҡ„ plan е®ҡзҫ©з”ұ Y1 зҡ„ `tenants.plan` / `projects.plan_override` и®ҖеҸ–гҖӮ
- **LпјҲBootstrap Wizardпјү**пјҡY7 жҸ’дёҖеҖӢж–° wizard stepпјӣдёҚйңҖиҰҒйҮҚеҒҡ L1-L11пјҢеҸӘжҳҜеңЁ L6 finalize еүҚеҠ е…Ҙ Y7гҖӮ
- **VпјҲWorkspace Architectureпјү**пјҡV0-V8 зҡ„ workspace route иҰҒжҺҘ Y8 зҡ„ project switcherпјӣжҜҸеҖӢ workspace run йғҪиҰҒеё¶ `(tenant_id, project_id)` tagгҖӮ
- **MпјҲResource Hard Isolationпјү**пјҡM4 зҡ„ per-tenant иЁҲиІ»еҚҮзҙҡжҲҗ per-project иЁҲиІ»пјӣM2 disk quota зӣҙжҺҘз”Ё Y6 зҡ„ workspace GCгҖӮ
- **S2пјҲSecurity Hardeningпјү**пјҡS2-3 UBA иЎҢзӮәеҲҶжһҗеңЁ Y5 зҡ„ project з¶ӯеәҰдёҠеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҮәгҖҢеҗҢдёҖ user еңЁдёҚеҗҢ project зҡ„иЎҢзӮәз•°еёёгҖҚгҖӮ

**Non-goalsпјҲжҳҺзўәжҺ’йҷӨпјҢдёҚеңЁ Y зҜ„еңҚпјү**пјҡ
- вқҢ SaaS-level white-labelпјҡжҜҸ tenant зҚЁз«Ӣ domain / иҮӘиЁӮе“ҒзүҢ / е®ўиЈҪ SMTP sender domainвҖ”з•ҷзөҰеҫҢзәҢ Priority Z жҲ–зҚЁз«Ӣ vertical еҒҡгҖӮ
- вқҢ Fine-grained ABACпјҲеұ¬жҖ§зҙҡж¬ҠйҷҗпјүпјҡY еҒҡеҲ° role-based е°ұеҒңпјҢдёҚеҒҡгҖҢжҹҗ artifact еҸӘ Alice иғҪзңӢгҖҚйҖҷзЁ® row-level ACLгҖӮ
- вқҢ Tenant-to-tenant billing settlementпјҡguest share зҡ„з”ЁйҮҸиЁҲеңЁ host tenant еёідёҠпјҲдёҖж–№д»ҳиІ»жЁЎеһӢпјүпјҢдёҚеҒҡ revenue-share жӢҶеёігҖӮ
- вқҢ Git server / Gerrit server зҡ„еӨҡз§ҹжҲ¶ provisioningпјҡд»ҚжҳҜ tenant её¶иҮӘе·ұзҡ„ git жҶ‘иӯүйҖЈеҮәеҺ»пјҢдёҚеҒҡ OmniSight иҮӘзҮҹзҡ„ git hostingгҖӮ

---

## рҹ…қ Priority N вҖ” Dependency GovernanceпјҲзӣёдҫқеҘ—д»¶жІ»зҗҶпјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡPython deps (`backend/requirements.txt`) еӨ§йғЁеҲҶ `==` зЎ¬йҺ–пјҢдҪҶ transitive жңӘйҺ–пјӣNode deps (`package.json`) еӨҡзӮә caret `^`пјҢminor/patch иҮӘеӢ•жјӮпјӣ`package-lock.json` иҲҮ `pnpm-lock.yaml` дёҰеӯҳжҳ“еҲҶжӯ§пјӣ`engines` ж¬„дҪҚжңӘиЁӯ вҶ’ дёҚеҗҢй–ӢзҷјиҖ…дёҚеҗҢ Node зүҲжң¬гҖӮй«ҳйўЁйҡӘеӯҗзі»зөұпјҡ**LangChain / LangGraph**пјҲиҝ‘е№ҙжҜҸйҖұдёҖж¬Ў minorгҖҒimport path еёёжҗ¬е®¶пјүгҖҒ**Next.js 16**пјҲApp Router API иҝ‘дёүеҖӢ major жҜҸж¬ЎйғҪ breakingпјүгҖҒ**Pydantic**пјҲv1вҶ’v2 е·Із—ӣйҒҺпјҢv3 еҮәзҸҫжңғеҶҚз—ӣпјүгҖҒ**FastAPI + Starlette + anyio** дёүи§’й—ңдҝӮгҖӮжӯӨ Phase е»әз«ӢеҫһгҖҢйҺ–е®ҡ вҶ’ иҮӘеӢ• PR вҶ’ еҗҲзҙ„жё¬и©Ұ вҶ’ fallback еҲҶж”Ҝ вҶ’ еҚҮзҙҡ runbookгҖҚзҡ„е®Ңж•ҙе ӨеЈ©гҖӮ
>
> **зҸҫеңЁжңҖи©Іе…ҲеҒҡ**пјҡN1 + N2 + N5пјҲ~1.5 dayпјүпјҢе»әжңҖдҪҺйҷҗеәҰе ӨеЈ©пјӣе…¶йӨҳйҡЁй–ӢзҷјзҜҖеҘҸиЈңйҪҠгҖӮ

### N1. е…ЁйҮҸйҺ–е®ҡ + е–®дёҖ lockfile + Node/Python зүҲжң¬еӣәе®ҡ
- [x] `package.json` еҠ  `"engines": {"node": ">=20.17.0 <21", "pnpm": ">=9"}`пјӣrepo root еҠ  `.nvmrc` / `.node-version` еҜ« `20.17.0`
- [x] ж”¶ж–ӮеҲ°е–®дёҖ lockfileпјҡйҒё `pnpm-lock.yaml`пјҢеҲӘ `package-lock.json`пјӣ`.gitignore` жҺ’йҷӨеҸҰдёҖеҖӢпјӣCI жӘўжҹҘ `git status --porcelain | grep -E 'lock\.(json|yaml)$'` еҝ…й Ҳд№ҫж·Ё
- [x] Python е…ЁйҮҸйҺ–пјҡе°Һе…Ҙ `pip-tools`пјҲжҲ– `uv`пјүпјҢ`backend/requirements.in` еҜ«дәәи®ҖзҜ„еңҚ вҶ’ `backend/requirements.txt` з”ұ `pip-compile --generate-hashes` з”ҹеҮәеҗ« transitive hash зҡ„йҺ–жӘ”
- [x] Docker `Dockerfile.backend` ж”№зӮә `pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt`
- [x] CI ж–°еўһ lockfile drift жӘўжҹҘпјҲиӢҘ `requirements.in` жҲ– `package.json` и®ҠеӢ•дҪҶ lock жңӘжӣҙж–° вҶ’ failпјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

### N2. Renovate иҮӘеӢ• PR + group rules + еҲҶеұӨ auto-merge
- [x] `renovate.json` еҹәжң¬ configпјӣжҺ’зЁӢ `every weekend` йҷҚдҪҺйӣңиЁҠ
- [x] Group rulesпјҡ`@radix-ui/*` дёҖзө„пјҲpeer йҖЈеӢ•пјүгҖҒ`@ai-sdk/*` дёҖзө„гҖҒ`langchain*` дёҖзө„гҖҒ`@types/*` дёҖзө„
- [x] еҲҶеұӨ auto-mergeпјҡ
  - patchпјҡCI з¶ иҮӘеӢ•еҗҲпјҲеҗ« securityпјү
  - minorпјҡйңҖ 1 дәәеҜ©
  - majorпјҡе–®зҚЁ PR + 2 дәәеҜ© + еҝ…иө° G3 blue-greenпјҲиҰӢ N10пјү
- [x] Security PR е„Әе…ҲзҙҡжңҖй«ҳгҖҒз«ӢеҚій–Ӣ
- [x] ж–Үд»¶ `docs/ops/renovate_policy.md`
- [O] **Operator-blocked**пјҡеңЁ GitHub Repo Settings е®үиЈқ Renovate AppгҖҒй–Ӣ `Allow auto-merge`гҖҒй…ҚзҪ® branch protectionпјҲminor=1 reviewer / major=2 reviewersпјүвҖ” и©іиҰӢ `docs/ops/renovate_policy.md` "Bootstrap checklist (operator)"
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

### N3. OpenAPI еүҚеҫҢз«ҜеҗҲзҙ„жё¬и©Ұ + иҮӘеӢ•з”ҹеүҚз«Ҝ type
- [x] CI ж–° stepпјҡ`python scripts/dump_openapi.py` вҶ’ `openapi-typescript openapi.json > lib/generated/api-types.ts`пјҲoffline via `app.openapi()` вҖ” дёҚйңҖе•ҹ uvicornпјү
- [x] еүҚз«Ҝ `lib/api.ts` ж”№з”Ёз”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ typeпјӣFastAPI ж”№ schema жҷӮеүҚз«Ҝз·ЁиӯҜжңҹеҚізӮёпјҲ`_N3_ContractProbes` tripwire ж”ҫеңЁ file е°ҫз«Ҝпјү
- [x] `openapi.json` зҙҚе…Ҙ git + snapshot жҜ”е°ҚпјӣPR diff йЎҜзӨә API breaking changeпјҲ`openapi-contract` job вҖ” `git status --porcelain` зӮә CI gateпјү
- [x] еҗҲзҙ„жё¬и©ҰпјҡеүҚз«Ҝ mock з”Ё schema иҮӘеӢ•з”ҹ fixtureпјҲ`msw` + `openapi-msw`пјҢ`test/msw/` дёӢпјү
- [x] ж–Үд»¶ `docs/ops/openapi_contract.md`
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

- [x] `backend/llm_adapter.py`пјҡжүҖжңү `langchain*` / `langgraph*` import йӣҶдёӯжӯӨжӘ”пјӣе…¶д»–жЁЎзө„дёҖеҫӢеҸӘ import `llm_adapter` зҡ„з¬Ұиҷҹ

- [x] жҺғе…Ёе°ҲжЎҲпјҡиӢҘ `backend/**` йҷӨ `llm_adapter.py` еӨ–д»Қжңү `from langchain` вҶ’ CI failпјҲ`scripts/check_llm_adapter_firewall.py` + CI job `llm-adapter-firewall`пјү
- [x] еҚҮ LangChain жҷӮеҸӘйңҖж”№ adapter еұӨ + и·‘ adapter жё¬и©Ұ
- [x] е–®е…ғжё¬и©ҰиҰҶи“Ӣ adapter жүҖжңүе…¬й–Ӣж–№жі•пјҲ`backend/tests/test_llm_adapter.py` вҖ” 50 testsпјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**1 day**

### N5. Nightly Upgrade-Preview CI
- [x] `.github/workflows/upgrade-preview.yml`пјҡcron nightly
  - `pip list --outdated --format=json` + `pnpm outdated --json` з”ўе ұе‘Ҡ
  - и©Ұз®— `pip-compile --upgrade` иҲҮ `pnpm update` зҡ„ diff
  - еңЁйҡ”йӣў container и·‘е®Ңж•ҙжё¬и©ҰеҘ—д»¶пјҲеҗ« E2Eпјү
  - зөҗжһң POST жҲҗ issueпјҲжЁҷ `dependency-preview`пјүпјҢеҢ…еҗ«пјҡoutdated жё…е–®гҖҒи©ҰеҚҮ diffгҖҒжё¬и©ҰзөҗжһңгҖҒз–‘дјј breaking еҘ—д»¶
- [x] дёҚиҮӘеӢ•еҗҲпјҢеҸӘжҸҗеүҚиӯҰзӨәгҖҢжҳҺеӨ©еҗҲ Renovate PR жңғеЈһд»ҖйәјгҖҚ
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

### N6. еҚҮзҙҡ Runbook + Rollback + CVE/EOL зӣЈжҺ§

  - Rollbackпјҡ`git revert` + `docker compose pull <prev-tag>` жӯҘй©ҹ
- [x] CVE жҺғжҸҸпјҡ`osv-scanner` жҲ– Snyk жҜҸж—Ҙи·‘гҖҒеҡҙйҮҚ CVE иҮӘеӢ•й–Ӣ PR
- [x] EOL зӣЈжҺ§пјҡ`scripts/check_eol.py` жҜҸжңҲжҹҘ Python / Node / FastAPI / Next.js е®ҳж–№ EOL scheduleпјҲendoflife.date APIпјүпјҢеү© 6 еҖӢжңҲе…§зҷј warning
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day** е»әзҪ® + жҢҒзәҢз¶ӯиӯ·
- [O] йҰ–е…©жўқзӣ®жЁҷпјҡ`compat/nextjs-15`пјҲзҸҫиҷ• Next 16пјҢ15 жҳҜжңҖиҝ‘ fallbackпјүгҖҒ`compat/pydantic-v2`пјҲжңӘйӣЁз¶ўз№Ҷпјү<!-- 2026-04-16 N9: е®Је‘Ҡ/е·ҘдҪңжөҒзЁӢ/и…іжң¬/SOP е…ЁйғЁе°ұз·’дёҰ commitпјӣжң¬ж©ҹеҲҶж”Ҝз”ұ `bash scripts/fallback_setup.sh` дёҖжўқжҢҮд»Өе»әз«ӢпјҲdry-run е·ІйҖҡйҒҺпјүгҖӮеҜҰйҡӣ `git push -u origin compat/{nextjs-15,pydantic-v2}` йңҖиҰҒ push credentials вҶ’ Operator-blockedпјҢжүҖд»ҘйҖҷй …жЁҷ [O]гҖӮPush е®ҢжҲҗеҫҢ fallback-branches.yml жңғиҮӘеӢ•жҺҘжүӢ weekly cronгҖӮ -->

### N10. еҚҮзҙҡжөҒзЁӢеј·еҲ¶иө° G3 Blue-Green + еҚҮзҙҡзҜҖеҘҸж”ҝзӯ–
- [x] ж”ҝзӯ–еҜ«е…Ҙ `docs/ops/dependency_upgrade_policy.md`пјҡ
  - PatchпјҡйҖұжү№ж¬ЎпјҢCI з¶ иҮӘеӢ•еҗҲ
  - MinorпјҡйӣҷйҖұжү№ж¬ЎпјҢ1 дәәеҜ© + staging 24h и§ҖеҜҹ
  - MajorпјҡеӯЈеәҰпјҢ2 дәәеҜ© + **еҝ…иө° G3 blue-green**пјҲstandby е…ҲеҚҮгҖҒsmoke йҖҡйҒҺжүҚеҲҮжөҒгҖҒиҲҠзүҲдҝқз•ҷ 24h rollbackпјү
  - дёҖеҖӢ PR дёҖеҖӢеҘ—д»¶пјҲжҲ–дёҖзө„еј·зӣёдҫқпјүпјҢдёҚж··еҗҲпјӣдҫҝж–ј single revert
- [x] CI gateпјҡmajor зүҲжң¬иҷҹеҚҮзҙҡзҡ„ PR иҮӘеӢ•еҠ  `requires-blue-green` labelпјҢdeploy workflow жӘўжҹҘи©І label еӯҳеңЁжүҚе…ҒиЁұдёҠ prod<!-- 2026-04-16 N10: `.github/workflows/blue-green-gate.yml` + `scripts/bluegreen_label_decider.py` auto-labelпјӣ`scripts/check_bluegreen_gate.py` жҺҘеҲ° `scripts/deploy.sh` prod-onlyпјӣrequired status check еҗҚзЁұ `N10 / blue-green-label`гҖӮ -->
- [x] иЁҳйҢ„жҜҸж¬Ў major еҚҮзҙҡзҡ„ rollback ж¬Ўж•ёпјҢеӯЈеәҰ review<!-- 2026-04-16 N10: `docs/ops/upgrade_rollback_ledger.md`пјҲappend-onlyпјҢдёүиЎЁпјҡUpgrades / Rollbacks / Quarterly Summariesпјӣtrigger vocabulary е·ІеҲ—еҮәпјүгҖӮ -->
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.25 day**пјҲзҙ”ж–Үд»¶ + CI label gateпјү

**зӣёдҫқ**пјҡN8 иҲҮ G4 з¶ҒгҖҒN10 иҲҮ G3 з¶Ғпјӣе…¶йӨҳеҸҜзҚЁз«ӢжҺЁйҖІгҖӮ

**зёҪй җдј°**пјҡN1 (0.5) + N2 (0.5) + N3 (0.5) + N4 (1) + N5 (0.5) + N6 (0.5) + N7 (0.5) + N8 (0.5) + N9 (0.5) + N10 (0.25) = **~5.25 day**

**е»әиӯ°й ҶеәҸ**пјҡ
- **з«ӢеҚіпјҲA1 дёҠз·ҡеҫҢпјү**пјҡN1 + N2 + N5пјҲ~1.5 dayпјүвҖ” йҺ–е®ҡ + иҮӘеӢ• PR + й җиӯҰ
- **зҹӯжңҹпјҲдёҖеҖӢжңҲе…§пјү**пјҡN3 + N4 + N6пјҲ~2 dayпјүвҖ” еҗҲзҙ„жё¬и©Ұ + LangChain йҳІзҒ«зүҶ + runbook
- **дёӯжңҹпјҲй…ҚеҗҲ G4пјү**пјҡN8пјҲиҲҮ G4 еҗҢжӯҘеҒҡпјү
- **й•·жңҹ**пјҡN7 + N9 + N10пјҲй…ҚеҗҲ G3 дёҠз·ҡеҫҢеҒҡпјү

**й©—ж”¶**пјҡ
- дёүеҖӢжңҲе…§з„ЎгҖҢlockfile drift е°ҺиҮҙ build еЈһгҖҚдәӢд»¶
- LangChain д»»дёҖ major еҚҮзҙҡеҪұйҹҝеғ…йҷҗ `llm_adapter.py` е–®жӘ”
- жҜҸж¬Ў FastAPI schema change еүҚз«Ҝз·ЁиӯҜжңҹеҚізҷјзҸҫ
- Nightly upgrade-preview е№іеқҮжҜҸйҖұжҸҗеүҚжҚ•жҚүиҮіе°‘ 1 еҖӢ breaking change
- Next / Pydantic еҮәзҸҫ breaking еӨ§еҚҮзҙҡжҷӮпјҢfallback еҲҶж”Ҝе·І green еҸҜеҲҮ

## рҹ…һ Priority O вҖ” Enterprise Event-Driven Multi-Agent OrchestrationпјҲдјҒжҘӯзҙҡдәӢд»¶й©…еӢ•жһ¶ж§Ӣпјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡ`docs/design/enterprise-multi-agent-event-driven-architecture.md`пјҲ2026-04-16 ж–°еўһпјүжҸҗеҮәжҠҠ OmniSight еҫһгҖҢе–®зЁӢеәҸ LangGraph + SQLiteгҖҚеҚҮзҙҡзӮәгҖҢOrchestrator Gateway + еҲҶж•ЈејҸ Message Queue + Stateless Worker Pool + Merger AgentгҖҚгҖӮзҸҫиЎҢзі»зөұе·Іе…·еӮҷдәӢд»¶й©…еӢ•еҹәзӨҺпјҲEventBus / SSE / DLQ / event_logпјүгҖҒDAG иҰҸеҠғпјҲ`backend/routers/dag.py`пјүгҖҒworktree йҡ”йӣўпјҲ`backend/workspace.py`пјүгҖҒCODEOWNERS pre-mergeпјҲ`backend/codeowners.py`пјүгҖҒJira/GitHub webhook йӣҷеҗ‘еҗҢжӯҘвҖ”вҖ”жӯӨи·Ҝз·ҡзӣ®жЁҷжҳҜиЈңйҪҠгҖҢж°ҙе№іж“ҙеұ• worker pool + Redis еҲҶж•ЈејҸдә’ж–Ҙ + LLM merge conflict д»ІиЈҒ + CATC payload еҪўејҸеҢ–гҖҚгҖӮ
>
> **еҜ©ж ёж”ҝзӯ–жӣҙж–°пјҲ2026-04-16 з”ЁжҲ¶иЈҒзӨәпјҢиҰҶеҜ« CLAUDE.md L1 еҺҹгҖҢAI жңҖеӨҡ +1гҖҚиҰҸеүҮпјү**пјҡAI agent е…ҒиЁұ**зӣҙжҺҘ commit** дёҰжҺЁйҖҒеҲ° Gerrit code review serverгҖӮжңҖзөӮеҗҲдҪөйҖІ main repo йңҖ**йӣҷз°Ҫ +2**пјҡMerger Agent зөҰ +2пјҲзҜ„еңҚйҷҗгҖҢиЎқзӘҒи§ЈжһҗжӯЈзўәжҖ§гҖҚпјҢдёҚж¶өи“Ӣж–°йӮҸијҜеҜ©ж ёпјү**дё”** дәәе·ҘзөҰ +2пјҢе…©иҖ…еҗҢжҷӮеӯҳеңЁжүҚж”ҫиЎҢгҖӮд»»дёҖж–№жңӘеҲ°йҪҠзҡҶдёҚеҫ— submitгҖӮ
>
> рҹ”’ **дәәе·Ҙ +2 еј·еҲ¶жңҖзөӮж”ҫиЎҢпјҲ2026-04-16 з”ЁжҲ¶иЈҒзӨәиЈңеј·пјү**пјҡ**дёҚи«–жңүеӨҡе°‘еҖӢ AI agentпјҲMerger AgentгҖҒе…¶д»– reviewer botгҖҒжңӘдҫҶж–°еўһзҡ„д»»дҪ•иҮӘеӢ•еҢ– reviewerпјүжҠ• Code-Review: +2пјҢжңҖзөӮдёҖеҫӢеҝ…й Ҳжңүдәәе·Ҙ +2 жүҚиғҪж”ҫиЎҢ submit еҲ°жңҖзөӮ git repoгҖӮд»»дҪ• AI agent зө„еҗҲпјҲNx AI +2пјүйғҪдёҚеҫ—иҮӘиЎҢ submit**гҖӮGerrit submit-rule еҝ…й ҲйЎҜејҸиҰҒжұӮ `Code-Review: +2 from human group (labeled non-ai-reviewer)` еӯҳеңЁпјӣеғ…жңү AI зҘЁз„Ўи«–еӨҡеҜЎпјҢsubmit йғҪжңғиў«жӢ’зө•гҖӮжӯӨиҰҸеүҮзӮә immutable baselineпјҢдёҚеӣ ж–°еўһ AI reviewer ж•ёйҮҸиҖҢж”№и®Ҡй–ҳй–Җжўқд»¶гҖӮ
>
> вҡ пёҸ жӯӨж”ҝзӯ–иҲҮ CLAUDE.md Safety RuleгҖҢAI reviewer max score is +1гҖҚиЎқзӘҒпјҢйңҖеҗҢжӯҘжӣҙж–° L1 иҰҸеүҮпјҲиҰӢ O6 иЁ»иЁҳпјүгҖӮ
>
> ж ёеҝғеғ№еҖјпјҡ(1) дјҒжҘӯйҠ·е”® вҖ” JIRA ж·ұеәҰж•ҙеҗҲжҳҜ B2B зЎ¬йңҖжұӮпјӣ(2) дёҰиЎҢй–Ӣзҷјз—ӣй»һ вҖ” Merger Agent иҮӘеӢ•еҢ–и§Ј merge conflictпјҲдҪҶд»ҚйңҖдәәе·ҘзөӮеҜ©пјүпјӣ(3) з”ўе“ҒеҸҜж“ҙеұ•жҖ§ вҖ” зӘҒз ҙе–® FastAPI зЁӢеәҸз“¶й ёгҖӮ
>
> зӣёдҫқпјҲзЎ¬еүҚзҪ®пјүпјҡ**G4 (Postgres + replica)**гҖҒ**I10 (Redis shared state)**гҖҒ**S0 + K-early (auth baseline)**гҖҒ**M1-M2 (cgroup зЎ¬йҡ”йӣўпјҢе·Іе®ҢжҲҗ)**гҖҒ**B12 + L (bootstrap й…Қ Redis/MQ endpoint)**гҖӮ

- [x] Preemption ж”ҝзӯ–пјҡйҺ–и¶…йҒҺ TTL Г— 2 еҸҜиў«жӣҙй«ҳ priority task жҗ¶дҪ”пјҲжҗӯ DRFпјү
- [x] ж•ҙеҗҲжё¬и©Ұпјҡ3 еҖӢ task з«¶зҲӯ 10 еҖӢ path + heartbeat еӨұж•— + жӯ»йҺ–е ҙжҷҜ

### O6. Merger Agent (#269) вҖ” иЎқзӘҒи§ЈжһҗеҷЁпјҢGerrit patchset ијёеҮә + AI +2 voteпјҲ**дёҚиҮӘеӢ•еҗҲдҪө**пјү
- [x] `backend/merger_agent.py`пјҡspecialized LLM wrapperпјҢsystem prompt еӣәе®ҡзӮәгҖҢеҗҲдҪөиЎқзӘҒи§Јжұәе°Ҳе®¶пјҢдҝқз•ҷйӣҷж–№йӮҸијҜж„Ҹең–пјҢдёҚеҫ—ж–°еўһд»»дҪ•еҺҹжңӘеҮәзҸҫж–јйӣҷж–№ commit зҡ„ж–°йӮҸијҜгҖҚ
- [x] ијёе…Ҙпјҡconflict blockпјҲеҗ« `<<<<<<< HEAD` жЁҷиЁҳпјү+ йӣҷж–№ commit message + жӘ”жЎҲдёҠдёӢж–Ү 20 иЎҢ
- [x] ијёеҮәпјҡresolved patchsetпјҲGerrit-ready `git format-patch` еҪўејҸпјү+ confidence score + rationale + йЎҜејҸ diffпјҲеҸӘйҷҗ conflict еҚҖеЎҠпјҢдёҚж”№е…¶д»–иЎҢпјү
- [x] **Gerrit дә’еӢ•жөҒзЁӢ**пјҲж–°ж”ҝзӯ–ж ёеҝғпјүпјҡ
  - [x] Merger Agent з”ўеҮә resolution вҶ’ `git push HEAD:refs/for/main%topic=merger-PROJ-XXX` жҺЁеҲ° GerritпјҲж–°еўһ patchset еҲ°еҺҹ changeпјү
  - [x] Merger Agent иҮӘеӢ•е‘јеҸ« Gerrit REST `POST /changes/{id}/revisions/{rev}/review` зөҰ **Code-Review: +2**пјҲscope йҷҗгҖҢиЎқзӘҒи§ЈжһҗжӯЈзўәжҖ§гҖҚпјҢcomment иӘӘжҳҺ confidence + rationale + diff зҜ„еңҚпјү
  - [x] **зө•дёҚиҮӘеӢ• submit**вҖ”вҖ”merge еҝ…й Ҳзӯү**дәәе·Ҙ** Code-Review: +2 д№ҹеҲ°йҪҠпјӣ**дёҚи«–е…¶д»– AI reviewerпјҲlint-bot / security-bot / д»»дҪ•жңӘдҫҶж–°еўһзҡ„ AIпјүд№ҹжҠ• +2**пјҢsubmit-rule д»Қеј·еҲ¶иҰҒжұӮдәәе·Ҙ +2 жүҚж”ҫиЎҢпјҲи©іиҰӢ O7 submit-rule group иЁӯиЁҲпјү
  - [O] Merger Agent зҡ„ Gerrit account зӮәе°Ҳеұ¬ `merger-agent-bot`пјҢеҠ е…Ҙ `ai-reviewer-bots` groupпјӣscope йҷҗе®ҡ patchset жҺЁйҖҒиҲҮ Code-Review жҠ•зҘЁпјҲз„Ў Submit ж¬ҠйҷҗгҖҒз„Ўжі•еҠ е…Ҙ `non-ai-reviewer` groupпјүпјҲGerrit дјәжңҚеҷЁз«Ҝ operator иЁӯе®ҡпјӣPython еҜҰдҪңе·Іе°ұз·’пјү
- [x] иҮӘеӢ•еҢ– gateпјҲ**дёҚиҮӘеӢ•еҗҲдҪөпјҢеҸӘжұәе®ҡжҳҜеҗҰзөҰ +2**пјүпјҡ
  - [x] confidence вүҘ 0.9 AND иЎқзӘҒ вүӨ 20 иЎҢ AND е–®жӘ” AND non-security жӘ”жЎҲ вҶ’ Merger +2
  - [x] еҗҰеүҮ вҶ’ Merger еғ…жҺЁ patchset дҪҶ**дёҚжҠ•зҘЁ**пјҲжҲ–зөҰ Code-Review: 0пјү+ SSE е‘ҠиӯҰдәәе·ҘжҺҘжүӢйӣҷ +2
  - [x] д»»дҪ•ж¶үеҸҠ security-sensitive жӘ”жЎҲпјҲauth/ secrets/ config/ CI config/ `.github/workflows/`пјүдёҖеҫӢ**дёҚжҠ•зҘЁ**пјҢдәәе·Ҙй ҲиҮӘе·ұ +2 е…©ж¬ЎжҲ–жӢ’зө•
- [x] еј·еҲ¶ test gateпјҡMerger еңЁжҠ•зҘЁеүҚе…Ҳи·‘еҸ—еҪұйҹҝжЁЎзө„зҡ„ unit testпјҢеӨұж•—еүҮдёҚжҺЁ patchset зӣҙжҺҘ escalate human
- [x] Metricsпјҡ`merger_agent_plus_two_rate` / `merger_agent_confidence_histogram` / `merger_agent_abstain_total` / `merger_agent_security_refusal_total`
- [x] еӨұж•—ж¬Ўж•ё вүҘ 3 и©І change еҒңжӯўиҮӘеӢ•йҮҚи©ҰпјҢescalate humanпјҲжІҝз”Ё CLAUDE.md ruleпјү
- [x] ж•ҙеҗҲжё¬и©Ұпјҡз°Ўе–® conflictпјҲMerger +2 + mock human +2 вҶ’ submitпјүгҖҒжңүжӯ§зҫ© conflictпјҲMerger abstainпјүгҖҒsecurity жӘ”жЎҲпјҲMerger refuseпјүгҖҒtest еӨұж•—пјҲMerger дёҚ pushпјүгҖҒеғ… Merger +2 з„Ўдәәе·Ҙ +2пјҲsubmit-rule жӢ’зө•пјүгҖҒеғ…дәәе·Ҙ +2 з„Ў Merger +2пјҲsubmit-rule жӢ’зө•пјү
- [x] **CLAUDE.md L1 жӣҙж–°**пјҡSafety RulesгҖҢAI reviewer max score is +1гҖҚйңҖиЈңдёҖжўқдҫӢеӨ–жўқж¬ҫвҖ”вҖ”гҖҢMerger Agent ж–јиЎқзӘҒи§Јжһҗ patchset дёҠеҸҜзөҰ +2пјҢдҪҶ scope йҷҗиЎқзӘҒеҚҖеЎҠжӯЈзўәжҖ§пјӣжңҖзөӮ submit д»ҚйңҖдәәе·Ҙ +2 йӣҷз°ҪгҖҚпјӣеҗҰеүҮеҜҰдҪңеҚійҒ•еҸҚ L1 immutable rule
- й җдј°пјҡ**2.5 day**пјҲеҺҹ 2d + 0.5d з”Ёж–ј Gerrit REST ж•ҙеҗҲ + submit-rule жё¬и©Ұпјү

### O7. Gerrit Submit-Rule йӣҷз°Ҫй–ҳ + CI/CD Merge д»ІиЈҒ Pipeline (#270)
- [x] Gerrit `project.config` жӣҙж–° submit-ruleпјҲProlog жҲ– Rules EngineпјүпјҡиҰҒжұӮеҗҢдёҖ change дёҠиҮіе°‘дёҖеҖӢ **Code-Review: +2 from human group (labeled `non-ai-reviewer`)** дё”иҮіе°‘дёҖеҖӢ **Code-Review: +2 from `merger-agent-bot` group**пјӣ**дәәе·Ҙ +2 зӮә hard gate**вҖ”вҖ”дёҚи«–е…¶д»– AI reviewer жҠ•еӨҡе°‘ +2пјҲMerger / lint-bot / security-bot / жңӘдҫҶж–°еўһзҡ„д»»дҪ• AI reviewerпјүпјҢзјәдәәе·Ҙ +2 submit ж°ёйҒ иў«жӢ’зө•пјҲ`.gerrit/rules.pl` + `.gerrit/project.config.example`пјӣPython SSOT mirror `backend/submit_rule.py`пјү

5. **O9 + O10**пјҲ2.5dпјүвҖ” и§Җжё¬жҖ§иҲҮе®үе…ЁеҠ еӣәгҖӮжӯЈејҸе°ҚеӨ–дёҠз·ҡеүҚ gate

## рҹ…Ұ Priority W вҖ” Web Platform VerticalпјҲNext.js / Nuxt.js / еүҚз«Ҝз”ҹж…Ӣпјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡзҸҫиЎҢ C зі»еҲ— platform profiles еҜ«жӯ»еөҢе…ҘејҸ cross-compile еҒҮиЁӯпјҲaarch64/armv7/riscv64 + sysroot + toolchain fileпјүпјҢдҪҶ OmniSight иҮӘиә«е°ұжҳҜ Next.js 16 appвҖ”вҖ”еүҚз«Ҝ pipelineпјҲPlaywright / vitest / eslint / Tailwind / shadcn/uiпјү**е·ІеңЁ repo**пјҢжҳҜдёүжўқж–° vertical дёӯ dogfood жҲҗжң¬жңҖдҪҺгҖҒжңҖеҝ«еҸҜй©—иӯү engine generalizability зҡ„е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
>
> **зӘ„ж•ҙеҗҲзӯ–з•Ҙ**пјҡдёҚеӢ•зҸҫжңү embedded дё»и»ёпјҢеҸӘиЈң web зү№еҢ–зҡ„ profile / simulate track / role skills / deploy adapters / compliance gatesгҖӮPriority O зҡ„ orchestration + worker pool + CATC + йӣҷз°Ҫ +2 е®Ңе…ЁжІҝз”ЁгҖӮ
>
> зӣ®жЁҷпјҡеҫһ NL жҸҸиҝ° вҶ’ иҮӘеӢ•з”ҹжҲҗ Next.js / Nuxt.js / Astro е°ҲжЎҲйӘЁжһ¶ + йғЁзҪІеҲ° Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages / Docker + nginxгҖӮC26 HMI framework зҡ„ constrained generator + bundle budget + security gate pattern еҸҜ 80% еҫ©з”ЁпјҲеҸӘжҳҜ flash budget зҙ„жқҹж”ҫеҜ¬пјүгҖӮ
>
> зӣёдҫқпјҲзЎ¬еүҚзҪ®пјүпјҡ**W0 platform profile schema жіӣеҢ–**пјҲжң¬ Priority е…§еүҚзҪ®пјҢP/X е…ұз”ЁпјүгҖҒ**O0-O3**пјҲCATC + Worker poolпјүгҖҒ**C26 HMI framework**пјҲgenerator pattern еҫ©з”ЁпјүгҖӮ

- [ ] W16.5 **Edit-while-preview live cycle** вҖ” operator гҖҢheader еӨ§дёҖй»һгҖҚвҶ’ agent edits вҶ’ vite HMR иҮӘеӢ• reload preview
- [ ] W16.6 **Vite error in dialogue** вҖ” W15 error и§ёзҷј вҶ’ orchestrator иҮӘеӢ•зҷјиЁҠжҒҜгҖҢжҲ‘зңӢеҲ° X жңү errorпјҢжӯЈеңЁдҝ®...гҖҚдҝ®е®ҢзҷјгҖҢе·Ідҝ® вң“гҖҚ
- [ ] W16.7 **Next-step coaching after preview live** вҖ” preview и·‘иө·дҫҶеҫҢдё»еӢ•е»әиӯ° (a) Vercel deploy / (b) a11y scan / (c) commit+PR / (d) з№јзәҢз·ЁијҜ
- [ ] W16.8 **Reference attachment жҢҒзәҢжҖ§** вҖ” W11/W12/W13 жҠ“зҡ„ spec еӯҳ `.omnisight/`пјҢagent prompt иҮӘеӢ•её¶йҖІ context
- [ ] W16.9 Tests: 5 еҖӢ e2e scenariosпјҲзҙ” URL е…ӢйҡҶ / зҙ” image иЁӯиЁҲ / build intent / edit live / error иҮӘдҝ®пјү
- й җдј°пјҡ**2 day**

**Priority W (W11-W16) зёҪй җдј°**пјҡ**~11 day**пјҲW зі»еҲ—е®Ңж•ҙзүҲ 13.5 + 11 = 24.5dпјү

**Alembic з·Ёиҷҹй җз•ҷ**пјҡ**0059вҖ“0060**пјҲW14.10 з”Ё 0059пјӣ0060 bufferпјү

`adb_screencap_command(*, remote_path="/sdcard/screencap.png", extra_args=())` зҙ” argv builder е°ҚжҮү TODOгҖҢжҲӘең–дҝқз•ҷ adbгҖҚзҡ„жҳҺж–ҮеҘ‘зҙ„пјҲAndroid CLI жҡ«з„ЎжҲӘең– APIпјүгҖӮ`boot_android_emulator` ж”№еҜ«вҖ”вҖ”three-way launch strategyпјҡ(a) `shutil.which("android")` е‘Ҫдёӯ вҶ’ `android emulator start <avd> -no-window -no-audio -no-snapshot` fast pathгҖҒ`launcher_kind="android-cli"` еҜ«йҖІ `detail` и®“ operator еҫһ log дёҖзңјзңӢеҮәиө°е“Әжўқпјӣ(b) йҖҖиҖҢжұӮ `shutil.which("emulator")` + legacy `emulator -avd <name>` pathгҖҒ`launcher_kind="legacy-emulator"`пјӣ(c) е…©иҖ…йғҪжІ’ / жҲ– `adb` дёҚеңЁ PATH вҶ’ `status="mock"`пјҲadb ж°ёйҒ еҝ…иҰҒвҖ”вҖ”boot_completed еҒөжё¬йқ  adb дёҚйқ  emulator wrapperгҖҒйҖҷеҖӢ invariant жҳҜ Android зҡ„ boot protocol жң¬иә«жұәе®ҡзҡ„гҖҒдёҚжҳҜ wrapper йҒёж“ҮпјүгҖӮaction token normalise `strip().lower().replace("_","-")`пјӣз©ә `avd_name` вҶ’ `ValueError`пјҲдёҚи®“ CLI еҚ° usage иӘӨе°Һ ## рҹ…ӣ Priority L вҖ” Bootstrap WizardпјҲдёҖйҚөеҫһж–°ж©ҹеҷЁеҲ°е…¬з¶ІеҸҜз”Ёпјү

>
> зӣ®жЁҷпјҡж–°ж©ҹеҷЁ clone repo вҶ’ `docker compose up` вҶ’ зҖҸиҰҪеҷЁй–Ӣ UI вҶ’ зІҫйқҲеј•е°Һе®ҢжҲҗжүҖжңүй…ҚзҪ® вҶ’ е…¬з¶І HTTPS еҸҜз”ЁпјҢ**е…ЁзЁӢдёҚ SSH дёҚз·ЁијҜ yaml**гҖӮ
>
> зӣёдҫқпјҡ**B12 (CF Tunnel wizard)** жҳҜ Step 3 еҹәзӨҺпјӣ**G1 (readyz)** и®“ Step 4 иғҪзІҫзўәеҲӨж–·гҖҢиө·дҫҶдәҶжІ’гҖҚпјӣ**K1 (must_change_password)** и®“ Step 1 еҜҶзўјй—ңеҚЎжңүеҫҢз«Ҝж”ҜжҸҙгҖӮ
