`bot_user_id` extras all surfaced via `raw` byte-identical / `notion` workspace-scoped no-`expires_in` no-`refresh_token` so both sides вҶ’ `expiresAt=None` `refreshToken=None` / `salesforce` 4 vendor extras (`instance_url` `id` `issued_at` `signature`) / `hubspot` no-`token_type` echo so parser default-fill `"Bearer"` matches between sides / `discord` standard RFC В§5.1 shape) / Family 2 quirk fixtures Г— 5 (`scope_comma` 3-token comma-separated dedupe вҶ’ `["read","write"]` / `scope_list` JSON-array passthrough preserves order / `scope_dedupe` 5-token mixed-comma-space duplicates dedupe to `["read","write","admin"]` / `string_expires_in` `"3600"` JSON-string coercion to number / `zero_expires_in` boundary `expires_in=0` accepted by both sides) / Family 3 negative parity Г— 3 (`error_shape` RFC 6749 В§5.2 вҖ” both raise `TokenResponseError` / `missing_access` no `access_token` field вҖ” both raise / `negative_expires` `expires_in=-1` vendor bug вҖ” both raise / message-string comparison deliberately skipped because Python uses `repr()` and TS uses `JSON.stringify` for description but both error-class names == `TokenResponseError`) / Family 4 aggregate SHA-256 oracle (one hash over all 16 success-fixture parsed shapes вҖ” catches "many-tiny-drifts" failure mode that per-fixture tests can't summarise; `_normalize_numbers` recursive helper coerces integer-valued floats `1700003600.0` вҶ” JS `1700003600` so JSON serialisation byte-identical across `_NOW + expires_in` Python float-add vs JS unified-number arithmetic) / Family 5 catalog-coverage guard (set-diff `ov.ALL_VENDOR_IDS` вҶ” `VENDOR_FIXTURES.keys()` вҖ” fires red if AS.1.6/AS.1.7 add a 12th vendor to catalog without matching parity fixture). **TS execution mechanism**: Node 22+ ships `--experimental-strip-types` (stable in 23+, present in repo's Node 24.14.1 toolchain); test spawns single `node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module --eval=<inline-driver>` subprocess that imports `templates/_shared/oauth-client/index.ts` directly вҖ” **no transpile step / no tsc invocation / no node_modules dependency / no generated build artefact** so test bench is hermetic. Driver script held inline as Python `_NODE_DRIVER` heredoc (parametrized via `%(twin_path)s` JSON-quoted absolute path) reads JSON via `readFileSync(0, "utf-8")` from stdin (16 success + 3 negative fixtures dispatched through `parseTokenResponse` in one batch), emits `{<key>: {ok: true, value: TokenSet} | {ok: false, errorName, message}}` JSON to stdout, exit-0 on driver-internal exception. Session-scoped `ts_parsed_shapes` pytest fixture caches one Node spawn for entire pytest session вҖ” amortises subprocess cost to single invocation across 21 tests. `TZ=UTC` env-pinned to seal any future clock-aware parser branch (none today). `_node_supports_strip_types()` Node-version probe `pytest.skip()` when `node` absent or major < 22; `pathlib.Path` skip when TS twin file absent вҖ” same gating posture as AS.1.2/AS.1.3/AS.1.4 cross-twin tests. **Why this complements AS.1.2 static drift guards**: AS.1.2 SHA-256 over 5 event strings + value-equality on 4 numeric defaults catches *constant* drift; AS.1.5 catches *behavioural* drift (regex change in scope splitter, off-by-one in `expires_at` arithmetic, default-fill divergence on missing `token_type`, dedupe-order regression вҖ” all invisible to source-text-grep oracle). 21 passed locally + zero regression in AS-family run (test_oauth_client + test_oauth_vendors + test_oauth_audit + test_password_generator + test_as_compat_regression: 315 passed + 9 skipped вҖ” exact match to AS.1.4 row baseline). Pre-commit fingerprint grep (`_conn()` / `await conn.commit()` / `datetime('now')` / `VALUES (?,...)`) 0 е‘Ҫдёӯ. Module-global state audit per SOP В§1: fixtures are module-level `Mapping[str, Mapping[str, Any]]` literals containing only immutable scalars / nested immutable dicts (deterministic-by-construction across pytest workers вҖ” answer #1); cache lives on session-scoped pytest fixture (pytest manages lifecycle per worker); zero DB / network / env reads at import time. **Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-inactive once AS.6.1 wires `/api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider}/login` + `/callback` HTTP endpoints (this drift guard already runs in CI; new vendor additions in AS.1.6/AS.1.7 fail-fast via Family 5 catalog-coverage guard until matching fixture lands).

contract / default key_version on row INSERT omitting the column matches `KEY_VERSION_CURRENT` so caller can rely on column DEFAULT without UnknownKeyVersionError on read-back) / migrator drift guard (`oauth_tokens` in `TABLES_IN_ORDER` / NOT in `TABLES_WITH_IDENTITY_ID` since composite TEXT PK / replays AFTER `users`)). WHERE user_id=? AND provider=? AND version=old_version`). `deployed-active` requires AS.6.1 OAuth router (separate row) actually invoking the hook on each provider API call. `vault_failure` extra hook-side outcome вҖ” collapses onto `revocation_failed` in audit since AS.1.4 only ships 3 unlink outcomes) / `ALL_OUTCOMES` ordered tuple covers all 4 / 2 `TRIGGER_*` constants `TRIGGER_USER_UNLINK="user_unlink"` (Settings вҶ’ Disconnect voluntary path) + `TRIGGER_DSAR_ERASURE="dsar_erasure"` (regulatory operator-driven path) / `REVOKE_TRIGGERS=frozenset({user_unlink, dsar_erasure})` disjoint from `oauth_audit.ROTATION_TRIGGERS` (cross-vocab collisionйҳІиӯ·) / `revoke_record(record, revoke_fn, *, revocation_endpoint, trigger="user_unlink", actor=None, emit_audit=True) -> RevokeOutcome` 6-step lifecycle: (1) trigger validate (2) `revocation_endpoint is None OR revoke_fn is None OR endpoint==""` зҹӯи·Ҝ SUCCESS-skipped + audit reflects no-attempt (vendors-without-endpoint path: GitHub / MS / Bitbucket / Notion / HubSpot 5 vendors per AS.1.3 catalog) (3) `_choose_token` еҒҸеҘҪ refresh > access (RFC 7009 В§2.1 + OAuth 2.1 BCP В§4.13: revoking refresh kills entire grant tree); empty record вҶ’ SUCCESS-skipped (4) `token_vault.decrypt_for_user` `TokenVaultError` вҶ’ OUTCOME_VAULT_FAILURE + audit collapses onto `revocation_failed` with `error="vault:<class>"` for grep selectivity (catches DB row-swap / unknown-key-version / corrupted-ciphertext) (5) `await revoke_fn(plaintext, hint)` д»»дҪ• exception вҶ’ OUTCOME_REVOCATION_FAILED + audit + `error` truncated 500 chars (chain-row bloat йҳІиӯ·) (6) success вҶ’ OUTCOME_SUCCESS + audit emits unlink success with `revocation_attempted=True` + `revocation_outcome="success"` / `emit_not_linked(*, user_id, provider, trigger, actor, emit_audit) -> RevokeOutcome` helper for caller's "no oauth_tokens row" branch вҖ” DSAR right-to-erasure compliance иҰҒжұӮ audit chain иЁҳйҢ„жҜҸеҖӢ erasure attempt еҢ…жӢ¬гҖҢз„Ў row еҸҜеҲӘгҖҚ(emits `oauth.unlink` outcome=`not_linked` дёҚзў° vault / IdP) / `RevokeCallable = Callable[[str, Optional[str]], Awaitable[None]]` async callable accepts `(token_plaintext, token_type_hint)` per RFC 7009 В§2.1 / `is_enabled()` thin re-export of `oauth_client.is_enabled` зөҰ caller-facing gate symmetry вҖ” pure helpers (`revoke_record` / `emit_not_linked`) deliberately do NOT auto-gate per AS.0.4 В§6.2 (DSAR еҝ…й ҲеңЁ OAuth feature flag й—ңй–үжҷӮд№ҹи·‘еҫ—иө· вҖ” regulatory deadline дёҚзӯү feature flag; audit silent-skip з”ұ `oauth_audit._gate` з®Ў) / **Actor defaulting**: caller жІ’еӮі actor вҶ’ `user_unlink` defaults to `record.user_id` (з”ЁжҲ¶иҮӘе·ұ) / `dsar_erasure` defaults to `f"dsar:{record.user_id}"` (operator-as-actor convention; `auth.oauth_connect` (outcome `connected`/`relinked` + scope + is_account_link) + `auth.login_success` (auth_method=`oauth`, provider, mfa_satisfied=False, ip+user_agent fingerprinted) on success / Settings fields** at `backend/config.py` вҖ” `oauth_{google,github,microsoft,apple}_client_id` + `..._client_secret` (8) + `oauth_redirect_base_url` (vendor-pinned callback URL precedence over X-Forwarded-Host fallback) + `oauth_flow_signing_key` (HMAC-SHA256 cookie signing key вҖ” falls back to `decision_bearer` SHA-256 derived if empty so existing prod deployments don't need a new env var). Read-after-write timing audit per SOP В§1: N/A вҖ” per-user-agent flow has no shared mutable state crossing request boundaries; `users` row create + link writes share a single `get_pool().acquire()` conn so the lookupвҶ’linkвҶ’create chain is naturally row-locked + the `users.email` UNIQUE index is the final guard against concurrent duplicate signups. `MFA_METHOD_{TOTP,BACKUP_CODE,WEBAUTHN}` byte-equal OmniSight MFA challenge handler labels + `SUPPORTED_MFA_METHODS` frozenset / `_build_mfa_method_to_auth_method()` returns frozen `MappingProxyType` table mapping the 3 MFA labels onto AS.5.1 `auth_event.AUTH_METHODS` vocabulary (totp + backup_code вҶ’ `AUTH_METHOD_MFA_TOTP` / webauthn вҶ’ `AUTH_METHOD_MFA_WEBAUTHN`) + `mfa_method_to_auth_method(label)` dispatch raises `ValueError` on unknown / 2 request-extraction helpers `request_client_ip(request)` (Cloudflare `cf-connecting-ip` precedence over `request.client.host` matches AS.6.1 `_client_key`) + `request_user_agent(request)` (None-on-missing / shim-friendly) / 4 async best-effort emit helpers вҖ” `emit_login_success_event(*, user_id, request=, auth_method=PASSWORD, provider=, mfa_satisfied=False, actor=)` / `emit_login_fail_event(*, attempted_user, fail_reason, request=, auth_method=PASSWORD, provider=, actor="anonymous")` / `emit_token_refresh_event(*, user_id, provider, outcome, new_expires_in_seconds=, actor=)` / `emit_token_rotated_event(*, user_id, provider, previous_refresh_token, new_refresh_token, triggered_by, actor=)` вҖ” each routes through the AS.5.1 `auth_event.emit_*` family + swallows underlying audit-layer exceptions (returns `None`) so a chain-append failure can't break the OmniSight handler / 2 fire-and-forget schedule helpers `schedule_login_success_event(...)` + `schedule_login_fail_event(...)` (AS.6.1 OAuth-callback-style for response paths that must not block) вҖ” uses `asyncio.get_running_loop()` + `loop.create_task` (avoids the bare `asyncio.ensure_future` in sync contexts which silently spawns a fresh loop and leaks the task at interpreter exit). **HTTP wiring**: `backend/routers/auth.py` `POST /auth/login` extended with 6 dual-emit sites вҖ” (a) `_check_login_rate_limit` 429 вҶ’ AS.5.1 `auth.login_fail` reason=`rate_limited` (b) `ip_limiter` 429 вҶ’ reason=`rate_limited` (c) `email_limiter` 429 вҶ’ reason=`rate_limited` (d) account-locked 423 вҶ’ reason=`account_locked` (e) bad-credentials 401 вҶ’ reason=`bad_password` + a second emit if the failed attempt tipped the lockout threshold (reason=`account_locked`) (f) MFA-required short-circuit вҶ’ reason=`mfa_required` + (g) successful login вҶ’ AS.5.1 `auth.login_success` with `auth_method=password mfa_satisfied=False`. `backend/routers/mfa.py` extended with 4 dual-emit sites вҖ” `POST /auth/mfa/challenge` invalid TOTP/backup-code вҶ’ AS.5.1 `auth.login_fail` reason=`mfa_failed auth_method=mfa_totp` + successful TOTP/backup-code вҶ’ `auth.login_success` `auth_method=mfa_totp mfa_satisfied=True`; `POST /auth/mfa/webauthn/challenge/complete` invalid вҶ’ `auth.login_fail` reason=`mfa_failed auth_method=mfa_webauthn` + successful вҶ’ `auth.login_success` `auth_method=mfa_webauthn mfa_satisfied=True`. `backend/security/oauth_refresh_hook.py` `_emit_refresh_audit` extended to fan AS.5.1 `auth.token_refresh` rollup alongside the existing AS.1.4 forensic `oauth.refresh` (covers all 4 outcomes: success / no_refresh_token / provider_error / vault_failure вҶ’ the latter collapses onto provider_error in both vocabularies) + `refresh_record` rotated-success path extended to fan AS.5.1 `auth.token_rotated` rollup alongside AS.1.4 forensic `oauth.token_rotated`. **AS.6.1 OAuth callback** (`/auth/oauth/{provider}/callback`) was already wired through AS.5.1 directly via inline `_aevent.emit_oauth_connect` / `emit_login_success` / `emit_login_fail` calls (AS.6.1 row); no change needed in this row вҖ” that wiring is the precedent the AS.6.5 bridge follows. **Dual-emit additive contract**: legacy `login_ok` / `auth.login.fail` / `auth.lockout` / `mfa.challenge.passed` / `password_changed` audit rows stay where they are вҖ” the AS.5.1 rollup is fired ALONGSIDE per AS.6.1 precedent. fires the coroutine after `await asyncio.sleep(0)` Г— 2). 44 passed. Existing `test_oauth_refresh_hook.py` updated for AS.6.5 dual-emit вҖ” `test_refresh_record_no_refresh_token_emits_audit` + `test_refresh_record_provider_exception_returns_provider_error` + `test_refresh_record_vault_binding_mismatch_returns_vault_failure` now assert BOTH the AS.1.4 forensic `oauth.refresh` row AND the AS.5.1 `auth.token_refresh` rollup are emitted with byte-equal `outcome` values (forensic captures `error` + `granted_scope` for the I8 chain; rollup captures the dashboard-visible outcome + `new_expires_in_seconds`); `test_refresh_record_knob_off_helper_runs_audit_silent_skip` updated to ALSO patch `auth_event.is_enabled` alongside `oauth_client.is_enabled` (both gates trace back to AS.0.8 `settings.as_enabled` single knob). Module-global state audit per SOP В§1: 0 mutable container at module level вҖ” `MappingProxyType` table built lazily by `_build_mfa_method_to_auth_method()` on first call; constants are immutable strings + frozensets; functions are pure routing layers; no DB connection at module level. `auth_event.is_enabled` lazy-imports `settings` per call so each uvicorn worker reads same env source = answer #1 (deterministic-by-construction across workers). Read-after-write timing audit per SOP В§1: N/A вҖ” bridge is a pure routing layer; the underlying `audit.log` chain serialises chain appends via `pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('audit-chain-' || tenant_id))` per-tenant inside `conn.transaction()` so two concurrent emitters in the same tenant cannot interleave their chain rows. AS-family run (test_auth_audit_bridge + test_auth_event + test_auth_event_shape_drift + test_auth_dashboard + test_auth_dashboard_shape_drift + test_oauth_refresh_hook + test_oauth_audit + test_oauth_client + test_oauth_login_handler + test_turnstile_form_verifier + test_honeypot_form_verifier + test_bot_challenge + test_bot_challenge_shape_drift + test_honeypot + test_honeypot_shape_drift + test_token_vault + test_credential_vault + test_password_generator + test_account_linking_helper + test_auth + test_auth_baseline + test_oauth_revoke) **1338 passed + 26 skipped + 6 pre-existing failures unrelated** (3 in test_oauth_login_handler.py + 3 in test_oauth_revoke.py вҖ” confirmed via baseline reproducer at /tmp/baseline-check matching exactly the same 6-failure set on master without my changes; failures pass when each test file runs in isolation; not AS.6.5-introduced вҖ” same documented test-order pollution pattern as AS.6.1 / AS.6.2 / AS.6.3 / AS.6.4 baselines). The AS.5.1 rollup events fire automatically alongside the existing legacy audit rows once the operator deploys the new `routers/auth.py` + `routers/mfa.py` + `oauth_refresh_hook.py` build to production. `deployed-active` waits for first real OmniSight prod login + first `auth.login_success` audit row hitting the AS.5.2 dashboard (zero operator config required вҖ” happens on first user login post-deploy). Phase to `deployed-observed` on вүҘ 24h observation window with no regression in legacy `login_ok` row count + no AS.5.1 emit-failure log spike. **AS.6 epic complete 5/5 вң…**пјҲAS.6.1 OAuth handler вң… / AS.6.2 credential vault expand вң… / AS.6.3 Turnstile backend verify вң… / AS.6.4 honeypot вң… / AS.6.5 audit log integration вң…пјү.

breach-check: HIBP constants pinned + sha1HexUpper 2 known fixtures (`P@ssw0rd` and empty string) + parseHibpRangeBody 5-row matrix + breachCount 6-status matrix (skipped/ok/breached/unknown-non-2xx/unknown-throw/unknown-no-fetch) ; Read-after-write timing audit: each mutation is followed by a fresh local-state update so the wizard cascade matches what the user just confirmed (no parallelisation change vs existing auth-context). **Production status: dev-only.** Next gate: deployed-active once operator deploys the next image and walks through `/onboarding` once вҖ” pure frontend behaviour, zero operator config required (the 3 input steps all use existing endpoints: `adminPatchTenant` from Y2 #278 + `createTenantProject` from Y8 row 2 + localStorage for the profile display name; no new backend endpoint required for the visual layer to ship); `deployed-active` is first user walking through `/onboarding` end-to-end on a fresh tenant. ## рҹ…•рҹ…ў Priority FS вҖ” Full-Stack Web Application GenerationпјҲиЈңе®Ң W зі»еҲ—еҫҢз«ҜзјәеҸЈпјү

> **иғҢжҷҜ**пјҡW11-W16 + W зі»еҲ—еҒҡе®ҢеҫҢд»ҚеҸӘиҰҶи“ӢеүҚз«Ҝ + йқңж…ӢйғЁзҪІгҖӮSaaS зҙҡгҖҢDB / Auth provisioning / Object storage / Email / Background jobs / Search / BillingгҖҚж•ҙеҗҲиҮӘеӢ•еҢ–жҳҜ generated app **production-ready** зҡ„жңҖеҫҢдёҖе“©гҖӮFS жҠҠйҖҷжўқиЈңе®ҢгҖӮ
>
> **иЁӯиЁҲж ёеҝғ**пјҡ
> 1. **Reuse AS lib** вҖ” FS.2 inbound auth + FS.2b outbound OAuth + д»»дҪ• form зҡ„ Turnstile е…Ё reuse `Priority AS` зҡ„ libпјҲйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚиӨҮеҜҰдҪң + йҒҝе…Қ driftпјү
> 2. **Provider-agnostic adapter pattern** вҖ” еҗҢ BS catalog иЁӯиЁҲпјҢper-domain еӨҡ provider жҠҪиұЎд»ӢйқўпјҲDB / email / search зӯүпјү
> 3. **Vendor lock-in йўЁйҡӘжҸӯйңІ** вҖ” жҜҸеҖӢж•ҙеҗҲеңЁ PEP HOLD йЎҜзӨә lock-in levelпјҲlow / medium / highпјүпјҢеҚ”еҠ© operator еҲӨж–·
>
> **жҺ’зЁӢ**пјҡW11-W16 + AS д№ӢеҫҢ
>

## рҹ…ўрҹ…’ Priority SC вҖ” Security Compliance for Generated AppsпјҲOWASP / SAST / DAST / Bot йҳІзҰҰ / жі•иҰҸпјү

> **иғҢжҷҜ**пјҡW + FS е®ҢжҲҗеҫҢ generated app еҠҹиғҪе®Ңж•ҙгҖҒдҪҶ**иіҮе®үиҮӘеӢ•еҢ–иҰҶи“ӢзҺҮд»ҚеҸӘ ~50%**пјҲзјә SAST / DAST / SCA / е®үе…Ё headers / OWASP mitigation / жі•иҰҸ jurisdictionпјүгҖӮSC жҠҠйҖҷжўқиЈңеҲ° ~85%пјҲHIPAA / PCI DSS / SOC2 д»ҚйңҖ human auditorпјҢдҪҶжүҖжңүжҠҖиЎ“жҺ§еҲ¶ 90%+ иҮӘеӢ•пјүгҖӮ
>
> **иЁӯиЁҲж ёеҝғ**пјҡ
> 1. **Reuse AS bot challenge lib** вҖ” SC.13 дёҚйҮҚеҒҡ Turnstile / reCAPTCHA / hCaptcha ж•ҙеҗҲпјҢзӣҙжҺҘз”Ё AS.3
> 2. **Per-jurisdiction жі•иҰҸжЁЎжқҝ** вҖ” GDPR / CCPA / PIPL / LGPD / PIPEDA дә”еҖӢдё»жөҒең°еҚҖиҮӘеӢ•з”ҹ privacy notice + DSAR workflow
> 3. **Defense-in-depth scanning** вҖ” SAST + DAST + SCA + Container + Secret + IaC е…ӯзЁ® scanner ж•ҙеҗҲпјҲдёҚе…Ёз”Ё vendor SaaSгҖҒжңү OSS жӣҝд»Јпјү
>
> **жҺ’зЁӢ**пјҡFS д№ӢеҫҢ
>
> **Alembic з·Ёиҷҹй җз•ҷ**пјҡ**0064вҖ“0065**
>
> **зёҪзҜ„еңҚ**пјҡ**~13.5 day**пјҲSC.13 еӣ  reuse AS е·Іеҫһ 1.5d зё®жҲҗ 0.5dпјү

## рҹ“Ҡ W зі»еҲ—ж“ҙе…… + AS / FS / SC ж•ҙй«” Roadmap жҰӮиҰҪ

| Phase | зҜ„еңҚ | й җдј° | зҙҜиЁҲ | дё»иҰҒзӣёдҫқ |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Y е®Ңе·ҘпјҲйҖІиЎҢдёӯпјү | Multi-tenant + Y6 workspace + Y8 frontend | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| BS | Bootstrap & Catalog | 10d | 10d | Y |
| W11-W16 | Lovable ж•ҙеҗҲпјҲе…ӢйҡҶ / е“ҒзүҢ / жҲӘең– / й җиҰҪ / иҮӘдҝ® / е°Қи©ұ UXпјү | 11d | 21d | BS.4 + B12 |
| **AS** | **Auth & Security shared library + 8 й Ғжө®иӘҮ UI** | **22d** | **43d** | BS.3 + R20 Phase 0 |
| FS | Full-stack generationпјҲеҗ« reuse ASпјү | 12d | 55d | AS |
| SC | Security complianceпјҲеҗ« reuse ASпјү | 13.5d | 68.5d | FS + AS |
| BP | Architecture deep work | ~5.5w | ~16w | вҖ” |

**е№іиЎҢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§**пјҡAS и·ҹ W11-W16 е…©жўқ track е®Ңе…ЁзҚЁз«ӢгҖҒеҸҜе№іиЎҢпјҲmax(11d, 22d) = 22d wall timeгҖҒзңҒ 11dпјүгҖӮ

## рҹ“… Post-BS жҺ’зЁӢеҒҸеҘҪпјҲOperator confirmed 2026-04-27пјү

> Operator еҒҸеҘҪпјҡ**е–® track й җиЁӯиө°и·Ҝз·ҡ (b)пјҢAS е…Ҳ**пјӣиӢҘжңүйЎҚеӨ– capacity еҸҜе№іиЎҢжүҚеҚҮзҙҡеҲ°и·Ҝз·ҡ (a) йӣҷ trackгҖӮ

### рҹҹў Primary path вҖ”вҖ” и·Ҝз·ҡ (b) е–® trackпјҢAS е…ҲпјҲproduction hygiene е„Әе…Ҳпјү

```
BSпјҲе·Іе®Ңе·ҘпјүвҶ’ AS (~22d) вҶ’ W11-W16 (~11d) вҶ’ FS (~12d) вҶ’ SC (~13.5d) вҶ’ BP (~5.5w)

е–® track wall time: 22 + 11 + 12 + 13.5 + 38 = ~96.5d (~14 йҖұ)
```

**йҒёжӯӨи·Ҝз·ҡзҡ„ rationale**пјҡ
1. **Production hygiene > feature add** вҖ” production е·ІдёҠз·ҡгҖҒжңүзңҹеҜҰ userпјҢcredential ad-hoc еҜҰдҪңпјҲж—ўжңү git_credentials / Phase 5b LLM credentialsпјүжҳҜ tech debt зҙҜз©Қдёӯ
2. **AS жҳҜ FS+SC зҡ„ hard еүҚзҪ®** вҖ” AS е…ҲеҒҡгҖҒеҫҢзәҢ FS / SC еҸҜз«ӢеҲ»жҺҘгҖҒдёҚжңғ idle
3. **AS.6 dogfood + AS.7 жө®иӘҮ UI** вҖ” е°ҚжүҖжңү operator з«ӢеҲ»еҸҜж„ҹзҡ„ first-impression upgradeпјҢдёҚйҷҗи“Ӣз¶Із«ҷиҖ…
4. **W11-W16 жҳҜ feature-addпјҢжғ еҸҠеӯҗйӣҶ**пјҲи“Ӣз¶Із«ҷзҡ„ verticalпјүпјҢдёҚжҳҜжүҖжңү operator еҝ…иҰҒ

### рҹҹЎ Alternative path вҖ”вҖ” и·Ҝз·ҡ (a) йӣҷ / дёү track е№іиЎҢпјҲжңүйЎҚеӨ– capacity жүҚиө°пјү

еҚҮзҙҡжўқд»¶пјҡ**зўәиӘҚжңүйЎҚеӨ– dev capacity**пјҲеӨҡдёҖжўқ AI agent track / з¬¬дәҢдәәжүӢ / е…¶д»– idle жҷӮж®өпјүжүҚиҖғж…®еҚҮзҙҡгҖӮ

```
                          в”Ңв”Җ Track A еҫҢз«Ҝ lib + integration в”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ   AS.0 вҶ’ 1 вҶ’ 2 вҶ’ 3-5 вҶ’ 6 вҶ’        в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   W14 backend + W15 plugin вҶ’ AS.8  в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   (~10d)                          в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
BSпјҲе®Ңе·ҘпјүвҶ’               в”Ңв”Җ Track B еүҚз«Ҝ auth UI/UX жө®иӘҮ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ вҶ’ FS вҶ’ SC вҶ’ BP
                          в”Ӯ   AS.7.0 visual foundation вҶ’       в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   AS.7.1 вҶ’ 7.2 (slot machine) вҶ’    в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   7.3-7.8 (еҗ« 8 иҰ–иҰәеұӨ)             в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   (~14d)                          в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          в”Ңв”Җ Track C web vertical в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ   W12+W13 вҶ’ W11 вҶ’ W14 frontend вҶ’   в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   W16 ж•ҙеҗҲ (~11d)                  в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          
                          вҶ’ Wall time max(10, 14, 11) = ~14d
                          вҶ’ жҜ”е–® track 22d зңҒ 8d wall time

йӣҷ/дёү track wall time: 14 + 12 + 13.5 + 38 = ~77d (~11 йҖұ)
```

**еҚҮзҙҡжҷӮзҡ„еҗҢжӯҘй»һ**пјҲеҝ…й Ҳе°ҚйҪҠжүҚиғҪеҫҖдёӢпјүпјҡ
- еҗҢжӯҘй»һ 1пјҡ**AS.6 ship еҫҢ** вҶ’ Track B AS.7 жүҚиғҪжҺҘзңҹеҜҰ endpointпјҲд№ӢеүҚ Track B з”Ё mockпјү
- еҗҢжӯҘй»һ 2пјҡ**W14 backend (Track A) + AS.7.0 motion foundation (Track B) ship еҫҢ** вҶ’ Track C W14 frontend жүҚиғҪзө„иЈқ
- еҗҢжӯҘй»һ 3пјҡ**жүҖжңү track ж”¶е°ҫеҫҢ** вҶ’ дёҖиө·йҖІ FS

**3 track жҳҜ sweet spotпјҢ4+ track дёҚеҶҚзё®зҹӯ** вҖ” еӣ зӮә AS.7 / W16 frontend йғҪжҳҜеҗҢеҖӢ React е…ғд»¶жЁ№пјҢе№іиЎҢеҜ« merge conflict еӨ§ж–јеўһйҮҸйҖҹеәҰгҖӮ

### еҲҮжҸӣиҰҸеүҮ

- **й җиЁӯиө°и·Ҝз·ҡ (b)**пјҡжҜҸж¬Ўж–° sprint й–Ӣе§ӢеүҚдёҚдё»еӢ•иҖғж…®е№іиЎҢ
- **жӘўиҰ– capacity и§ёзҷјеҚҮзҙҡеҲ° (a)**пјҡд»ҘдёӢд»»дёҖзҷјз”ҹжүҚеҚҮзҙҡ
  - йЎҚеӨ– AI agent track йҖІе ҙпјҲAgent-software-beta д№ӢеӨ–пјү
  - operator иҮӘиә«жңү idle жҷӮж®өпјҲжҜҸйҖұ > 4 е°ҸжҷӮпјү
  - дёҠжёё BS иҗҪең°з”ўз”ҹ schedule slackпјҲBS жҸҗж—©е®Ңе·Ҙпјү
  - **OR** жңүжҳҺзўә demo / sales pitch deadline йңҖиҰҒ W11-W16 жҸҗж—© ship
- **еҚҮзҙҡдёҚеҸҜйҖҶ** вҖ” дёҖж—ҰйҖІ track parallelпјҢдёҚиҰҒдёӯйҖ”еҲҮеӣһ single trackпјҲжңғжңү in-flight branch context lossпјү
- **еҚҮзҙҡжҷӮж©ҹй»һ**пјҡBS е®Ңе·Ҙ + AS.0пјҲCompatibility & Migration Disciplineпјүе®Ңе·Ҙ еҫҢпјҢжүҚй–Ӣе§ӢиҖғж…® split tracksгҖӮAS.0 жҳҜ single point of truthгҖҒдёҚеҸҜе№іиЎҢгҖӮ

### жҺ’зЁӢзҚЁз«Ӣж–ји·Ҝз·ҡйғҪи©ІеҒҡзҡ„дәӢ

- **Migration з·Ёиҷҹй җз•ҷ**е·Іе°ҚйҪҠпјҲBS 0051-0055 / AS 0056-0058 / W11-W16 0059-0060 / FS 0061-0063 / SC 0064-0065 / BP 0066-0079 / HD 0080-0105пјү
- **Single-knob rollback** вҖ” жҜҸ priority еҗ„иҮӘжңү env knob (`OMNISIGHT_AS_ENABLED` / `OMNISIGHT_W_LOVABLE_ENABLED` / `OMNISIGHT_HD_ENABLED` / etc.) еҸҜе…ЁеҘ— disable
- **Compat regression test еҝ…йҒҺ**жүҚиғҪ ship вҖ” дёҚи«–е–® track жҲ–е№іиЎҢ
- **жҜҸеҖӢ priority е®Ңе·ҘеҫҢеҜ« commit зҙҖйҢ„еҲ° HANDOFF.md** вҖ” еҲҮ track жҷӮзҡ„ context handoff з”Ё

---

## рҹ…—рҹ…“ Priority HD вҖ” Hardware Design Verification & Differential AnalysisпјҲеөҢе…ҘејҸзЎ¬й«” + йҹҢй«”дәӨеҸүй©—иӯүпјү

> **иғҢжҷҜ**пјҡжң¬зі»зөұзҡ„ж ёеҝғе·®з•°еҢ–жҳҜ**еөҢе…ҘејҸ AI camera multi-agent dev command center**гҖӮе®ўжҲ¶еҜҰжіҒпјҡ
>
> 1. **Reference design жҸӣж–ҷ вҶ’ pin / жҡ«еӯҳеҷЁ / йӣ»еЈ“ / жҷӮеәҸе…ЁйҢҜ**пјҡе®ўжҲ¶жӢҝ vendor reference design жҸӣ ~30% BOMпјҢschematic е°ҚдёҚдёҠ layoutпјҢжҡ«еӯҳеҷЁиЁӯе®ҡйҢҜиӘӨпјҢйҹҢй«”з„ЎеҫһдёӢжүӢд№ҹз„Ўжі•зӣҙжҺҘй©—иӯүгҖӮ
> 2. **AVL д№ӢеӨ–зЎ¬еЎһ CMOS sensor**пјҡеҗҢеҖӢ SoC е№іеҸ°гҖҒе®ўжҲ¶еӣ зјәж–ҷ/жҲҗжң¬/жҖ§иғҪзЎ¬йҒёдёҚеңЁ AVL зҡ„ sensorпјҢ**еә•еұӨжҺ§еҲ¶е®Ңе…Ёи®ҠжЁЈ**пјҲдёҚеҸӘжҳҜ driver жӣҝжҸӣ вҖ” register map / I2C / LSC / color matrix / AE/AWB / HDR scheme е…ЁиҰҒйҮҚ tuneпјүгҖӮ
> 3. **еӨҡеұӨжқҝиө°з·ҡе•ҸйЎҢ EDA DRC йҒҺдәҶдҪҶеҜҰж©ҹжҺӣ**пјҡcrosstalk / йҳ»жҠ—дёҚйҖЈзәҢ / return path ж–·иЈӮ / е·®еӢ•е°Қ length mismatch / еҸғиҖғе№ійқўз ҙжҙһ вҖ” EDA и»ҹй«” PASSED дҪҶйҹҢй«”и·‘иө·дҫҶдёҚз©©гҖҒиЁҠиҷҹе®Ңж•ҙжҖ§дёҚеӨ гҖҒcamera frame drop / I2C NAK / DDR ECC errorгҖӮ
> 4. **Schematic vs еҺҹзҗҶең– vs еҜҰйҡӣ layout дёүж–№е°ҚдёҚдёҠ**пјҡеҺҹзҗҶең–пјҲblock diagramпјүвҶ’ schematic вҶ’ layout жҜҸеұӨиҪүиӯҜйғҪжңғиө°жЁЈпјҢйҹҢй«”е·ҘзЁӢеё« debug жҷӮжүҫдёҚеҲ°зңҹеҜҰ ground truthгҖӮ
>
> **жұәзӯ–**пјҡиө°е®Ңж•ҙи·Ҝз·ҡпјҲдёҚжҳҜ MVPпјүпјҢжҷӮзЁӢ**жҺ’еңЁ BP е®Ңе·Ҙд№ӢеҫҢ**пјҲи·Ҝз·ҡ 1пјүгҖӮзҗҶз”ұпјҡBP жҠҠ multi-agent е№іеҸ°еҹәзӨҺе»әеҘҪеҫҢгҖҒHD зҡ„ AI е·ҘдҪңжөҒпјҲи§Јжһҗ вҶ’ diff вҶ’ cross-check вҶ’ forced-AVL workflow вҶ’ HILпјүжүҚжңүе№іеҸ°и·‘гҖӮ
>
> **ж•ҙеҗҲж—ўжңүеҹәзӨҺ**пјҲйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚи№ҲйҖ ијӘеӯҗпјүпјҡY6 Workspace / W14 Live Sandbox Preview / R20 Phase 0 RAG / BS Catalog / AS Token Vault / BP.B Guild / O7 dual-sign / PEP gatewayгҖӮ
>
> **Migration з·Ёиҷҹ**пјҡHD 0080-0105пјҲе…ұ 26 йЎҶй җз•ҷ вҖ” core 0080-0095 + platform-pipeline 0096-0105пјӣеҫҢиҖ…иҗҪеңЁ HD.16-HD.21пјүгҖӮ
> **Single knob**пјҡ`OMNISIGHT_HD_ENABLED=true|false`пјҲfalse = ж•ҙеҘ— HD UI / API / agent йҡұи—ҸпјҢеӣһеҲ° BP е®Ңе·ҘжҷӮзҡ„еҝ«з…§пјүгҖӮ
> **е®Ңж•ҙжҷӮзЁӢдј°з®—**пјҡ~12 йҖұпјҲ4 group Г— еҗ„ 2-4 йҖұпјҢдҫқиіҮжәҗе№іиЎҢеәҰжө®еӢ• Вұ2 йҖұпјүгҖӮ
> **MVP fast-path**пјҡHD-MVP еҸӘеҒҡ Group A зҡ„ KiCad+Altium parser + Group B зҡ„ schematic-only diff + Group C зҡ„ SONY IMX е–®дёҖ sensor KB вҶ’ ~5 йҖұгҖҒеҸҜе…Ҳ demoгҖӮе®Ңж•ҙи·Ҝз·ҡжӯӨиҷ•**дёҚиө° MVP**гҖӮ
>
> **ADR зёҪзӣ®йҢ„**пјҡ
> - `docs/design/hd-hardware-design-verification.md`пјҲHD core ADR вҖ” Group A-D / 15 phase / vendor matrixпјү
> - `docs/design/hd-daily-scenarios-and-platform-pipeline.md`пјҲHD е§ҠеҰ№ ADR вҖ” 14 vendor Г— 50 SoC platform pipeline + 18 ж—ҘеёёдҪҝз”Ёжғ…еўғеҸўйӣҶпјҢе°ҚжҮү HD.16-HD.21пјү
>
> **жң¬ priority е…ұ 21 phase зҫӨзө„**пјҡ
> - **Group A-DпјҲHD.1-HD.15пјҢcoreпјү**пјҡHDIR / parser / SI / diff / sensor KB / AVL / FW adaptor / HIL / RAG / cert / UI / agent / ledger / test / rollout
> - **Group EпјҲHD.16-HD.21пјҢplatform pipeline + daily scenariosпјү**пјҡ14 vendor Г— 50 SoC SDK з®Ўз·ҡгҖҒеӨҡе®ўжҲ¶ NDA йҡ”йӣўгҖҒLifecycle/LTS/EOLгҖҒCVE WatchгҖҒйҮҸз”ў/OTAгҖҒBring-upгҖҒи·Ё SoC portгҖҒMulti-SoC topologyгҖҒModule/Lens/ISP tuningгҖҒFirmware blobгҖҒеҗҲиҰҸ SBOMгҖҒBuild farmгҖҒйғЁзҪІеӨҡжЁЈжҖ§гҖҒAI Companion

### HD.1. EDA Multi-Vendor Parser FoundationпјҲи§ЈжһҗеұӨеҹәеә•пјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡжҠҠ 7 еӨ§ EDA е·Ҙе…·зҡ„ schematic + layout жӘ”и§ЈжһҗжҲҗзөұдёҖдёӯй–“иЎЁзӨәпјҲ**HDIR вҖ” Hardware Design IR**пјүпјҢдёӢжёё diff / cross-check / RAG йғҪеҗғ HDIRгҖҒдёҚзӣҙжҺҘеҗғ vendor binaryгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.1.1 **HDIR schema е®ҡзҫ©**пјҲschematic еұӨ + PCB еұӨйӣҷ schemaпјү
  - [ ] schematicпјҡ`Component(refdes / part_number / footprint / value / pins[] / power_pin_groups / vendor_part_id)`гҖҒ`Net(name / type=power|signal|gnd|differential / driver / receivers[] / impedance_target / length_constraint)`
  - [ ] PCB layoutпјҡ`Layer(stack_order / type=signal|plane|mixed / dielectric / thickness)`гҖҒ`Trace(net / layer / segments[] / width / length / via_count)`гҖҒ`Via(layer_from / layer_to / type=through|blind|buried)`гҖҒ`Plane(layer / net / cutouts[])`гҖҒ`Component_PCB(refdes / xy / rotation / layer)`
  - [ ] **дёҚе°Қзӯүе®№еҝҚ**пјҡHDIR иЁӯ `coverage` ж——жЁҷжЁҷиЁҳе“Әдәӣ vendor ж јејҸеҸӘжңүйғЁд»Ҫ fieldsпјҲеҰӮ OrCAD иҖҒзүҲжң¬жІ’ differential pair metadata вҶ’ coverage='partial' и§ёзҷј vision LLM иЈңеј·пјү
- [ ] HD.1.2 **KiCad parser**пјҲ`*.kicad_sch` / `*.kicad_pcb` S-expression ж–Үеӯ—ж јејҸ вҖ” жңҖжҳ“е•ғпјҢе…ҲеҒҡпјү
  - [ ] зӣҙжҺҘиө° KiCad Python `pcbnew` APIпјҲеҰӮеҸҜз”Ёпјү+ зҙ” Python S-expression parser fallback
  - [ ] иҰҶи“Ӣ KiCad 6 / 7 / 8пјҲschema з•Ҙжңүе·®з•°пјү
  - [ ] ж•ҙеҗҲжё¬и©Ұпјҡз”Ё KiCad demo projectпјҲеҸҜеҫһе®ҳж–№ GitHub дёӢијүжҺҲж¬ҠзүҲпјүеҒҡ round-trip
- [ ] HD.1.3 **Altium parser**пјҲ`*.SchDoc` / `*.PcbDoc` Compound Document Binary вҖ” Altium з§Ғжңүж јејҸпјү
  - [ ] иө° `olefile` Python lib и§Ј OLE storageгҖҒжҠҪ Records жөҒ
  - [ ] schema еҸҚеҗ‘е·ҘзЁӢпјҡз”Ёж—ўжңү open-source Altium2KiCad converter з•¶ referenceпјҲдёҚжҠ„ codeгҖҒеғ…з•¶ж–Үд»¶пјү
  - [ ] иҰҶи“Ӣ Altium Designer 18+пјҲжӣҙиҲҠзүҲжң¬ `coverage='partial'`пјү
- [ ] HD.1.4 **OrCAD parser**пјҲ`*.dsn` schematic + `*.brd` Allegro layoutпјү
  - [ ] OrCAD Capture `.dsn` = ASCII s-expression и®Ҡй«”пјҲз°Ўе–®пјү
  - [ ] Cadence Allegro `.brd` = з§Ғжңү binaryпјҲ**жңҖйӣЈ**пјүвҖ” иө° Allegro IPC-2581 export дёӯд»Ӣж јејҸпјҲиҰҒе®ўжҲ¶й…ҚеҗҲ exportпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘе•ғ brdпјү
  - [ ] documentingпјҡжҳҺзӨәйҖҷжўқ path йңҖиҰҒ vendor cooperationпјҲrunbook еҜ«жё…жҘҡ export SOPпјү
- [ ] HD.1.5 **PADS parser**пјҲ`*.sch` / `*.pcb` вҖ” Mentor зі»пјҢзҸҫ Siemens EDAпјү
  - [ ] PADS 9.5+ иө° ASCII exportпјҲ`.asc`пјүвҖ” иө°дёӯд»Ӣ
  - [ ] PADS Logic / PADS Layout йӣҷе·Ҙе…·дёІжҺҘ
- [ ] HD.1.6 **Mentor / Siemens Xpedition parser**пјҲй«ҳйҡҺпјҢеүҚ Mentor Graphicsпјү
  - [ ] иө° IPC-2581 / ODB++ дёӯд»ӢпјҲжҘӯз•ҢжЁҷжә– PCB exchangeпјү
  - [ ] жӯӨ phase еҗҢжҷӮжҠҠ IPC-2581 / ODB++ parser жҠҪеҮәз•¶ universal fallbackпјҲд»»дҪ•иғҪ export йҖҷе…©ж јејҸзҡ„ EDA йғҪиғҪйҖІпјү
- [ ] HD.1.7 **Eagle parser**пјҲ`*.sch` / `*.brd` вҖ” Autodesk зі»пјү
  - [ ] Eagle 7+ жҳҜ XMLгҖҒжңҖжҳ“е•ғпјҲйҷӨ KiCad еӨ–з¬¬дәҢе®№жҳ“пјү
  - [ ] ж•ҙеҗҲжё¬и©Ұз”Ё SparkFun open-source Eagle library
- [ ] HD.1.8 **Vision LLM augmentation fallback**пјҲд»»дҪ• vendor дёҚж”ҜжҸҙжҲ– partial coverage жҷӮиө°йҖҷжўқпјү
  - [ ] жҺҘ Claude Sonnet 4.6 visionпјҢеҗғ schematic PDF / layout PDF / Gerber жёІжҹ“ең–
  - [ ] prompt templateпјҡгҖҢеҲ—еҮәжүҖжңү component / net / йӣ»еЈ“ rail / й—ңйҚөжҷӮеәҸгҖҚ
  - [ ] confidence жЁҷиЁҳпјҡ`source='vision_llm' / confidence=0.0~1.0`пјҢдёӢжёё diff еј•ж“ҺйҒҮ vision-sourced node жҷӮиҰҒжұӮ human review
  - [ ] **дёҚеҸ–д»Ј binary parser**гҖҒеғ…з•¶ fallbackпјӣvision зөҗжһңдёҚеҜ«е…Ҙ HDIR canonical storeгҖҒиө° `HDIR_vision_overlay` еүҜиЎЁ
- [ ] HD.1.9 **HDIR жҢҒд№…еҢ–**пјҲalembic 0080 вҖ” `hd_designs` / `hd_components` / `hd_nets` / `hd_pcb_traces` / `hd_pcb_planes`пјү
  - [ ] tenant scope е°ҚйҪҠж—ўжңү multi-tenant pattern
  - [ ] еӨ§жӘ”иө° BS-style chunked storageпјҲreference design schematic еӢ•иј’ 50MB+пјү
- [ ] HD.1.10 **Parser CLI + agent skill**пјҡ`omnisight hd parse <eda_file>` + жҡҙйңІзөҰ agent з•¶ SKILLпјҲ`SKILL_HD_PARSE`пјү

### HD.2. PCB Signal Integrity AnalyzerпјҲеӨҡеұӨжқҝиө°з·ҡеҲҶжһҗпјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡEDA DRC дёҚжҠ“зҡ„жқұиҘҝе…ЁеңЁйҖҷиЈЎгҖӮеӨҡеұӨжқҝ SI / PI / EMC иҰҸеүҮ вҖ” жҠ“ EDA и»ҹй«”жңғж”ҫйҒҺгҖҒеҜҰж©ҹжңғжҺӣзҡ„е•ҸйЎҢгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.2.1 **Stack-up consistency check**пјҡlayer order / dielectric / impedance target е°Қеҫ—дёҠ schematic е®Је‘ҠпјҲе·®еӢ•е°Қ 100О© diff impedanceгҖҒе–®з«Ҝ 50О© зӯүпјү
- [ ] HD.2.2 **Differential pair length matching**пјҡжүҖжңү declared diff pair е…©з·ҡеҜҰйҡӣ length е·®з•° < toleranceпјҲMIPI CSI / USB / DDR / HDMI йғҪеҗғйҖҷеҖӢпјү
- [ ] HD.2.3 **Reference plane integrity**пјҡй«ҳйҖҹ signal дёӢж–№ GND/PWR plane жҳҜеҗҰжңү cutout еҲҮеҲ° return pathпјҲйҖҷжҳҜ EMC fail жңҖеӨ§е®—пјү
- [ ] HD.2.4 **Crosstalk hot-spot**пјҡе№іиЎҢ traces > N mil й•·еәҰдё”й–“и·қ < 3W иҰҸеүҮзҡ„ net pair еҲ—иЎЁ
- [ ] HD.2.5 **Via stub analysis**пјҡblind/buried/through-hole via stub й•·еәҰиҲҮ signal frequency иЎқзӘҒеҒөжё¬пјҲDDR4 / PCIe еҝ…зңӢпјү
- [ ] HD.2.6 **Power integrity**пјҡdecoupling cap жӢ“жЁёгҖҒpower plane islandingгҖҒIR drop hot-spotпјҲзөҰ vision LLM augmentпјү
- [ ] HD.2.7 **EMI hot-spot heuristic**пјҡclock signal иө°з·ҡ length / via ж•ё / йҒҺ plane split ж¬Ўж•ёзҡ„з¶ңеҗҲ risk score
- [ ] HD.2.8 **е ұе‘Ҡз”ўеҮә**пјҡжҜҸеҖӢ finding её¶ `severity вҲҲ {info, warn, error, critical}` + иҰ–иҰәеҢ–пјҲеңЁ W14 Live Sandbox Preview е…§ inline жёІжҹ“ PCB layer + finding overlayпјү

- [ ] HD.2.10 **е–®зҚЁ single-knob**пјҡ`OMNISIGHT_HD_PCB_SI_ENABLED`пјҲPCB SI жҳҜиЁҲз®—еҜҶйӣҶпјҢеҸҜзҚЁз«Ӣй—ңпјү

### HD.3. Schematic-Layout Consistency Verifier

- [ ] HD.3.1 **Pin mapping cross-check**пјҡschematic дёҠ component pin вҶ’ footprint pin е°Қжҳ жӯЈзўәпјҲfootprint vendor жҸӣзүҲеёёеҮәйҢҜ вҖ” дҫӢеҰӮ ESP32 module old vs new и…ідҪҚе·®пјү
- [ ] HD.3.2 **Net continuity**пјҡschematic жЁҷзҡ„ net еңЁ layout дёҠеҜҰй«” trace + via зңҹйҖЈйҖҡпјҲDRC дёҚдёҖе®ҡжҠ“гҖҢжІ’иө°гҖҚпјү

- [ ] HD.3.5 **DRC delta vs ground truth**пјҡеҗғе®ўжҲ¶ EDA tool DRC е ұе‘Ҡ + и·‘жҲ‘еҖ‘иҮӘе®¶ DRC subsetгҖҒеҲ—еҮә**еҸӘжңүжҲ‘еҖ‘жҠ“еҲ°гҖҒEDA жІ’жҠ“**зҡ„ findingпјҲйҖҷжҳҜ HD зҡ„ж ёеҝғиіЈй»һд№ӢдёҖпјү

### HD.4. Reference Design Diff EngineпјҲж ёеҝғе·®з•°еҢ–пјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡе®ўжҲ¶жӢҝ vendor reference design жҸӣж–ҷжҷӮзҡ„ж ёеҝғдҪҝз”Ёжғ…еўғгҖӮијёе…Ҙ `reference.zip` + `customer.zip`гҖҒијёеҮә**зөҗж§ӢеҢ–е·®з•°е ұе‘Ҡ + жҜҸе·®з•°й»һзҡ„еҪұйҹҝеҲҶжһҗ**гҖӮ

- [ ] HD.4.1 **Diff жј”з®—жі•**пјҡHDIR-aware structural diffпјҲдёҚжҳҜ text diff вҖ” refdes / net е°ҚйҪҠеҹәж–ј functional role иҖҢйқһеӯ—дёІеҗҚпјү
  - [ ] node alignment жј”з®—жі•пјҡз”Ё component package + connected nets pattern еҒҡ fuzzy matchingпјҲrefdes ж”№еҗҚд№ҹиғҪе°ҚдёҠпјү
  - [ ] е·®з•°еҲҶйЎһпјҡ`{added, removed, swapped_part, value_changed, footprint_changed, pin_remapped, net_renamed, layer_changed, length_changed_significant}`
- [ ] HD.4.2 **еҪұйҹҝеҲҶжһҗпјҲimpact analysisпјү**пјҡжҜҸеҖӢ diff entry иҮӘеӢ•з”ўеҮә
  - [ ] зӣҙжҺҘйҖЈеӢ•зҡ„ net / дёӢжёё component
  - [ ] и©І net зҡ„ timing / power / SI зҙ„жқҹжңүз„Ўз ҙ
  - [ ] е°ҚжҮүзҡ„ firmware register / DTS node / driver жҳҜеҗҰйңҖдҝ®
  - [ ] йўЁйҡӘзӯүзҙҡ `{trivial, review_recommended, must_retune, must_redesign}`
- [ ] HD.4.3 **CMOS sensor swap зү№еҢ–и·Ҝеҫ‘**пјҡsensor жҸӣеһӢжҷӮиө°е°Ҳеұ¬ deep diffпјҲжҺҘ HD.5 sensor KBпјү
- [ ] HD.4.4 **Power tree diff**пјҡrail ж•ёйҮҸ / йӣ»еЈ“ / й ҶеәҸпјҲpower-up sequenceпјүе·®з•° вҖ” йҖҷжҳҜжҸӣ PMIC / LDO еҫҢжңҖе®№жҳ“ brick зҡ„
- [ ] HD.4.5 **Clock tree diff**пјҡcrystal / oscillator / PLL config + downstream жҷӮеәҸпјҲжҸӣ sensor жҷӮ MCLK / PCLK / PIXCLK дёҖи®ҠгҖҒISP timing е…ЁиҰҒйҮҚ tuneпјү
- [ ] HD.4.6 **Diff UI**пјҡW14 Live Sandbox Preview е…§дёүйқўжқҝпјҲreference layout / customer layout / diff overlayпјүпјҢй«ҳдә® critical diff
- [ ] HD.4.7 **Diff е ұе‘Ҡ export**пјҡPDF + Markdown + JSONпјҲе®ўжҲ¶е…§йғЁ PR review з”Ёпјү
- [ ] HD.4.8 **agent skill жҡҙйңІ**пјҡ`SKILL_HD_DIFF_REFERENCE`пјҢBP.B Guild е…§еҸҜжҙҫ `hd-diff-bot` иҮӘеӢ•и·‘

### HD.6. AVL Forced-Substitution WorkflowпјҲзјәж–ҷжғ…еўғпјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡе®ўжҲ¶иӘӘгҖҢжҲ‘йҖҷйЎҶ SoC е№іеҸ°гҖҒAVL жҳҜ IMX415гҖҒжҲ‘зЎ¬иҰҒеЎһ GC4653гҖҚжҷӮзҡ„ guided workflowгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.6.1 **AVL schema**пјҡ`hd_avl_entries(soc_platform / approved_part_id / category=sensor|pmic|memory|connector / approved_at / approval_notes)`
- [ ] HD.6.2 **Substitution proposal**пјҡoperator ијёе…Ҙ `from_part + to_part` вҶ’ зі»зөұ cross-check Sensor KB / power tree / clock / DTS / driver еҸҜз”ЁжҖ§ вҶ’ з”ўеҮә substitution feasibility report
- [ ] HD.6.3 **Required driver / DTS work**пјҡеҲ—еҮәйңҖж–°еўһ/дҝ®ж”№зҡ„ kernel driver жӘ” + DTS overlay + recipe / Yocto layer и®ҠеӢ•жё…е–®
- [ ] HD.6.4 **Required ISP tuning work**пјҡLSC / color matrix / AE / AWB еҗ„иҮӘзҡ„е·ҘжҷӮдј°з®— + tuning chart жЁЎжқҝ
- [ ] HD.6.5 **Risk acceptance form**пјҡеј·еҲ¶ operator еҲ—еҮәе·ІзҹҘ errata иҲҮ mitigationгҖҒз”ўеҮә PDF зөҰе®ўжҲ¶ sign-offпјҲиІ¬д»»еҲҶжөҒпјү
- [ ] HD.6.6 **AVL violation tracking**пјҡжҜҸж¬Ў forced sub еҜ«е…Ҙ audit ledgerпјҲеҸҜж•ҙеҗҲ N10 ledgerпјүвҖ” еҫҢзәҢеҗҢ SoC еҶҚйҒҮеҗҢ sub жҷӮиҮӘеӢ•её¶е…Ҙжӯ·еҸІз¶“й©—
- [ ] HD.6.7 **alembic 0082 вҖ” `hd_avl_entries` / `hd_avl_substitutions`**

### HD.7. Firmware Stack Adaptor LayerпјҲйҹҢй«”еҒҙ cross-checkпјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡHD дёҚеҸӘзңӢзЎ¬й«”гҖҒйӮ„иҰҒжҠҠзЎ¬й«”и®ҠеӢ• propagate еҲ°йҹҢй«”еҒҙпјҲdriver / DTS / config / build recipeпјүгҖӮж”ҜжҸҙеӣӣзЁ®дё»жөҒ stackгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.7.1 **Linux Kernel + Yocto**пјҲmainstreamпјү
  - [ ] и§Јжһҗ device treeпјҲ`*.dts` / `*.dtsi` / `*.dtbo`пјүзӮә HDIR-firmware иЎЁ
  - [ ] и§Јжһҗ Kconfig / defconfigпјҢеҲ—еҮә enabled drivers
  - [ ] и§Јжһҗ Yocto recipeпјҲ`*.bb` / `*.bbappend`пјүвҖ” е“Әдәӣ layer еј•е…Ҙе“Әдәӣ patch
- [ ] HD.7.2 **Linux Kernel + BuildRoot**пјҲmainstream жӣҝд»Јпјү
  - [ ] BR2 config и§ЈжһҗгҖҒpackage listгҖҒpostbuild script
- [ ] HD.7.3 **AOSP**пјҲй«ҳйҡҺпјү
  - [ ] HAL layer mappingпјҲcamera HAL / sensor module / ISP tuning XMLпјү
  - [ ] device.mk + BoardConfig.mk и§Јжһҗ
  - [ ] vendor partition vs system partition еҚҖеҲҶ
- [ ] HD.7.4 **RTOS / FreeRTOS / ThreadX**пјҲдҪҺйҡҺпјү
  - [ ] CMSIS HAL / driver layer
  - [ ] Linker script / startup file и§ЈжһҗпјҲboot йҡҺж®ө register initпјү
  - [ ] зӣҙжҺҘ register-level configпјҲз„Ў driver жҠҪиұЎпјү
- [ ] HD.7.5 **HWвҶ”FW cross-check engine**
  - [ ] schematic дёҠзҡ„ GPIO assignment vs DTS pinmux е°ҚйҪҠ
  - [ ] schematic дёҠзҡ„ I2C bus + addr vs driver еҸ–з”Ё addr е°ҚйҪҠ
  - [ ] schematic дёҠзҡ„ power rail й ҶеәҸ vs driver power-on sequence е°ҚйҪҠ
  - [ ] schematic дёҠзҡ„ sensor MCLK source vs DTS clock node е°ҚйҪҠ
- [ ] HD.7.6 **Sync skew detection**пјҡHW ж”№дәҶдҪҶ FW жІ’и·ҹдёҠпјҲжҲ–еҸҚд№Ӣпјүзҡ„ commit-level diffпјҲжҺҘ git logпјү
- [ ] HD.7.7 **alembic 0083 вҖ” `hd_firmware_assets` / `hd_hwfw_crosscheck_findings`**

### HD.8. Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) Emulation Layer

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡеңЁжІ’жңүеҜҰж©ҹ board зҡ„жғ…еўғдёӢгҖҒи·‘ HDIR дёҠзҡ„ simulation жҸҗеүҚзҷјзҸҫе•ҸйЎҢгҖӮ**дёҚжҳҜ SPICE зҙҡж•ёдҪҚ/йЎһжҜ” simulation**пјҲйӮЈжҳҜ Cadence / Mentor иіҪйҒ“пјүвҖ” жҳҜ **functional / register-level emulation**пјҡsensor I2C жҮүзӯ”гҖҒregister map иЎҢзӮәгҖҒpower-up sequenceгҖҒclock domainгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.8.1 **Sensor emulator**пјҡзөҰе®ҡ sensor model вҶ’ emulate I2C register map + еҒҮ frame buffer зөҰ ISPпјҢйҹҢй«”еҸҜеңЁз„ЎеҜҰж©ҹзҡ„жғ…жіҒдёӢи·‘ driver init
- [ ] HD.8.2 **PMIC emulator**пјҡзөҰе®ҡ PMIC + power tree вҶ’ emulate boot sequence + LDO enable / disable + over-current trip
- [ ] HD.8.3 **Clock tree emulator**пјҡcrystal вҶ’ PLL вҶ’ domain clockпјҢdownstream IP еҸ–еҫ—е°ҚжҮү freq
- [ ] HD.8.4 **HIL test harness**пјҡеңЁ W14 Live Sandbox Preview е…§и·‘гҖҒеҚіжҷӮзңӢ register write trace + frame output
- [ ] HD.8.5 **emulator vs real board diff**пјҡйҒё 3 йЎҶ reference board з”ЁеҜҰж©ҹ + emulator и·‘еҗҢжЁЈ firmware pathгҖҒеҲ—еҮәиЎҢзӮәе·®з•°дҪңзӮә emulator validation suite
- [ ] HD.8.6 **alembic 0084 вҖ” `hd_hil_sessions` / `hd_hil_traces`**

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡзЎ¬й«”жҸӣж–ҷеҫҢгҖҒе®ўжҲ¶иҰҒйҮҚж–°и·‘ EMC / е®үиҰҸ / pre-cert жё¬и©ҰгҖӮзі»зөұжҮүз”ўеҮә**жңҖе°Ҹ retest scope**пјҲдёҚжҳҜе…Ёи·‘гҖҒеӨӘиІҙпјүгҖӮ

### HD.12. HD Multi-Agent WorkflowпјҲжҺҘ BP.B Guildпјү

- [ ] HD.12.1 **`hd-parser-bot`**пјҡеҗғ EDA file вҶ’ з”ў HDIR
- [ ] HD.12.2 **`hd-diff-bot`**пјҡи·‘ reference vs customer diff

- [ ] HD.12.4 **`hd-fw-sync-bot`**пјҡHW change вҶ’ еҲ—еҮә FW patch жё…е–®пјҲз”ҡиҮіз”ҹжҲҗ PR иҚүзЁҝпјү
- [ ] HD.12.5 **`hd-cert-bot`**пјҡз”ў retest plan

> **д»ҘдёӢ HD.16-HD.21 зӮә platform pipeline + 18 daily scenariosпјҲе§ҠеҰ№ ADRпјүе°ҚжҮү phase зҫӨзө„**
> и©ізҙ°жұәзӯ–иҰӢ `docs/design/hd-daily-scenarios-and-platform-pipeline.md`гҖӮ
> 14 vendor Г— 50 SoCпјҲRockchip / TI / NXP / MTK / nVidia / Novatek / Ambarella / HiSilicon / Realtek / SigmaStar / Qualcomm / Sunplus / ST / FocalTrans / BroadcomпјүгҖӮ

### HD.16. Platform Spec Registry + SDK / Toolchain PipelineпјҲ14 vendor Г— 50 SoC з®Ўз·ҡпјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡжҠҠ 50+ йЎҶ SoC зҡ„ SDK / toolchain / patch / NDA е…ЁйғЁзҙҚз®ЎгҖӮmanifest-based meta-repo + дёүеұӨ vendor mirror + е№іеҸ° spec registryгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.16.1 **`platforms-spec` registry**пјҡжҜҸйЎҶ SoC дёҖд»Ҫ `<vendor>/<chip>.yaml`пјҲHD / BS / UI / build pipeline е…ұеҗҢж¶ҲиІ»зҡ„ single source of truthпјү
- [ ] HD.16.2 **`platforms-manifest` meta-repo**пјҡYAML manifest йҺ–жүҖжңү platform `(spec, mirror_pin, patch_pin, toolchain_ref)` еӣӣе…ғзө„
- [ ] HD.16.3 **`vendor-mirrors-public` org**пјҡopen-license vendor SDK pristine mirrorпјҲRockchip / TI / NXP / MTK Genio / nVidia Jetson L4T / Broadcom RPi / ST / Qualcomm partialпјү
- [ ] HD.16.4 **`vendor-mirrors-nda` private org**пјҡNDA-only mirror + зү©зҗҶйҡ”йӣўпјҲAmbarella / HiSilicon / Novatek / SigmaStar / Realtek / MTK Genio NDA bundle / Sunplus / FocalTrans / Qualcomm NDA-bitsпјү
- [ ] HD.16.5 **`vendor-patches` repos**пјҡжҲ‘ж–№ deltaпјҲpatch series on top of pristineпјүвҖ” public / private е…© org е°ҚзЁұ
- [ ] HD.16.6 **`vendor-toolchains-meta`**пјҡtoolchain manifest жҢҮеҗ‘ OCI image / artifact store
- [ ] HD.16.7 **Toolchain дёүеұӨеҲҶйЎһиҗҪеҜҰ**пјҡ
  - [ ] Tier 1 Shared CanonicalпјҡLinaro aarch64-13.x / arm-13.x / arm-none-eabi-13.xпјҲиҰҶи“Ӣ ~30 йЎҶ SoCпјү
  - [ ] Tier 2 Vendor-TunedпјҡHiSilicon uClibc fork / Ambarella custom / Novatek / SigmaStar / Realtek / Sunplus / FocalTransпјҲbinary tarball mirrorпјү
  - [ ] Tier 3 Vendor-LockedпјҡNVIDIA Jetson L4T / Qualcomm Hexagon LLVM / MTK Genio NDA bundleпјҲtoolchain иҲҮ SDK еҡҙж јз¶ҒзүҲпјү
- [ ] HD.16.8 **Abstract source connector**пјҡ`GitConnector` / `GerritConnector` / `FTPConnector` / `S3Connector` / `ManualUploadConnector`пјҲHiSilicon Gerrit / Ambarella SFTP portal / Realtek FTP / vendor е…§йғЁ git йғҪиғҪжҺҘпјү
- [ ] HD.16.9 **Vendor branch strategy**пјҡspec е…§ `vendor_branch_strategy: mainline | bsp | downstream | customer`пјҲRockchip еӨҡ branch е ҙжҷҜжҳҺзӨәжҲ‘ж–№иҝҪе“Әжўқпјү
- [ ] HD.16.10 **Distributor layer**пјҡspec еҠ  `source: vendor_direct | distributor | community` + `distributor` / `vendor_equivalent` / `drift_from_vendor`пјҲд»ЈзҗҶе•ҶзүҲ vs еҺҹе» зүҲе·®з•°пјү
- [ ] HD.16.11 **Upstream sync 5-stage pipeline**пјҡvendor_check вҶ’ mirror_update вҶ’ patch_rebase вҶ’ integration_build + HD_crosscheck вҶ’ manifest_bump + tag
- [ ] HD.16.12 **5 зҙҡ escalation**пјҡL1 е…ЁиҮӘеӢ• / L2 auto-merge + warning / L3 patch conflict жҙҫ `vendor-rebase-bot` / L4 build red йҺ– staging / L5 NDA leak detect вҶ’ auto-revert + alert
- [ ] HD.16.13 **NDA Center**пјҲper-tenantпјүпјҡз°ҪзҪІ / йҒҺжңҹ / ACL / catalog иҮӘеӢ•и§ЈйҺ– / audit ledger
- [ ] HD.16.14 **Platform Catalog UI**пјҡ14 vendor filter + use case / performance tier / AI TOPS / firmware stack / license / status еӨҡз¶ӯеәҰ
- [ ] HD.16.15 **Platform Detail UI**пјҲ5 tabsпјүпјҡOverview / SDK & Toolchain / Patches / Sensors (HD) / Upstream Sync Log

### HD.17. еӨҡе®ўжҲ¶ / еӨҡе°ҲжЎҲ / NDA йҡ”йӣўпјҲ**жңҖеӨ§жһ¶ж§ӢжјҸй»һиЈңдёҒ**пјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡ50 е®ўжҲ¶ Г— 100 е°ҲжЎҲ Г— 50 SoCгҖҒжҜҸе°ҲжЎҲеҗ„иҮӘ SDK pinгҖҒе®ўжҲ¶й–“ patch дёҚеҸҜиҰӢгҖҒNDA дёҚе°Қзӯүйҡ”йӣўгҖҒbuild cache дёҚдә’ж»ІгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.17.1 **дёүеұӨ manifest з–ҠеҠ **пјҡ`base.yaml`пјҲжҲ‘ж–№ baselineпјүвҶ’ `customer-overlay/<id>.yaml` вҶ’ `project-pin/<id>.yaml`пјҲYocto-style layer з–ҠеҠ пјү
- [ ] HD.17.2 **Per-project SDK pin ж°ёд№…дёҚеҸҜйҖҶ**пјҡproduction tag commit + toolchain OCI image йӣҷйҺ–гҖҒretention = forever
- [ ] HD.17.3 **Customer patch з§ҒжңүеҢ–**пјҡcustomer-overlay йҖІ `private-per-customer` repoгҖҒACL йҺ– tenantгҖҒдёҚж»ІжјҸзөҰе…¶д»– customer
- [ ] HD.17.4 **NDA йӮҠз•Ң enforcement**пјҡcatalog йЎҜзӨәжҢү NDA йҒҺжҝҫгҖҒжңӘз°Ҫ NDA е®ўжҲ¶зңӢдёҚеҲ°и©І SoC URLгҖҒPEP gateway еҗҢжӯҘж“Ӣ
- [ ] HD.17.5 **Build farm sandbox**пјҡжҜҸ build job йҖІзҚЁз«Ӣ OCIгҖҒдёҚе…ұз”Ё NDA mirror cacheпјҲйҳІ NDA-A leak NDA-Bпјү
- [ ] HD.17.6 **Per-tenant role matrix**пјҡHW / FW / ISP tuning / Build / QA / жі•еӢҷ / Upstream-propose 7 roleгҖҒCatalog UI дҫқ role йҒҺжҝҫ
- [ ] HD.17.7 **Patch propose-upstream toggle**пјҡper-patch жұәе®ҡиҰҒдёҚиҰҒеӣһдёҠжёёпјҲдҝқиӯ·е®ўжҲ¶ IP ж©ҹеҜҶпјү
- [ ] HD.17.8 **alembic 0097 вҖ” `hd_customer_overlays` / `hd_project_pins` / `hd_role_assignments`**

### HD.18. Lifecycle / LTS / EOL / CVE WatchпјҲ5-10 е№ҙ product lifeпјү

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡembedded product 5-10 е№ҙз”ҹе‘ҪйҖұжңҹзЎ¬зҙ„жқҹгҖӮvendor sunset / ж”¶иіј / еҖ’й–ү / EOL еҫҢжҲ‘ж–№д»ҚиғҪ rebuildгҖӮCVE дё»еӢ•й—ңиҒҜ + auto-backportгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.18.1 **Lifecycle status**пјҡspec е…§ `lifecycle.status: alpha|beta|ga|sunset|frozen` + `lifecycle.support_until: YYYY-MM-DD`
- [ ] HD.18.2 **Frozen archive policy**пјҡsunset еҫҢ mirror + toolchain image з§» cold storageпјҲS3 Glacier-styleпјүдҝқз•ҷ 10 е№ҙгҖҒеҸҜд»ҳиІ»еҸ–еҮә
- [ ] HD.18.3 **OCI image ж°ёд№…йҺ–**пјҡжҜҸеҖӢ production tag е°ҚжҮүзҡ„ toolchain OCI дёҚеҲӘгҖҒregistry retention = forever
- [ ] HD.18.4 **е№ҙеәҰ reproducibility audit**пјҡйҡЁж©ҹжҠҪ 5 йЎҶ sunset SoC йҮҚ buildгҖҒзўәиӘҚ 5 е№ҙеүҚ image bit-exact йҮҚзҸҫпјҲGA SLOпјү
- [ ] HD.18.5 **CVE feed ingestion**пјҡиЁӮй–ұ NVD / OSV / еҗ„ vendor security advisoryпјҲеҗ« EOL vendor community forkпјү
- [ ] HD.18.6 **CVE вҶ’ SBOM иҮӘеӢ•й—ңиҒҜ**пјҡеҲ—еҮәеҸ—еҪұйҹҝзҡ„ platform / е®ўжҲ¶ / project / е·І ship device fleet
- [ ] HD.18.7 **Auto-PR backport bot**пјҡvendor жҺЁ CVE fix вҶ’ иҮӘеӢ•з”ўз”ҹ customer-overlay backport patch вҶ’ е®ўжҲ¶ review + ship
- [ ] HD.18.8 **EOL community-backport pool**пјҡе°Қ Hi3516CV зӯүе·І EOL SoC зҡ„ best-effort patch жұ пјҲжҳҺзӨәдёҚж“”дҝқпјү
- [ ] HD.18.9 **CVE дё»еӢ•йҖҡзҹҘ**пјҡtenant еңЁ fleet дёӯжҢҒжңүеҸ—еҪұйҹҝ device вҶ’ push notification + email + е·Ҙе–®
- [ ] HD.18.10 **alembic 0098 вҖ” `hd_cve_feeds` / `hd_cve_impacts` / `hd_backport_proposals` / `hd_lifecycle_audits`**

### HD.19. Bring-up Workbench + Cross-SoC Port + DevKit Fork

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡз¬¬дёҖж¬ЎжӢҝеҲ° production PCB йҖҡйӣ»йӮЈдёҖеҲ» + и·Ё SoC еҚҮзҙҡ / жҸӣеһӢ + DevKit иЎҚз”ҹ production board вҖ” embedded дёүеӨ§й«ҳй »иө·й»һе·ҘдҪңжөҒгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.19.1 **Bring-up Checklist generator**пјҡдҫқ SoC boot chain е®ўиЈҪ checklistпјҲU-Boot / TF-A / OP-TEE / kernel / userspaceпјү
- [ ] HD.19.2 **Live console capture**пјҡW14 е…§жҺҘ USB-serial / J-Link probe вҶ’ еҚіжҷӮ boot console вҶ’ AI parse еҚЎй»һ
- [ ] HD.19.3 **70% bring-up еҚЎй»һ decision tree**пјҡpower / clock / I2C / DDR еӣӣеӨ§йЎһе•ҸйЎҢгҖҒе°Қ schematic жҸҗзӨәгҖҢе…ҲжӘўжҹҘйҖҷ N жўқгҖҚ
- [ ] HD.19.4 **Power-on sequence verifier**пјҡдёҠеӮізӨәжіўеҷЁ capture вҶ’ жҜ”е°Қ schematic иЁӯиЁҲ sequence
- [ ] HD.19.5 **Cross-SoC port assistant**пјҡе…© platform spec diff вҶ’ еҝ…дҝ®й …жё…е–®пјҲdriver / DTS / ISP tuning / sensor mapпјү+ е·ҘжҷӮдј°з®— + risk flag
- [ ] HD.19.6 **и·Ё vendor жҸӣеһӢе°Ҳеұ¬и·Ҝеҫ‘**пјҡAmbarella вҶ’ Rockchip / HiSilicon вҶ’ SigmaStar зӯүзјәиІЁжҪ®й«ҳй »жҸӣеһӢгҖҒй җијү known migration recipe
- [ ] HD.19.7 **DevKit catalog**пјҡspec еҠ  `reference_devkits: [rock-5b, jetson-orin-nano-devkit, rpi-5, ...]` й җијү reference design
- [ ] HD.19.8 **DevKit fork wizard**пјҡгҖҢд»Ҙ Rock 5B зӮәиө·й»һ forkгҖҚдёҖйҚөйҖІ HD.4 reference diff workflow
- [ ] HD.19.9 **alembic 0099 вҖ” `hd_bringup_sessions` / `hd_port_advisors` / `hd_devkit_forks`**

### HD.20. Multi-SoC Topology + Module/Lens/ISP Tuning + Firmware Blob

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡembedded зі»зөұеҜҰжіҒпјҡеӨҡ SoC е…ұж§Ӣ / sensor ж“ҙжҲҗ (sensor, lens, module) triple / vendor SDK еҗ«дёҖе Ҷ closed-source blobгҖӮ

- [ ] HD.20.4 **Module е»  KB**пјҡиҲңе®Ү / еӨ§з«Ӣе…ү / зҺүжҷ¶е…ү / дёүжңҲе…үйӣ» / з«ӢжҷҜе…үйӣ» metadata

- [ ] HD.20.8 **(BSP-ver, blob-ver) е…је®№зҹ©йҷЈ**пјҡspec йЎҜзӨәгҖҢжӯӨ BSP зӣёе®№зҡ„ blob зүҲжң¬зҜ„еңҚгҖҚгҖҒcatalog UI иӯҰзӨә incompatible

### HD.21. Production / OTA / Compliance / SBOM / Build Farm / Deployment / AI Companion

> **зӣ®жЁҷ**пјҡеү©дёӢ 7 йЎһж—Ҙеёёжғ…еўғдёҖж¬ЎиЈңйҪҠпјҲйҮҸз”ўгҖҒOTAгҖҒеҗҲиҰҸиӘҚиӯүгҖҒBuild farmгҖҒйғЁзҪІеӨҡжЁЈжҖ§гҖҒеҸҚеҒҮеҶ’гҖҒAI еҠ©жүӢпјүгҖӮ

#### HD.21.1 йҮҸз”ў / EMS / Factory Programming
- [ ] HD.21.1.1 **Production Handoff workflow**пјҡR&D йҺ– вҶ’ Production tagпјҲдёҚеҸҜйҖҶпјүвҶ’ EMS access bundle
- [ ] HD.21.1.2 **Per-device unique injection**пјҡMAC / serial / cert / TPM key / per-device sensor calibrationпјҲйҮҸз”ўз·ҡдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§пјү
- [ ] HD.21.1.3 **Vendor flashing tool integration**пјҡrkdeveloptool / fastboot / NXP MfgTool / SP_FlashTool / Ambarella amboot еҗ„е®¶йҒ©й…Қ
- [ ] HD.21.1.4 **йҮҸз”ў vs е·ҘзЁӢзүҲиҮӘеӢ•йҡ”йӣў**пјҡproduction tag иҮӘеӢ• strip engineering boot key

#### HD.21.2 OTA Package Generator
- [ ] HD.21.2.1 **OTA bundle generator**пјҡbuild output вҶ’ SWUpdate / Mender / RAUC / AOSP A-B image bundle
- [ ] HD.21.2.2 **Signature pipeline**пјҡз°ҪеҗҚиө° AS Token Vault еҗҢ KMSгҖҒboot signature verification
- [ ] HD.21.2.3 **Delta update**пјҡй »еҜ¬жңүйҷҗ IoT camera иө° deltaгҖҒreduce OTA payload
- [ ] HD.21.2.4 **Rollback mechanism declaration**пјҡA/B partition / dual-bank / single-image дёүзӯ–з•Ҙе°ҚйҪҠ spec

#### HD.21.3 Compliance Center / SBOM
- [ ] HD.21.3.1 **зӣ®жЁҷеёӮе ҙ selector**пјҡEU CRA / US EO 14028 / ETSI EN 18031 / и»Ҡз”Ё ISO 26262 / йҶ«зҷӮ IEC 62304 / иҲӘеӨӘ DO-178C / дёӯеңӢзӯүдҝқ 2.0
- [ ] HD.21.3.2 **Qualified toolchain alts**пјҡspec еҠ  `qualified_toolchain_alts: []`пјҲеҗҢ SoC R&D з”Ё LinaroгҖҒйҮҸз”ўйҒҺ ISO 26262 з”Ё GHS / WindRiver / Mentor Sourceryпјү
- [ ] HD.21.3.3 **SBOM иҮӘеӢ•з”ҹжҲҗ + з°ҪеҗҚ**пјҡCycloneDX + SPDX йӣҷж јејҸ
- [ ] HD.21.3.4 **License Auditor**пјҡship еүҚжҺғ SBOMгҖҒеҲ— GPL component + жҳҜеҗҰеұҘиЎҢ obligationгҖҒconflict зӣҙжҺҘ block production tag
- [ ] HD.21.3.5 **Functional safety toolchain qualification (TQL)**пјҡеҲҶзҙҡ 1-3 е°ҚйҪҠ spec

#### HD.21.4 Build Farm / Cache дёүеұӨйҡ”йӣў
- [ ] HD.21.4.1 **Tier 1 cache**пјҡopen project е…ұдә« ccache / sstate-cache

### HD R-series йўЁйҡӘпјҲR36-R45пјү

- **R36 Vendor file format drift**пјҡEDA vendor еҚҮ major versionгҖҒbinary format и®ҠгҖҒparser жӯ»гҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡжҜҸе№ҙ review еҗ„ parserгҖҒзүҲжң¬дёҠйҷҗжҳҺзӨәпјӣvision LLM fallback ж°ёйҒ еңЁз·ҡгҖӮ
- **R37 Sensor KB йҒҺжҷӮ**пјҡsensor vendor ж”№ register mapпјҲrev2 siliconпјүгҖҒKB иЁҳзҡ„йӮ„жҳҜ rev1гҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡKB жҜҸзӯҶеё¶ silicon revisionгҖҒдёҠеӮі datasheet жҷӮеј·еҲ¶жЁҷ revгҖҒAVL violation жҷӮйӣҷйҮҚ confirmгҖӮ
- **R38 е®ўжҲ¶ schematic ж©ҹеҜҶеӨ–жҙ©**пјҡHD parse еҫҢеӯҳ raw HDIR еҲ° DB вҶ’ иӢҘ DB иў«е…ҘдҫөгҖҒе®ўжҲ¶ IP еӨ–жҙ©гҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡHDIR иө° AS Token Vault еҗҢзӯүеҠ еҜҶзӯ–з•ҘпјҲper-tenant Fernet еҠ еҜҶпјүгҖҒN10 ledger дёҚеҗ« raw bytesгҖӮ
- **R39 HIL emulator vs real board иЎҢзӮәеҒҸе·®**пјҡemulator йҒҺ / real board жҺӣгҖҒе®ўжҲ¶еҸҚеҗ‘дёҚдҝЎд»»зі»зөұгҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡжҜҸж¬Ў emulator и·‘йғҪжЁҷ `confidence`гҖҒжҳҺзӨә emulator дёҚеҸ–д»ЈеҜҰж©ҹгҖҒemulator validation suite еӯЈеәҰ re-runгҖӮ
- **R40 Forced-AVL substitution жі•еҫӢиІ¬д»»**пјҡе®ўжҲ¶з°ҪдәҶ risk acceptance form д»ҚеҮәдәӢгҖҒзі»зөұиӢҘжҳҜе»әиӯ°дҫҶжәҗгҖҒиў«е‘ҠйҖЈеё¶иІ¬д»»гҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡжүҖжңү substitution жҸҗжЎҲжҳҺзӨәгҖҢdecision support only / final responsibility on operatorгҖҚгҖҒledger е®Ңж•ҙдҝқеӯҳжұәзӯ–и·Ҝеҫ‘гҖҒжҸҗдҫӣ export зөҰе®ўжҲ¶жі•еӢҷеӯҳжӘ”гҖӮ
- **R41 NDA leak across tenantsпјҲHD.16-HD.17пјү**пјҡbuild farm cache / mirror access ACL еӨұиӘӨ вҶ’ NDA-A е®ўжҲ¶ leak зөҰ NDA-BгҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡbuild job йҖІзҚЁз«Ӣ OCI sandboxгҖҒcache дёүеұӨйҡ”йӣўгҖҒL5 escalation иҮӘеӢ• revert + alertгҖҒжҜҸеӯЈ NDA boundary auditгҖӮ
- **R42 Vendor sunset / еҖ’й–ү / ж”¶иіјпјҲHD.18пјү**пјҡFocalTrans зӯүе°Ҹ vendor йўЁйҡӘй«ҳгҖҒSDK дҫҶжәҗж¶ҲеӨұгҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡfrozen archive policyпјҲ10 е№ҙ cold storageпјү+ OCI image ж°ёд№…йҺ– + жҜҸе№ҙ reproducibility audit + community-backport poolгҖӮ
- **R43 CVE йҹҝжҮүйҒІз·©пјҲHD.18пјү**пјҡvendor жҺЁ fix ж…ўпјҲHiSilicon EOL е®Ңе…ЁдёҚжҺЁпјүгҖҒе®ўжҲ¶ fleet жҡҙйңІжҷӮй–“й•·гҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡcommunity-backport pool + auto-PR bot + дё»еӢ•йҖҡзҹҘ + SLOпјҲhigh-severity 14 еӨ©е…§еҮә backport жҸҗжЎҲпјүгҖӮ
- **R44 Compliance иӘҚиӯүеҒҪйҒҺпјҲHD.21.3пјү**пјҡе®ўжҲ¶д»ҘзӮә SBOM / qualified toolchain йҒҺдәҶгҖҒеҜҰж©ҹиӘҚиӯү lab failгҖҒиІ¬д»»еҸҚе’¬зі»зөұгҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡжҳҺзӨәгҖҢdecision support / lab certification д»ҚйңҖ third-partyгҖҚ+ qualified toolchain еҝ…иө° vendor signed binaryпјҲдёҚе…ҒиЁұ self-build жӣҝд»Јпјү+ audit trailгҖӮ
- **R45 AI Companion зӯ”йҢҜ register addrпјҲHD.21.7пјү**пјҡbring-up еҠ©жүӢдәӮз·Ё registerгҖҒе®ўжҲ¶з…§еҒҡ brick ж©ҹгҖӮ**Mitigation**пјҡжүҖжңү register addr / bit field зӯ”иҰҶеј·еҲ¶иө° RAG retrieval + datasheet page referenceгҖҒжүҫдёҚеҲ°еҮәиҷ•жӢ’зӯ”пјҲе·ІеңЁ HD.9.4 иҗҪең°гҖҒcompanion з№јжүҝ invariantпјүгҖӮ

## рҹ…– Priority G вҖ” Ops / ReliabilityпјҲHA иЈңеј·пјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡзӣ®еүҚзӮәе–®ж©ҹ systemd еҺҹеһӢпјҢ`scripts/deploy.sh` д»Ҙ `systemctl restart` еҺҹең°йҮҚе•ҹпјҢжңғжңүзҹӯжҡ«дёӯж–·пјӣSQLite з„ЎиӨҮиЈҪпјӣз„ЎиІ ијүеқҮиЎЎ / еӨҡеүҜжң¬ / и—Қз¶  / rollingгҖӮCanaryгҖҒеӮҷд»ҪгҖҒDLQгҖҒwatchdog е·Іе…·еӮҷпјҢдҪҶж¬ зјәзңҹжӯЈ HA иҲҮйӣ¶еҒңж©ҹгҖӮд»ҘдёӢ Phase зӮәиЈңеј·е·ҘдҪңгҖӮ

in-flightпјүпјҢиЁҲз®— thresholdГ—period жҳҜ K8s ж—ўе®ҡиӘһж„ҸгҖҒдёҚжңғеӣ зӮәйҮҚе‘ҪеҗҚ field жјҸйҺ–гҖӮйҖҷе…©жўқ contract жҳҜ G5 #4 жңҖж ёеҝғзҡ„гҖҢprobe timing жҺҘеҫ—дҪҸ G1 lifecycleгҖҚдә’йҺ–гҖӮ**зӮәд»Җйәј MiddlewareExemptions з”ЁжӯЈеүҮе®ҡдҪҚ set literal иҖҢдёҚеҸӘ `"/livez" in text`**пјҡеҫҢиҖ…жңғиў« comment / docstring ж„ҸеӨ–йҖҡйҒҺпјӣжӯЈеүҮе®ҡдҪҚеҲ°гҖҢзңҹзҡ„йӮЈеҖӢ setгҖҚжүҚиғҪдҝқиӯүгҖҢexemption зңҹзҡ„з”ҹж•Ҳж–ј middlewareгҖҚдёҚжҳҜ dead textгҖӮ**зӮәд»Җйәј ProbePortResolvesToContainerPort йҺ– `http`вҶ’8000**пјҡnamed port `http` еңЁ Service / Ingress / HPA йғҪиҪүдёҖеұӨгҖҒprobe д№ҹз”Ё namedпјҢиӢҘ container port йҮҚж–°е‘ҪеҗҚзӮә `api` зӯү `http` ж¶ҲеӨұгҖҒkubelet жңғ **silently skip probe**пјҲжүҫдёҚеҲ° named port дёҚжҳҜйҢҜиӘӨпјҢжҳҜ no-opпјүвҖ”вҖ”йҖҷжўқ contract жҳҜеҫҢжӮ”и—ҘгҖӮ**зӮәд»Җйәј G5 #4 contract йӮ„и·Ёз•Ңжё¬ G1 test еӯ—жЁЈ**пјҡ`/livez` зҡ„ draining-stays-200 дҝқиӯүжҳҜ G5 #4 иғҪ work зҡ„еүҚжҸҗпјӣжңӘдҫҶ G1 refactor иӢҘжҠҠи©І test еҲӘдәҶгҖҒprobe (1) `scripts/dr_drill.sh` (~19 KB / bash `set -euo pipefail` / +x / stage-separated) operator-runnable local-host twin of G6 #1 CI workflow. Four stages mirror the workflow job boundaries: **stage 1 primary-backup** uses the IDENTICAL `sqlite3.Connection.backup()` Python API that `scripts/backup_selftest.py` consumes (one source of truth for "what does a backup look like" вҖ” any drift in CPython's sqlite library surfaces on both sides simultaneously) вҶ’ writes `<out>/backup.db`; **stage 2 secondary-restore** `cp backup.db restored.db` simulates the cross-host hop (the G6 #1 workflow's artefact-upload is the CI analogue вҖ” local-host drill reproduces the Python backup вҶ’ open cycle, which is the semantic round-trip that matters); **stage 3 selftest** invokes `python3 scripts/backup_selftest.py <out>/restored.db` verbatim (integrity_check + 6 REQUIRED_TABLES + Phase 53 audit_log hash chain вҖ” same exit codes as the selftest); **stage 4 smoke-subset** runs `pytest backend/tests/test_prod_smoke_test_subset_cli.py` (the DAG-1 CLI contract вҖ” same test file the CI `smoke-subset` job runs); **report (always runs)** writes `<out>/dr-drill-report.md` with status table mirroring the CI workflow's report shape (reviewers scan both with the same template). Flags `--db PATH` / `--out DIR` / `--no-smoke` (data-plane-only drill) / `--seed` (creates synthetic 6-table + 5-row-audit-chain DB matching the CI seed so drill runs on empty checkouts) / `--help`. Exit codes mirror `backup_selftest.py`: 0 all green / 1 usage / 2 backup / 3 restore or selftest / 4 smoke / 5 report write. `fail()` always attempts report write BEFORE exiting (operator attaches report to incident ticket even on red). Locates PROJECT_ROOT from `$BASH_SOURCE` so `cd /tmp && scripts/dr_drill.sh` works. page вҖ” еҚізӮәд»Җйәј G7 #1 еҗҢжҷӮ ship counter + gaugeгҖӮ**зӮәд»Җйәјдёү alert йғҪ `for: 2m`**пјҡ2m = 4 scrape intervalsпјҲ30s scrape / 15s scrapeпјү= и¶іеӨ  ride out single-scrape noise иҲҮ rolling-deploy graceful-drain flapsпјӣ< 1m жңғ page on noiseгҖҒ> 5m еңЁ incident е…§ fire еӨӘжҷҡпјҲoperator е·ІйҢҜйҒҺ early response windowпјүпјӣTODO headline жҳҺеҜ«гҖҢ5xx rate > 1% for grep жүӢжҹ„гҖҚвҖ” д»»зјәдёҖеҖӢ future-self жғіе®ҡдҪҚ bundle closure жңғеӨҡжүҫ 10 еҲҶйҗҳгҖӮ**зӮәд»Җйәј I TestScopeFence еҗ« `bundle.yml дёҚеӯҳеңЁ` жӯЈйқў absence ж–·иЁҖ**пјҡжҠҠгҖҢеҲ»ж„ҸжІ’ shipгҖҚи®ҠжҲҗ contract вҖ” жңӘдҫҶжҹҗдәәжҸҗиӯ°еҠ  bundle.yml жҷӮеҝ…й Ҳе…Ҳж”№ test жҲ–еҲӘ testпјҢе…©иҖ…йғҪжңғи§ёзҷјеҜ©й–ұпјӣеҒ·еЎһйҖІ commit жІ’дәәеҜ©зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ‘е өжӯ»гҖӮ**зӮәд»Җйәј H йҺ– `12th continuation` literal иҖҢдёҚеҸӘйҺ– breadcrumb дёү literal**пјҡchain lengthпјҲ12thпјүжҳҜ pattern йҖЈзәҢжҖ§зҡ„ијүй«” вҖ” жҹҗcommit еҒ·жҮ¶еҜ«гҖҢnthгҖҚзңҒжҹҘж¬Ўж•ёпјҢchain е°ұж–·дәҶпјҲеҫҢдҫҶиҖ…дёҚзҹҘжӯӨ pattern е»¶зәҢиҮіз¬¬е№ҫж¬ЎпјүгҖӮеҡҙж јж–· literal ж•ёеӯ—и®“жҜҸж¬Ўе»¶зәҢйғҪеҝ…жӣҙж–°гҖҒзҙҜз©Қ metadataгҖӮ**G7 зӢҖж…Ӣ вҖ” 4 йЎҶ checkboxпјҡ#1 Prometheus еӣӣ metric `[x]` / #2 Grafana dashboard `[x]` / #3 alert rules `[x]` / #4 дәӨд»ҳ bundle `[x]`пјҲжң¬еӣһеҗҲпјүгҖӮG7 bucket й—ңй–ү = HA observability phase е®ҢжҲҗ = з¬¬ 12 ж¬ЎйЎҜжҖ§йҒ·з§» pattern е»¶зәҢжҲҗеҠҹ**гҖӮG7 еҫҢзәҢз„Ў rowпјӣдёӢдёҖеҸҜй–ӢпјҡV6 row 1550пјҲdevice-frame.tsx иЈқзҪ®еӨ–жЎҶ rendererпјүжҲ– В§H Host-aware Coordinator row 1403пјҲ`backend/host_metrics.py` baseline hardcodeпјүгҖӮ -->

**зӣёдҫқжҖ§**пјҡG1 вҶ’ G2 вҶ’ G3пјҲrolling вҶ’ blue-greenпјүпјӣG4 зҚЁз«ӢеҸҜдёҰиЎҢпјӣG5 е»әиӯ°еҫ… G1вҖ“G4 з©©е®ҡеҫҢпјӣG6гҖҒG7 ж©«еҗ‘ж”ҜжҸҙгҖӮ

**й җдј°**пјҡG1 (2d) + G2 (3d) + G3 (2d) + G4 (5-7d) + G5 (4-5d) + G6 (2d) + G7 (2d) вүҲ **20-23 day**гҖӮ

---

## рҹ…— Priority H вҖ” Host-aware CoordinatorпјҲдё»ж©ҹиІ ијүж„ҹзҹҘ + иҮӘйҒ©жҮүиӘҝеәҰпјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡзҸҫиЎҢ `_ModeSlot`пјҲ`backend/decision_engine.py` L52-189пјүеҸӘд»Ҙ Operation Mode зөҰйқңж…Ӣ budgetпјҲmanual=1/supervised=2/full_auto=4/turbo=8пјүпјҢcoordinator дёҚи®Җ CPU/mem/diskпјҢprewarm зҙ”зҢңжё¬гҖӮйўЁйҡӘпјҡturbo еңЁй«ҳеЈ“жҷӮд»ҚзЎ¬еЎһ вҶ’ OOM / watchdog иӘӨеҲӨ stuck вҶ’ йҮҚи©Ұж”ҫеӨ§еЈ“еҠӣгҖӮUI `host-device-panel.tsx` L40-51 `HostInfo` жҳҜ placeholder жңӘеҜҰдҪңгҖӮ
>
> еҹәжә–зЎ¬й«”пјҲhardcode baselineпјүпјҡAMD Ryzen 9 9950XгҖҒWSL2 еҲҶй…Қ **16 cores + 64 GB RAM + 512 GB disk**гҖӮ

### H1. дё»ж©ҹ metrics жҺЎйӣҶпјҲbaseline hardcode зүҲпјү
- [x] `backend/host_metrics.py`пјҡе®ҡзҫ© `HOST_BASELINE = HostBaseline(cpu_cores=16, mem_total_gb=64, disk_total_gb=512, cpu_model="AMD Ryzen 9 9950X")`
- [x] `psutil` жҺЎжЁЈпјҡ`cpu_percent(interval=1)` / `virtual_memory()` (з”Ё `available` еҸҚжҺЁ) / `disk_usage('/')` / `os.getloadavg()`
- [x] Docker SDK жҠ“ running container ж•ё + зёҪ mem reservationпјӣDocker Desktop жғ…еўғ fallback `docker stats --no-stream`
- [x] жҺЎжЁЈ 5s йҖұжңҹгҖҒring buffer 60 й»һпјҲ5 еҲҶйҗҳжӯ·еҸІпјү
- [x] WSL2 иј”еҠ©иЁҠиҷҹпјҡ`loadavg_1m / 16 > 0.9` д№ҹжЁҷиЁҳзӮә high pressureпјҲhost е…¶д»–йҖІзЁӢпјү
- [x] Prometheus gaugesпјҡ`host_cpu_percent` / `host_mem_percent` / `host_disk_percent` / `host_loadavg_1m` / `host_container_count`
- [x] Endpointпјҡ`GET /api/v1/host/metrics`пјҲcurrent + historyпјү
- [x] SSE eventпјҡ`host.metrics.tick`пјҲ5s жҺЁйҖҒпјү
- [x] жё¬и©Ұпјҡmock psutilгҖҒй©—иӯү ring buffer rotationгҖҒDocker unavailable жҷӮзҡ„ fallback
- й җдј°пјҡ**0.5 day**

### H2. Coordinator иІ ијүж„ҹзҹҘиӘҝеәҰпјҲprecondition + backoffпјү
- [x] `_ModeSlot.acquire()` ж–°еўһ preconditionпјҡ`cpu_pct < 85 AND mem_pct < 85 AND container_count < K`
- [x] и¶…жЁҷжҷӮжҢҮж•ё backoffпјҲcap 30sпјүпјҢдёҚдҪ”ж§ҪдҪҚпјӣemit `sandbox.deferred` audit дәӢд»¶пјҲreason: `host_cpu_high` / `host_mem_high` / `container_cap`пјү
- [x] Turbo иҮӘеӢ•йҷҚзҙҡпјҡ`cpu_pct > 80` жҢҒзәҢ 30s вҶ’ йҷҚеҲ° supervised budgetпјӣжҒўеҫ©еҫҢеҸҜиҮӘеӢ•еӣһеҚҮпјҲйңҖеҶ·еҚ» 2 minпјү
- [x] `auto_derate=true` иЁӯе®ҡй–Ӣй—ңпјҲ`backend/config.py`пјүпјҢдҪҝз”ЁиҖ…еҸҜй—ңй–үпјҲturbo жЁЎејҸйңҖжүӢеӢ• confirmпјү
- [x] PrewarmпјҲ`sandbox_prewarm.py`пјүеңЁ high pressure жҷӮжҡ«еҒңж–°е»ә warm poolпјӣе·І warm зҡ„дҝқз•ҷ
- [x] Audit иЁҳйҢ„жүҖжңү derate / recover жұәзӯ–пјҲPhase 53 hash-chainпјү
- [x] жё¬и©Ұпјҡmock host_metrics жЁЎж“¬й«ҳеЈ“ вҶ’ й©—иӯү acquire иў«йҳ»еЎһгҖҒderate и§ёзҷјгҖҒrecover еҶ·еҚ»<!-- 2026-04-18 H2 row 1517: `backend/tests/test_h2_integration_host_pressure.py` ж–°еўһ 4 йЎҶз«ҜеҲ°з«Ҝж•ҙеҗҲжё¬и©ҰпјҲ`TestFullPressureLifecycle` + `TestMemPressureBlocksAcquireSymmetry` + `TestContainerCapBlocksAcquireSymmetry` + `TestSnapshotDrivenDerateRecoverCycle`пјүпјҢд»Ҙ mock `host_metrics._host_history` ring buffer зӮәе–®дёҖеЈ“еҠӣдҫҶжәҗпјҢж–јеҗҢдёҖ flow дёІйҖҡдёүж®өпјҡ(1) й«ҳеЈ“ snapshot е®үиЈқеҫҢ `_ModeSlot.acquire()` еңЁ precondition иҝҙеңҲе…§ deferпјҢ`_shared_parallel` з¶ӯжҢҒ 0гҖҒ`sandbox.deferred` SSE + audit ж”ң `host_cpu_high` reason emitпјӣ(2) д»Ҙ virtual clock 30s й©…еӢ• `evaluate_turbo_derate()`пјҢengage `coordinator.turbo_derate`пјҲcpu=95 / threshold 80 / derated_to=2 / from=8пјү+ Phase-53 `entity_id=engaged` audit row + `_effective_budget(turbo)==2`пјӣ(3) snapshot жҸӣжҲҗ cpu=10 еҫҢ acquire е®ҢжҲҗ вҶ’ йҮҚзҪ® `low_cpu_since`пјҲacquire и·Ҝеҫ‘жңғд»Ҙ wall-clock жұЎжҹ“иҷӣж“¬жҷӮйҗҳпјүвҶ’ иҷӣж“¬ 120s cooldown и§ёзҷј `coordinator.turbo_recover` + `entity_id=recovered` + еӣһеҲ° budget=8гҖӮMem и»ёиҲҮ container_cap и»ёиЈңе…©йЎҶе°ҚзЁұе°Қз…§жё¬и©ҰпјҢ`TestSnapshotDrivenDerateRecoverCycle` еүҮиө°з„ЎйЎҜејҸ cpu_percent зҡ„ production sampling pathгҖӮе…Ё H2 suite 91 йЎҶпјҲintegration 4 + precondition 15 + backoff_audit 15 + turbo_derate 20 + derate_audit 9 + auto_derate_switch 13 + prewarm_pause 15пјү4.79s з¶ пјҢйӣ¶еӣһжӯёгҖӮ -->
- й җдј°пјҡ**2 day**

## рҹ…Ҙ Priority V вҖ” Visual Design Loop + Workspace ArchitectureпјҲv0.dev / Codex й«”й©—еұӨ + зҚЁз«Ӣе·ҘдҪңеҚҖпјү

> иғҢжҷҜпјҡW/P/X дёүзі»еҲ—пјҲscaffold + compliance + deployпјүе·Іе…ЁйғЁе®ҢжҲҗпјҢдҪҶй«”й©—еұӨпјҲAI иҮӘдё»еҜ«е®Ңж•ҙ app + еҚіжҷӮиҰ–иҰәеӣһйҘӢ + е°Қи©ұиҝӯд»Јдҝ®ж”№ + зҚЁз«Ӣе·ҘдҪңеҚҖ UIпјү= 0гҖӮv0.dev е’Ң Codex зҡ„ж ёеҝғе·®з•°еҢ–дёҚеңЁеҫҢз«Ҝеј•ж“ҺпјҲOmniSight O зі»еҲ—е·Іе№іжүӢпјүпјҢиҖҢеңЁгҖҢдҪҝз”ЁиҖ…зңӢеҲ°д»ҖйәјгҖҒжҖҺйәјдә’еӢ•гҖҚвҖ”вҖ”йҖҷжӯЈжҳҜ V зі»еҲ—иҰҒиЈңзҡ„гҖӮ
>
> **з”ўе“Ғе®ҡдҪҚ**пјҡW/P/X жҳҜ OmniSight зҡ„йҡұи—Ҹж®әжүӢйҗ§гҖӮеөҢе…ҘејҸжҳҜдё»з·ҡпјҢдҪҶз•¶дҪҝз”ЁиҖ…йңҖиҰҒзҙ”з¶Із«ҷ / иЎҢеӢ• app / зҙ”и»ҹй«”жҷӮпјҢзі»зөұеҝ…й ҲиғҪзҗҶи§ЈйңҖжұӮ вҶ’ иҰҸеҠғд»»еӢҷ вҶ’ иҮӘдё»е®ҢжҲҗ вҶ’ дәӨд»ҳжҲҗе“ҒгҖӮV зі»еҲ—жҠҠ W/P/X еҫһгҖҢscaffold generatorгҖҚеҚҮзҙҡзӮәгҖҢend-to-end autonomous builder + visual iteration + dedicated workspaceгҖҚгҖӮ
>
> **UI жһ¶ж§Ӣ**пјҡдё» dashboardпјҲneural-grid жҢҮжҸ®дёӯеҝғпјүдҝқз•ҷзөҰеөҢе…ҘејҸдё»з·ҡгҖӮW/P/X еҗ„иҮӘе°Һеҗ‘зҚЁз«Ӣе·ҘдҪңеҚҖпјҲ`/workspace/web`гҖҒ`/workspace/mobile`гҖҒ`/workspace/software`пјүпјҢжңүе°Ҳеұ¬ layoutгҖҒpreview paneгҖҒиҝӯд»Ј chatгҖӮжҢҮжҸ®дёӯеҝғйЎҜзӨәгҖҢN еҖӢе·ҘдҪңеҚҖжӯЈеңЁйҒӢдҪңгҖҚsummary card еҸҜи·іиҪүгҖӮ
>
> е°ҚжЁҷпјҡv0.devпјҲWeb й«”й©—пјү+ Codex for Almost EverythingпјҲMobile + Software й«”й©—пјүгҖӮзӣ®жЁҷдёҚжҳҜжЁЎд»ҝпјҢжҳҜгҖҢеҫҢз«ҜжІ»зҗҶи¶…и¶Ҡ + еүҚз«Ҝй«”й©—е№іжүӢгҖҚгҖӮ
>
> зӣёдҫқпјҡ**O3 Worker Pool**пјҲвң… doneпјүгҖҒ**W0-W10 / P0-P10 / X0-X9**пјҲвң… doneпјүгҖҒ**R0-R3 PEP + ChatOps + Entropy + Scratchpad**пјҲвң… doneпјүгҖӮз„ЎзЎ¬еүҚзҪ®йҳ»еЎһвҖ”вҖ”L еҒҡе®ҢеҫҢеҸҜз«ӢеҚій–Ӣе·ҘгҖӮ

- [x] Workspace session persistenceпјҡеҲҮжҸӣе·ҘдҪңеҚҖдёҚдёҹеӨұ stateпјҲlocalStorage + backend session syncпјү *(done: V0 #4 вҖ” three new surfaces stitch persistence onto the V0 #3 provider without changing its API. **`hooks/use-workspace-persistence.ts`** (~220 иЎҢ) exports a pure utility module: `WORKSPACE_SNAPSHOT_SCHEMA_VERSION = 1`, `workspaceStorageKey(type)` вҶ’ `"omnisight:workspace:<type>:session"`, `workspaceSessionApiPath(type)` вҶ’ `/api/workspace/<type>/session`, plus load/save/fetch/push/clear and `parseWorkspaceEnvelope` + `pickNewerEnvelope` (newest-savedAt-wins with last-writer-tiebreak). Every function is SSR-safe (`typeof window === "undefined"` early-exit), never throws, and returns `null` on malformed payloads вҖ” so a corrupt localStorage blob silently falls back to defaults instead of crashing the workspace shell. `fetchImpl` is injectable for tests. **Envelope shape**: `{schemaVersion: 1, savedAt: <ISO-8601>, state: {project?, agentSession?, preview?}}` вҖ” mirror of the three V0 #3 sub-states; unknown sub-state fields are dropped on parse for forward-compat. **`components/omnisight/persistent-workspace-provider.tsx`** (~180 иЎҢ Client Component) wraps `<WorkspaceProvider>` with a bridge that hydrates via `useEffect` (two-phase: localStorage seed first, backend GET overlays only when `savedAt` strictly newer; defer-to-effect avoids Next.js hydration mismatches on SSR). Write-through is sync to localStorage and debounced (default 400ms, `backendDebounceMs={0}` for tests) to `/api/workspace/<type>/session`. A `suppressSaveRef` + microtask-release pattern prevents the PUT-loop that would otherwise round-trip the backend's own payload back at it during hydration. `disableBackendSync` prop for browser-only mode. **`app/api/workspace/[type]/session/route.ts`** (~130 иЎҢ) implements GET / PUT / DELETE with an HMR-persistent `globalThis`-attached `Map<WorkspaceType, envelope>` store; schema-validated PUT returns 400 on bad JSON / bad schema / unknown type; 204 on empty GET; 200 with envelope on hit. `__resetWorkspaceSessionStoreForTests` exported. **ж•ҙеҗҲ**: `app/workspace/[type]/layout.tsx` swapped `<WorkspaceProvider>` for `<PersistentWorkspaceProvider>` вҖ” one-line change, zero API surface churn for V0 #3 consumers. **жё¬и©Ұ** вҖ” 3 new suites, **59 new tests all green** (plus existing V0 #1/#2/#3 59 still green + pre-existing regression coverage = 120 workspace-related tests pass with zero regressions): `test/hooks/use-workspace-persistence.test.ts` (31 йЎҶ) вҖ” storage key namespacing, envelope schema guards (non-object / wrong version / missing savedAt / bad state), roundtrip, per-type scoping, malformed JSON tolerance, unknown-type runtime guard, save failure under quota mock, backend GET (204/404/net-fail/malformed/happy), backend PUT (ok/5xx/net-fail + body shape), `pickNewerEnvelope` precedence + tiebreak, SSR safety (no window); `test/app/workspace-session-api.test.ts` (13 йЎҶ) вҖ” GET emptyвҶ’204, GET unknown-typeвҶ’400, PUTвҶ’GET roundtrip, PUT bad-type/bad-json/bad-schema/bad-stateвҶ’400, overwrite semantics, cross-type isolation, partial-state sub-object drop, DELETE 204 + remove; `test/components/persistent-workspace-provider.test.tsx` (15 йЎҶ) вҖ” empty-storage default render, seeded-after-mount hydration (all three sub-states), malformed-localStorage tolerance, type-scoped seed isolation, project/agent/preview write-through to localStorage, schemaVersion stamping on save, unmountвҶ’remount roundtrip, mount-time GET call + path + method, backend-wins-on-newer-savedAt, backend-loses-on-older-savedAt, debounced PUT body shape, network-failure tolerance, `disableBackendSync` path (no fetch, still writes storage), reset clears + persists. **Scope иҮӘеҫӢ** вҖ” only added 3 source files + 3 test files + 2-line layout edit; V0 #3 `workspace-context.tsx` untouched and its 30 contract tests still pass; no coupling to Auth/Tenant providers (keeps the "workspace state вү  global state" V0 #3 isolation intact вҖ” tenant scoping at the key level is a future layer))*

жӢ–ж”ҫеҚҖпјҲ`onDragOver`/`onDragLeave`/`onDrop`пјҢ`data-dragging` еұ¬жҖ§ for жЁЈејҸ + жё¬и©ҰпјүгҖҒ`filesToChatAttachments` зҙ”еҮҪж•ёжҠҠ `File[]` иҪүжҲҗ `WorkspaceChatAttachment[]`пјҲеҗ« layoutпјүгҖҒ**Rule 4** word_count вүҘ 60 + д»»дёҖ large дҝЎиҷҹ or 5+ action verb вҶ’ largeгҖҒ**Rule 5** зҙ” small hits + вүӨ 20 words + вүӨ 3 conjunction вҶ’ smallгҖҒ**Rule 5b** жҘөзҹӯ prompt (вүӨ10 words) + вүӨ 1 action + вүӨ 1 component вҶ’ smallпјҲеҰӮ "rename the button"пјүгҖҒ**Rule 6** medium catch-allпјҲйҷ„ ambiguity жЁҷзұӨдёҚи®“ reasons зӮәз©әпјүвҶ’ `route(prompt, ...)` дёүйҮҚ override stackпјҡ`complexity=` hard override жЁҷ `caller_override:oldвҶ’new`гҖҒ`has_existing_code=True` soft nudge жҠҠ medium+зҹӯ prompt+з„Ў large дҝЎиҷҹдёӢжҺЁеҲ° smallпјҲжЁҷ stackпјү/ `hard-pinned-palette-class`пјҲ`bg-slate-500` зӯү Tailwind default palette bypass tokenпјү/ `unknown-css-var`пјҲ`var(--xxx)` жңӘе®ҡзҫ©пјҢallowlist з©әжҷӮиҮӘеӢ•и·ійҒҺйҒҝ noiseпјүгҖӮ**Pure lowercaseгҖҒ`rgb_to_hex(r,g,b)` ж”ҜжҸҙ out-of-range clampгҖҒ`hsl_to_hex(h,s,l)` иө°жЁҷжә– HSLвҶ’RGB 6-segment tableпјҲturn/rad/grad hue е–®дҪҚгҖҒи¶… 360 еәҰ moduloпјүгҖҒ`extract_hex_colors()` regex with word-boundary lookahead жӢ’й•·еәҸеҲ— / URL fragmentгҖҒ`extract_rgb_colors()` ж”ҜжҸҙ comma / space-separated / `%`-form / alpha slotгҖҒ`extract_hsl_colors()` ж”ҜжҸҙ deg/rad/turn/grad е–®дҪҚгҖҒ`extract_font_families()` CSS `font-family:` + JSX `fontFamily:`гҖҒ`extract_tailwind_palette_classes()` 22 еҖӢ palette family Г— 12 еҖӢ utility prefixгҖҒ`collect_allowed_colors()` / `collect_allowed_fonts()` / `collect_allowed_css_var_names()` еҫһ DesignTokens и·қеҮәе…ҒиЁұйӣҶпјҲеҝҪз•Ҙйқһ color/font kindпјүгҖҒ`color_allowed()` / `font_allowed()` жҜ”е°Қ with generic keyword зҷҪеҗҚе–®пјҲ`sans-serif` / `monospace` / `system-ui` зӯү 14 еҖӢ CSS йҖҡз”Ё fallback ж°ёйҒ  allowedпјҢдёҚ flag йҒҝ noiseпјүгҖӮ**Font-stack splitter** вҖ” `_split_font_stack()` жүӢеҜ« depth+quote иҝҪи№Өзҡ„ splitпјҢеңЁ paren жҲ–еј•иҷҹе…§дёҚж–·еңЁ commaпјҢиҷ•зҗҶ `"var(--font-sans, 'Inter'), sans-serif"` йҖҷйЎһ nested жғ…жіҒгҖӮ**graceful fallback е…Ёйқў** вҖ” `None` tokens вҶ’ empty allowlistпјҲдёҖеҫӢ warnпјүгҖҒmissing dir вҶ’ clean empty reportгҖҒoversize file (>2 MiB й җиЁӯ) вҶ’ skip + logгҖҒmalformed UTF-8 bytes вҶ’ skipгҖҒURL non-200 / з¶Іи·Ҝ raise вҶ’ empty report + source жЁҷиЁҳгҖҒmalformed hex / rgb вҶ’ `normalize_hex() == None` иҖҢйқһ raiseгҖҒд»»дҪ• detector еөҢеҘ—еӨұж•—дёҚз ҙ pipelineгҖӮ**`DEFAULT_EXCLUDES`** вҖ” `node_modules` / `.git` / `.next/cache` / `.cache` еӣӣзӣ®йҢ„ + `SCAN_EXTENSIONS` 7 extension (`.html/.htm/.css/.js/.mjs/.cjs/.svg`) зӮә deploy artefact дёүеӨ§ surfaceгҖӮ**Deterministic output** вҖ” жүҖжңү violation жҢү `(source, line, column, `variants` е№іеҸ°и®Ҡй«” tuple / `notes` жҸҗзӨә tuple / `deprecates` еҸ–д»Јжё…е–® tupleпјү+ `key` property (`"swiftui:NavigationStack"` иӨҮеҗҲйҚө)гҖӮ**`PLATFORMS = ("swiftui","compose","flutter")` еӣәе®ҡ 3 еҖӢ + `CATEGORIES = ("layout","navigation","inputs","overlay","feedback","data")` еӣәе®ҡ 6 еҖӢ** и·Ёе№іеҸ°е…ұз”Ё taxonomyпјҲе°ҚйҪҠ sibling shadcn 6 йЎһпјҢз§»йҷӨ web-only "form" еӣ  mobile жІ’зӯүеғ№ Form composition layerпјүгҖӮ**catalogue иҰҸжЁЎ** вҖ” 104 entry зёҪиҰҶи“ӢпјҲ**SwiftUI 33** = 12 layout / 4 nav / 8 inputs / 5 overlay / 1 feedback / 3 dataпјӣ**Compose 32** = 8 layout / 4 nav / 9 inputs / 3 overlay / 4 feedback / 4 dataпјӣ**Flutter 39** = 12 layout / 6 nav / 9 inputs / 3 overlay / 5 feedback / 4 dataпјүпјӣжҜҸе№іеҸ° Г— жҜҸ category иҮіе°‘ 1 entry еј·еҲ¶пјҲcontract test йҺ–пјүд»Ҙдҝқиӯү cross-platform parityвҖ”вҖ”agent emit дёүе№іеҸ°зӯүеғ№зЁӢејҸзўјжҷӮдёҚжңғеңЁжҹҗ category зјәж–ҷгҖӮ**Deprecation guard** вҖ” SwiftUI `NavigationStack.deprecates=("NavigationView",)` + `@Observable.deprecates=("ObservableObject + @Published",)`гҖҒCompose `NavigationBar.deprecates=("BottomNavigation (M2)",)`гҖҒFlutter `NavigationBar.deprecates=("BottomNavigationBar (M2 вҖ” keep only for legacy apps)",)`пјӣcontract test `TestDeprecatedFormsNotRegistered` еј·еҲ¶пјҡиў«еҸ–д»Јзҡ„ canonical еҗҚпјҲеҰӮ `NavigationView`пјү**дёҚ**еҫ—иҮӘе·ұеҶҚ register зӮәдёҖеҖӢ entryпјҢеҗҰеүҮ agent иҝ” None дёҚ raiseгҖӮ**Build-error parser `parse_build_error(stderr, tool)`** вҖ” Gradle жҠ“ `e:|w: file:line:col: message` kotlinc/javac иЁәж–·еҪўејҸ + `FAILURE: Build failed` / `* What went wrong` / `Execution failed for task` / `Could not resolve` trigger еҫҢжӢүдёӢдёҖиЎҢйқһз©әдҪң messageпјӣXcode жҠ“ `/path.swift:line:col: error|warning: message`пјӣеҺ»йҮҚ (message,file,line,severity) keyпјӣж°ёдёҚ raiseпјӣunknown tool иҝ”з©ә tupleгҖӮ**е·Ҙе…·йҸҲ wiring зҙ°зҜҖ** вҖ” Android е®№еҷЁиө° `docker run --rm`пјҲbuild дёҖж¬ЎжҖ§ ephemeralпјҢGradle cache йҖҸйҒҺ bind-mount еҜ«еӣһ workspaceпјүпјӣAndroid е·ҘдҪңзӣ®йҢ„ `/workspace`пјҲдёҚиҲҮе°ҲжЎҲиҮӘжңү `/app` жЁЎзө„еҗҚиЎқзӘҒпјүпјӣAndroid й җиЁӯ image `gradle:8.10-jdk21`пјҲJDK 21 + Gradle 8.10 е°ҚйҪҠ V1 scaffolder жңҹеҫ…пјүпјӣiOS DerivedData еӣәе®ҡеңЁ жЁЎж“¬зЎ¬й«”зӣёж©ҹйҒ®ж“Ӣ status barгҖӮ**3 еҖӢ mutually exclusive state** вҖ” `loading=true` жёІжҹ“ shimmer placeholder + `role=status` + `aria-label="loading screenshot"`пјҲV6 #4 grid зӯүжҲӘең–жҷӮдёҚз ҙзүҲпјүпјӣ`empty=true` жёІжҹ“ "no screenshot" еӯ—жЁЈпјҲagent йӮ„жІ’жҲӘйҒҺжҷӮзҡ„еҲқе§ӢзӢҖж…ӢпјүпјӣйғҪдёҚзӮә true дё” `screenshotUrl` зөҰдәҶ вҶ’ жёІжҹ“ `<img>`пјӣloading е„Әе…Ҳзҙҡ > emptyпјҲеҗҢжҷӮзӮә true жҷӮ shimmer еӢқеҮәпјүгҖӮ**Cutout 4 зЁ® kind** вҖ” `island`(iPhone 15+ Dynamic IslandпјҢиҶ еӣҠеҪў borderRadius=height/2) / `notch`(иҖҒ iPhone X-14пјҢиҶ еӣҠеҪў) / `hole`(Android
